              0                                                                      AS `CJ_ESTAD_LYA_OLN_PPR`
       FROM ((((`DW_Presupuesto_SKU` as `s` LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r`
                ON (`s`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Canales` as `cl`
               ON (`s`.`Canal_Id` = `cl`.`Id`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Agencias` as `a`
              ON (`r`.`Agencia_Id` = `a`.`Id`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
             ON (`s`.`Producto_Id` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
       WHERE (`s`.`Canal` IN ('Tat', 'Mayoristas'))
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, `p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA`)) AS `SUB`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_REB_PAN as
SELECT `dc`.`COD_CANAL` AS                                                                                                         `COD_CANAL`,
       `dc`.`COD_AGENCIA` AS                                                                                                       `COD_AGENCIA`,
       `dc`.`COD_CLIENTE` AS                                                                                                       `COD_CLIENTE`,
       `dc`.`NOM_CLIENTE` AS                                                                                                       `NOM_CLIENTE`,
       LEFT(`dc`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) AS                                                                                                 `Ruta`,
       SUM(CASE
               WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`)
               ELSE 0 END) AS                                                                                                      `MES_JULIO`,
       SUM(CASE
               WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 8) THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`)
               ELSE 0 END) AS                                                                                                      `MES_AGOSTO`,
       SUM(CASE
               WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 9) THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`)
               ELSE 0 END) AS                                                                                                      `MES_SEPTIEMBRE`,
       SUM(CASE
               WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 10) THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`)
               ELSE 0 END) AS                                                                                                      `MES_OCTUBRE`,
       SUM(CASE
               WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 11) THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`)
               ELSE 0 END) AS                                                                                                      `MES_NOVIEMBRE`,
       SUM(CASE
               WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 12) THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`)
               ELSE 0 END) AS                                                                                                      `MES_DICIEMBRE`,
       SUM((((((CASE WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`) ELSE 0 END +
                CASE WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 8) THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`) ELSE 0 END) +
               CASE WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 9) THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`) ELSE 0 END) +
              CASE WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 10) THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`) ELSE 0 END) +
             CASE WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 11) THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`) ELSE 0 END) + CASE
                                                                                                                   WHEN (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 12)
                                                                                                                       THEN (`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`)
                                                                                                                   ELSE 0 END)) AS `TOTAL_VENTAS_KILOS`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`dc`.`COD_CLIENTE` IN
                 (1105841, 1028638, 275764, 651413, 693482, 869525, 1121340, 319700, 313293, 412069, 215756, 272199,
                  302230)) THEN (`PROM`.`PROMEDIO` * 1.10)
           ELSE (`PROM`.`PROMEDIO` * 1.06) END AS                                                                                  `OBJETIVO`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `fvt` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `dc`
        ON (`fvt`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `dc`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `dp`
       ON (`fvt`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `dp`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN (SELECT `Vtas_Kg`.`COD_CANAL`       AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                                        `Vtas_Kg`.`COD_AGENCIA`     AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                                        `Vtas_Kg`.`COD_CLIENTE`     AS `COD_CLIENTE`,
                                                                        `Vtas_Kg`.`NOM_CLIENTE`     AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
                                                                        AVG(`Vtas_Kg`.`Venta_Kilo`) AS `PROMEDIO`
                                                                 FROM (SELECT MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`)                AS `Mes`,
                                                                              `dc`.`COD_CANAL`                         AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                                              `dc`.`COD_AGENCIA`                       AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                                              `dc`.`COD_CLIENTE`                       AS `COD_CLIENTE`,
                                                                              `dc`.`NOM_CLIENTE`                       AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
                                                                              LEFT(`dc`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                 AS `Ruta`,
                                                                              SUM((`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`)) AS `Venta_Kilo`
                                                                       FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `fvt` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `dc`
                                                                              ON (`fvt`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `dc`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `dp`
                                                                             ON (`fvt`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `dp`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
                                                                       WHERE ((YEAR(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2024) AND
                                                                              (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)) AND
                                                                              (`dc`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN'))
                                                                       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6) AS `Vtas_Kg`
                                                                 GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `PROM`
      ON (`PROM`.`COD_CLIENTE` = `dc`.`COD_CLIENTE`))
WHERE ((YEAR(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2024) AND (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12)) AND
       (`dc`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_REB_VENTAS_PAN as
SELECT MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`)                AS `MES`,
       `dc`.`COD_CANAL`                         AS `COD_CANAL`,
       LEFT(`dc`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                 AS `Ruta`,
       `dc`.`COD_AGENCIA`                       AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
       `dc`.`COD_CLIENTE`                       AS `COD_CLIENTE`,
       `dc`.`NOM_CLIENTE`                       AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
       SUM((`fvt`.`VENTA_KG` + `fvt`.`DEV_KG`)) AS `Venta_Kilo`
FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `fvt` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `dc`
       ON (`fvt`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `dc`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `dp`
      ON (`fvt`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `dp`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
WHERE ((YEAR(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (`dc`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_REB_VENTA_PAN_UNIFICADO as
SELECT `crp`.`Ruta`                                                         AS `Ruta`,
       `crp`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                  AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
       `crp`.`COD_CLIENTE`                                                  AS `COD_CLIENTE`,
       `crp`.`NOM_CLIENTE`                                                  AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 1) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END  AS `ENERO`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 2) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END  AS `FEBRERO`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 3) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END  AS `MARZO`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 4) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END  AS `ABRIL`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 5) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END  AS `MAYO`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 6) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END  AS `JUNIO`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 7) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END  AS `JULIO`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 8) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END  AS `AGOSTO`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 9) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END  AS `SEPTIEMBRE`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 10) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END AS `OCTUBRE`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 11) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END AS `NOVIEMBRE`,
       CASE WHEN (`crp`.`MES` = 12) THEN SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`) ELSE 0 END AS `DICIEMBRE`,
       SUM(`crp`.`Venta_Kilo`)                                              AS `VENTA_TOTAL`,
       `crvp`.`OBJETIVO`                                                    AS `OBJETIVO`
FROM (`CL_REB_VENTAS_PAN` as `crp` LEFT JOIN `CL_REB_PAN` as `crvp` ON (`crvp`.`COD_CLIENTE` = `crp`.`COD_CLIENTE`))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_SALES_HORECAS as
SELECT `pr`.`Ruta`                                     AS `Ruta`,
       `c`.`Familia_Horecas`                           AS `Familia_Horecas`,
       `vta`.`VentaTon`                                AS `VentaTon`,
       `vta`.`VentaUSD`                                AS `VentaUSD`,
       CAST(SUM(`pr`.`Toneladas`) AS DECIMAL(45, 8))   AS `PrpTon`,
       CAST(SUM(`pr`.`Facturacion`) AS DECIMAL(45, 8)) AS `PrpUSD`,
       `vta`.`NumClientes`                             AS `NumClientes`
FROM ((`DW_Presupuesto_SKU` as `pr` LEFT JOIN `HOM_Famiias_Canal` as `c`
       ON (`c`.`Producto_Id` = `pr`.`Producto_Id`)) LEFT JOIN (SELECT LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                       AS `Ruta`,
                                                                      `cl`.`Familia_Horecas`                        AS `Familia_Horecas`,
                                                                      (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) AS `VentaTon`,
                                                                      SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                  AS `VentaUSD`,
                                                                      COUNT(DISTINCT `f`.`ID_CLIENTE`)              AS `NumClientes`
                                                               FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                       ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                      ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Famiias_Canal` as `cl`
                                                                     ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `cl`.`Producto_Id`))
                                                               WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY))) AND
                                                                      (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) =
                                                                       MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY))) AND
                                                                      (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'HOR'))
                                                               GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `vta`
      ON ((`pr`.`Ruta` = `vta`.`Ruta`) AND (`c`.`Familia_Horecas` = `vta`.`Familia_Horecas`)))
WHERE ((`pr`.`Anio` = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY))) AND
       (`pr`.`Mes` = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY))) AND (`pr`.`Canal` LIKE '%Horeca%'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 7 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_SALES_TRIM_CUST as
SELECT `vta`.`ID_CLIENTE`    AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
       AVG(`vta`.`TON`)      AS `AVG_TON`,
       AVG(`vta`.`USD`)      AS `AVG_USD`,
       AVG(`vta`.`CJ_Real`)  AS `AVG_CJ_Real`,
       AVG(`vta`.`CJ_Estad`) AS `AVG_CJ_Estad`,
       AVG(`vta`.`Margen`)   AS `Margen`
FROM (SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                          AS `Fecha`,
             `f`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                 AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
             (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000)    AS `TON`,
             SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                     AS `USD`,
             SUM((`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) AS `CJ_Real`,
             SUM((`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))   AS `CJ_Estad`,
             SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                AS `Margen`
      FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
             ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
            ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
      WHERE (DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
              CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)), '/', MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)),
                     '/', '01'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
              CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '/', MONTH(CURDATE()), '/', DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()))), 'YYYY/MM/DD'))
      GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `vta`
GROUP BY 1 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_TOTAL_VENTAS_CLIENTE as
SELECT YEAR(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`)            AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`)           AS `Mes`,
       `dc`.`COD_CLIENTE`                  AS `COD_CLIENTE`,
       SUM(`fvt`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)      AS `usd`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT `fvt`.`ID_PRODUCTO`) AS `NumProductos`
FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `fvt` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `dc`
       ON (`fvt`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `dc`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `dp`
      ON (`fvt`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `dp`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
WHERE ((YEAR(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (`dc`.`COD_CANAL` <> 'MAY'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_TOTAL_VENTAS_CLIENTE_MAYORISTA as
SELECT YEAR(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`)                  AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`)                 AS `Mes`,
       `dc`.`COD_CLIENTE`                        AS `COD_CLIENTE`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`dc`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('AUT', 'DIS')) THEN `dc`.`NOM_CLIENTE`
           ELSE if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                   if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`dc`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                   LEFT(`dc`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) END AS `RUTA`,
       SUM(`fvt`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)            AS `usd`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT `fvt`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)       AS `NumProductos`
FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `fvt` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `dc`
         ON (`fvt`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `dc`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `dp`
        ON (`fvt`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `dp`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
       ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `dp`.`COD_MARCA`) AND (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
           (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 9))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
      ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `dc`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
          (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 9)))
WHERE ((YEAR(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (`dc`.`COD_CANAL` = 'MAY'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_WGTH_CHN_RT_UN_FAM_MARCA as
SELECT `vta`.`CANAL`                                  AS `CANAL`,
       `vta`.`UnidadNegocio`                          AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       `vta`.`Fam_Venta`                              AS `Fam_Venta`,
       `vta`.`Marca_Venta`                            AS `Marca_Venta`,
       `vta`.`Ruta`                                   AS `Ruta`,
       (AVG(`vta`.`KG`) / nullif(`total`.`Total`, 0)) AS `weight_ruta`
FROM ((SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                        AS `Mes`,
              CASE WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `c`.`COD_CANAL` END AS `CANAL`,
              `p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`                                                         AS `UnidadNegocio`,
              `p`.`COD_FAMILIA`                                                              AS `Fam_Venta`,
              `p`.`COD_MARCA`                                                                AS `Marca_Venta`,
              CASE
                  WHEN ((`c`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('DIS', 'AUT')) AND (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` <> 'MAQ'))
                      THEN `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`
                  ELSE if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                          if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                          LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) END                                       AS `Ruta`,
              SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))                                           AS `KG`
       FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
               ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
              ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                  (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 3))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
             ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                 (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 3)))
       WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)), '/',
                      MONTH(DATE_SUB(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)), '/', '01'),
               'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)), '/', MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)),
                      '/', DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)))), 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND
              (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN (999, 'EXP')) AND (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN
                                                         (112, 14, 268, 439, 575, 575, 687, 822, 822, 824, 824, 824,
                                                          999, 999, 999, 999, 999, 'GU')))
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
       HAVING (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) > 0)) AS `vta` LEFT JOIN (SELECT `totalPond`.`CANAL`         AS `CANAL`,
                                                                                     `totalPond`.`UnidadNegocio` AS `UnidadNegocio`,
                                                                                     `totalPond`.`Fam_Venta`     AS `Fam_Venta`,
                                                                                     `totalPond`.`Marca_Venta`   AS `Marca_Venta`,
                                                                                     SUM(`totalPond`.`Total`)    AS `Total`
                                                                              FROM (SELECT `vta2`.`CANAL`         AS `CANAL`,
                                                                                           `vta2`.`UnidadNegocio` AS `UnidadNegocio`,
                                                                                           `vta2`.`Fam_Venta`     AS `Fam_Venta`,
                                                                                           `vta2`.`Marca_Venta`   AS `Marca_Venta`,
                                                                                           `vta2`.`Ruta`          AS `Ruta`,
                                                                                           AVG(`vta2`.`KG`)       AS `Total`
                                                                                    FROM (SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                  AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                 CASE
                                                                                                     WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ')
                                                                                                         THEN 'MAQ'
                                                                                                     ELSE `c`.`COD_CANAL` END             AS `CANAL`,
                                                                                                 `p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`                   AS `UnidadNegocio`,
                                                                                                 `p`.`COD_FAMILIA`                        AS `Fam_Venta`,
                                                                                                 `p`.`COD_MARCA`                          AS `Marca_Venta`,
                                                                                                 CASE
                                                                                                     WHEN (
                                                                                                         (`c`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('DIS', 'AUT')) AND
                                                                                                         (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` <> 'MAQ'))
                                                                                                         THEN `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`
                                                                                                     ELSE if(
                                                                                                             (NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                                                             if(
                                                                                                                     (`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2),
                                                                                                                     `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`,
                                                                                                                     LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                                                             LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) END AS `Ruta`,
                                                                                                 SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))     AS `KG`
                                                                                          FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                                                   ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                                                  ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
                                                                                                 ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND
                                                                                                     (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                                                     (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 3))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
                                                                                                ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND
                                                                                                    (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                                                    (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 3)))
                                                                                          WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
                                                                                                  CONCAT(
                                                                                                          YEAR(DATE_SUB(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)),
                                                                                                          '/',
                                                                                                          MONTH(DATE_SUB(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)),
                                                                                                          '/', '01'),
                                                                                                  'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
                                                                                                  CONCAT(
                                                                                                          YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)),
                                                                                                          '/',
                                                                                                          MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)),
                                                                                                          '/',
                                                                                                          DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)))),
                                                                                                  'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND
                                                                                                 (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN (999, 'EXP')) AND
                                                                                                 (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN
                                                                                                  (112, 14, 268, 439,
                                                                                                   575, 575, 687, 822,
                                                                                                   822, 824, 824, 824,
                                                                                                   999, 999, 999, 999,
                                                                                                   999, 'GU')))
                                                                                          GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
                                                                                          HAVING (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) > 0)) AS `vta2`
                                                                                    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5) AS `totalPond`
                                                                              GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `total`
      ON ((`vta`.`UnidadNegocio` = `total`.`UnidadNegocio`) AND (`vta`.`Fam_Venta` = `total`.`Fam_Venta`) AND
          (`vta`.`Marca_Venta` = `total`.`Marca_Venta`) AND (`vta`.`CANAL` = `total`.`CANAL`)))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_WGTH_CHN_RT_UN_SKU_TRIM as
SELECT `vta`.`CANAL`                                  AS `CANAL`,
       `vta`.`UnidadNegocio`                          AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       `vta`.`Ruta`                                   AS `Ruta`,
       `vta`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                            AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
       (AVG(`vta`.`KG`) / nullif(`total`.`TotKG`, 0)) AS `weight_ruta`
FROM ((SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                        AS `Mes`,
              CASE WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `c`.`COD_CANAL` END AS `CANAL`,
              CASE
                  WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'AMM') THEN if((NOT ISNULL(`h`.`Id`)), 'B2B', 'B2C')
                  ELSE `p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` END                                            AS `UnidadNegocio`,
              CASE
                  WHEN ((`c`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('DIS', 'AUT')) AND (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` <> 'MAQ'))
                      THEN `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`
                  ELSE if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                          if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                          LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) END                                       AS `Ruta`,
              `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                                              AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
              SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))                                           AS `KG`
       FROM (((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                 ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
               ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                   (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 1))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
              ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                  (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 1))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `h` ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `h`.`ID_Producto`))
       WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)), '/', MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)),
                      '/', '01'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '/', MONTH(CURDATE()), '/', DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()))), 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND
              (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN (999, 'EXP')) AND (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN
                                                         (112, 14, 268, 439, 575, 575, 687, 822, 822, 824, 824, 824,
                                                          999, 999, 999, 999, 999, 'GU')))
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5) AS `vta` LEFT JOIN (SELECT `vtaTot`.`UnidadNegocio` AS `UnidadNegocio`,
                                                          `vtaTot`.`CANAL`         AS `CANAL`,
                                                          `vtaTot`.`Ruta`          AS `Ruta`,
                                                          AVG(`vtaTot`.`KG`)       AS `TotKG`
                                                   FROM (SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                  AS `Mes`,
                                                                CASE
                                                                    WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'AMM')
                                                                        THEN if((NOT ISNULL(`h`.`Id`)), 'B2B', 'B2C')
                                                                    ELSE `p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` END      AS `UnidadNegocio`,
                                                                CASE
                                                                    WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ'
                                                                    ELSE `c`.`COD_CANAL` END             AS `CANAL`,
                                                                CASE
                                                                    WHEN ((`c`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('DIS', 'AUT')) AND
                                                                          (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` <> 'MAQ'))
                                                                        THEN `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`
                                                                    ELSE if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                            if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2),
                                                                               `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`,
                                                                               LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                            LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) END AS `Ruta`,
                                                                SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))     AS `KG`
                                                         FROM (((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                   ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                  ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `h`
                                                                 ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `h`.`ID_Producto`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
                                                                ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND
                                                                    (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                    (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 1))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
                                                               ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND
                                                                   (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                   (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 1)))
                                                         WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
                                                                 CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)),
                                                                        '/',
                                                                        MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)),
                                                                        '/', '01'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
                                                                 CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '/', MONTH(CURDATE()), '/',
                                                                        DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()))),
                                                                 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND
                                                                (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN (999, 'EXP')) AND
                                                                (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN
                                                                 (112, 14, 268, 439, 575, 575, 687, 822, 822, 824, 824,
                                                                  824, 999, 999, 999, 999, 999, 'GU')))
                                                         GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `vtaTot`
                                                   GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) AS `total`
      ON ((`vta`.`UnidadNegocio` = `total`.`UnidadNegocio`) AND (`vta`.`CANAL` = `total`.`CANAL`) AND
          (`vta`.`Ruta` = `total`.`Ruta`)))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_WGTH_CHN_RT_UN_TRIM as
SELECT `vta`.`CANAL`                                  AS `CANAL`,
       `vta`.`UnidadNegocio`                          AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       `vta`.`Ruta`                                   AS `Ruta`,
       (AVG(`vta`.`KG`) / nullif(`total`.`TotKG`, 0)) AS `weight_ruta`
FROM ((SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                        AS `Mes`,
              CASE WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `c`.`COD_CANAL` END AS `CANAL`,
              CASE
                  WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'AMM') THEN if((NOT ISNULL(`h`.`Id`)), 'B2B', 'B2C')
                  ELSE `p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` END                                            AS `UnidadNegocio`,
              CASE
                  WHEN ((`c`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('DIS', 'AUT')) AND (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` <> 'MAQ'))
                      THEN `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`
                  ELSE if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                          if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                          LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) END                                       AS `Ruta`,
              SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))                                           AS `KG`
       FROM (((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                 ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `h`
               ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `h`.`ID_Producto`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
              ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                  (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 1))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
             ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                 (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 1)))
       WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)), '/', MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)),
                      '/', '01'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '/', MONTH(CURDATE()), '/', DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()))), 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND
              (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN (999, 'EXP')) AND (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN
                                                         (112, 14, 268, 439, 575, 575, 687, 822, 822, 824, 824, 824,
                                                          999, 999, 999, 999, 999, 'GU')))
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `vta` LEFT JOIN (SELECT `vtaTot`.`UnidadNegocio` AS `UnidadNegocio`,
                                                       `vtaTot`.`CANAL`         AS `CANAL`,
                                                       AVG(`vtaTot`.`KG`)       AS `TotKG`
                                                FROM (SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)              AS `Mes`,
                                                             CASE
                                                                 WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'AMM')
                                                                     THEN if((NOT ISNULL(`h`.`Id`)), 'B2B', 'B2C')
                                                                 ELSE `p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` END  AS `UnidadNegocio`,
                                                             CASE
                                                                 WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ'
                                                                 ELSE `c`.`COD_CANAL` END         AS `CANAL`,
                                                             SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) AS `KG`
                                                      FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                              ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                             ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `h`
                                                            ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `h`.`ID_Producto`))
                                                      WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
                                                              CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)), '/',
                                                                     MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)), '/',
                                                                     '01'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
                                                              CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '/', MONTH(CURDATE()), '/',
                                                                     DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()))),
                                                              'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND
                                                             (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN (999, 'EXP')) AND
                                                             (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN
                                                              (112, 14, 268, 439, 575, 575, 687, 822, 822, 824, 824,
                                                               824, 999, 999, 999, 999, 999, 'GU')))
                                                      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) AS `vtaTot`
                                                GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `total`
      ON ((`vta`.`UnidadNegocio` = `total`.`UnidadNegocio`) AND (`vta`.`CANAL` = `total`.`CANAL`)))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_WGTH_CHN_TRIM as
SELECT `vta`.`CANAL`                                  AS `CANAL`,
       `vta`.`UnidadNegocio`                          AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       (AVG(`vta`.`KG`) / nullif(`total`.`TotKG`, 0)) AS `weight_unidad`
FROM ((SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                        AS `Mes`,
              CASE WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `c`.`COD_CANAL` END AS `CANAL`,
              CASE
                  WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'AMM') THEN if((NOT ISNULL(`h`.`Id`)), 'B2B', 'B2C')
                  WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'IND') THEN 'B2B'
                  ELSE `p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` END                                            AS `UnidadNegocio`,
              SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))                                           AS `KG`
       FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
               ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
              ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `h`
             ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `h`.`ID_Producto`))
       WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)), '/', MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)),
                      '/', '01'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '/', MONTH(CURDATE()), '/', DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()))), 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND
              (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN (999, 'EXP')) AND (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN
                                                         (112, 14, 268, 439, 575, 575, 687, 822, 822, 824, 824, 824,
                                                          999, 999, 999, 999, 999, 'GU')))
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) AS `vta` LEFT JOIN (SELECT `vtaTot`.`CANAL_TOTAL` AS `CANAL_TOTAL`,
                                                    AVG(`vtaTot`.`KG`)     AS `TotKG`
                                             FROM (SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)              AS `Mes`,
                                                          CASE
                                                              WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ'
                                                              ELSE `c`.`COD_CANAL` END         AS `CANAL_TOTAL`,
                                                          SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) AS `KG`
                                                   FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                           ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                          ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `h`
                                                         ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `h`.`ID_Producto`))
                                                   WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
                                                           CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)), '/',
                                                                  MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)), '/',
                                                                  '01'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
                                                           CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '/', MONTH(CURDATE()), '/',
                                                                  DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()))), 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND
                                                          (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN (999, 'EXP')) AND
                                                          (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN
                                                           (112, 14, 268, 439, 575, 575, 687, 822, 822, 824, 824, 824,
                                                            999, 999, 999, 999, 999, 'GU')))
                                                   GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `vtaTot`
                                             GROUP BY 1) AS `total` ON (`vta`.`CANAL` = `total`.`CANAL_TOTAL`))
GROUP BY 1, 2 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_WGTH_CHN_UN_TRIM as
SELECT `vta`.`CANAL`                                  AS `CANAL`,
       `vta`.`UnidadNegocio`                          AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       (AVG(`vta`.`KG`) / nullif(`total`.`TotKG`, 0)) AS `weight_channel`
FROM ((SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                        AS `Mes`,
              CASE WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `c`.`COD_CANAL` END AS `CANAL`,
              CASE
                  WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'AMM') THEN if((NOT ISNULL(`h`.`Id`)), 'B2B', 'B2C')
                  WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'IND') THEN 'B2B'
                  ELSE `p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` END                                            AS `UnidadNegocio`,
              SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))                                           AS `KG`
       FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
               ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
              ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `h`
             ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `h`.`ID_Producto`))
       WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)), '/', MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)),
                      '/', '01'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '/', MONTH(CURDATE()), '/', DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()))), 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND
              (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN (999, 'EXP')) AND (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN
                                                         (112, 14, 268, 439, 575, 575, 687, 822, 822, 824, 824, 824,
                                                          999, 999, 999, 999, 999, 'GU')))
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) AS `vta` LEFT JOIN (SELECT `vtaTot`.`UnidadNegocio` AS `UnidadNegocio`,
                                                    AVG(`vtaTot`.`KG`)       AS `TotKG`
                                             FROM (SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)              AS `Mes`,
                                                          CASE
                                                              WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'AMM')
                                                                  THEN if((NOT ISNULL(`h`.`Id`)), 'B2B', 'B2C')
                                                              WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'IND') THEN 'B2B'
                                                              ELSE `p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` END  AS `UnidadNegocio`,
                                                          SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) AS `KG`
                                                   FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                           ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                          ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `h`
                                                         ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `h`.`ID_Producto`))
                                                   WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
                                                           CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)), '/',
                                                                  MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)), '/',
                                                                  '01'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
                                                           CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '/', MONTH(CURDATE()), '/',
                                                                  DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()))), 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND
                                                          (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN (999, 'EXP')) AND
                                                          (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN
                                                           (112, 14, 268, 439, 575, 575, 687, 822, 822, 824, 824, 824,
                                                            999, 999, 999, 999, 999, 'GU')))
                                                   GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `vtaTot`
                                             GROUP BY 1) AS `total`
      ON (`vta`.`UnidadNegocio` = `total`.`UnidadNegocio`))
GROUP BY 1, 2 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_WGTH_FAM_MARC as
SELECT `vta`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`                       AS `COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`,
       `vta`.`COD_FAMILIA`                            AS `COD_FAMILIA`,
       `vta`.`NOM_FAMILIA`                            AS `NOM_FAMILIA`,
       `vta`.`COD_MARCA`                              AS `COD_MARCA`,
       `vta`.`NOM_MARCA`                              AS `NOM_MARCA`,
       (AVG(`vta`.`KG`) / nullif(`total`.`TotKG`, 0)) AS `weight_marca`
FROM ((SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)              AS `Mes`,
              `p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`               AS `COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`,
              `p`.`COD_FAMILIA`                    AS `COD_FAMILIA`,
              `p`.`NOM_FAMILIA`                    AS `NOM_FAMILIA`,
              `p`.`COD_MARCA`                      AS `COD_MARCA`,
              `p`.`NOM_MARCA`                      AS `NOM_MARCA`,
              SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) AS `KG`
       FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
              ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
             ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
       WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)), '/', MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)),
                      '/', '01'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
               CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '/', MONTH(CURDATE()), '/', DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()))), 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND
              (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN (999, 'EXP')) AND (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN
                                                         (112, 14, 268, 439, 575, 575, 687, 822, 822, 824, 824, 824,
                                                          999, 999, 999, 999, 999, 'GU')))
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6) AS `vta` LEFT JOIN (SELECT `vtaTot`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` AS `COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`,
                                                             AVG(`vtaTot`.`KG`)          AS `TotKG`
                                                      FROM (SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)              AS `Mes`,
                                                                   `p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`               AS `COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`,
                                                                   SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) AS `KG`
                                                            FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                   ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                  ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
                                                            WHERE ((DATE(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN TO_DATE(
                                                                    CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)),
                                                                           '/',
                                                                           MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)),
                                                                           '/', '01'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(
                                                                    CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '/', MONTH(CURDATE()), '/',
                                                                           DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()))),
                                                                    'YYYY/MM/DD')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` IN
                                                                                        ('PAN', 'FAR', 'AUT', 'ECM',
                                                                                         'COB', 'IND', 'HOR', 'MAY',
                                                                                         'DIS', 'NNE')) AND
                                                                   (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` NOT IN ('999')))
                                                            GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `vtaTot`
                                                      GROUP BY 1) AS `total`
      ON (`vta`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = `total`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_WGTH_ID_EXP as
SELECT `prods`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                     AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
       `prods`.`DESC_PROD_1`                                     AS `DESC_PROD_1`,
       (AVG(`prods`.`TotalTON`) / (SELECT SUM(`g`.`Tons`) AS `sum(g.Tons)`
                                   FROM (SELECT `prods`.`ID_PRODUCTO`   AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                                                `prods`.`DESC_PROD_1`   AS `DESC_PROD_1`,
                                                AVG(`prods`.`TotalTON`) AS `Tons`
                                         FROM (SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                       AS `Mes`,
                                                      `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                             AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                                                      `p`.`DESC_PROD_1`                             AS `DESC_PROD_1`,
                                                      (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) AS `TotalTON`
                                               FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                      ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                     ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                                               WHERE ((`p`.`COD_TIPO_FAB` = '001') AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` <> '088') AND
                                                      (YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2024) AND
                                                      (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN 1 AND 6) AND
                                                      (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'EXP'))
                                               GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
                                               HAVING ((SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) > 0)) AS `prods`
                                         GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `g`)) AS `Peso`
FROM (SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                       AS `Mes`,
             `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                             AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
             `p`.`DESC_PROD_1`                             AS `DESC_PROD_1`,
             (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) AS `TotalTON`
      FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
             ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
            ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
      WHERE ((`p`.`COD_TIPO_FAB` = '001') AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` <> '088') AND (YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2024) AND
             (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN 1 AND 6) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'EXP'))
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
      HAVING ((SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) > 0)) AS `prods`
GROUP BY 1, 2 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view CL_WGTH_ID_LCL as
SELECT `prods`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                     AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
       `prods`.`DESC_PROD_1`                                     AS `DESC_PROD_1`,
       (AVG(`prods`.`TotalTON`) / (SELECT SUM(`g`.`Tons`) AS `sum(g.Tons)`
                                   FROM (SELECT `prods`.`ID_PRODUCTO`   AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                                                `prods`.`DESC_PROD_1`   AS `DESC_PROD_1`,
                                                AVG(`prods`.`TotalTON`) AS `Tons`
                                         FROM (SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                       AS `Mes`,
                                                      `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                             AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                                                      `p`.`DESC_PROD_1`                             AS `DESC_PROD_1`,
                                                      (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) AS `TotalTON`
                                               FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                      ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                     ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                                               WHERE ((`p`.`COD_TIPO_FAB` = '001') AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` <> '088') AND
                                                      (YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2024) AND
                                                      (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN 1 AND 6) AND
                                                      (`c`.`COD_CANAL` <> 'EXP'))
                                               GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
                                               HAVING ((SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) > 0)) AS `prods`
                                         GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `g`)) AS `Peso`
FROM (SELECT MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                       AS `Mes`,
             `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                             AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
             `p`.`DESC_PROD_1`                             AS `DESC_PROD_1`,
             (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) AS `TotalTON`
      FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
             ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
            ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
      WHERE ((`p`.`COD_TIPO_FAB` = '001') AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` <> '088') AND (YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2024) AND
             (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN 1 AND 6) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` <> 'EXP'))
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
      HAVING ((SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) > 0)) AS `prods`
GROUP BY 1, 2 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view COM_EFECTIVIDAD_DIA as
SELECT `EF`.`fecha_mes`                                          AS `fecha_mes`,
       `EF`.`fecha`                                              AS `fecha`,
       `EF`.`ruta`                                               AS `ruta`,
       SUM(`EF`.`planificado`)                                   AS `planificado`,
       SUM(`EF`.`visitas_efectivas`)                             AS `visitas_efectivas`,
       (SUM(`EF`.`visitas_efectivas`) / SUM(`EF`.`planificado`)) AS `efectividad`
FROM (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`a`.`fecha`, '%Y-%m-01')                                                  AS `fecha_mes`,
             `a`.`fecha`                                                                           AS `fecha`,
             `a`.`ruta`                                                                            AS `ruta`,
             `a`.`id_cliente`                                                                      AS `id_cliente`,
             `a`.`tipo_visita`                                                                     AS `tipo_visita`,
             `a`.`planificado`                                                                     AS `planificado`,
             `a`.`visitado`                                                                        AS `visitado`,
             `a`.`distancia_metros`                                                                AS `distancia_metros`,
             CASE
                 WHEN ((`a`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`a`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 1
                 ELSE 0 END                                                                        AS `visitas_efectivas`
      FROM `DW_GESTION_VENTAS` as `a`
      WHERE (YEAR(`a`.`fecha`) >= 2025)) AS `EF`
GROUP BY 2, 1, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view COM_EFECTIVIDAD_MES as
SELECT `EF`.`fecha_mes`                                          AS `fecha_mes`,
       `EF`.`ruta`                                               AS `ruta`,
       SUM(`EF`.`planificado`)                                   AS `planificado`,
       SUM(`EF`.`visitas_efectivas`)                             AS `visitas_efectivas`,
       (SUM(`EF`.`visitas_efectivas`) / SUM(`EF`.`planificado`)) AS `efectividad`
FROM (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`a`.`fecha`, '%Y-%m-01')                                                  AS `fecha_mes`,
             `a`.`fecha`                                                                           AS `fecha`,
             `a`.`ruta`                                                                            AS `ruta`,
             `a`.`id_cliente`                                                                      AS `id_cliente`,
             `a`.`tipo_visita`                                                                     AS `tipo_visita`,
             `a`.`planificado`                                                                     AS `planificado`,
             `a`.`visitado`                                                                        AS `visitado`,
             `a`.`distancia_metros`                                                                AS `distancia_metros`,
             CASE
                 WHEN ((`a`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`a`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 1
                 ELSE 0 END                                                                        AS `visitas_efectivas`
      FROM `DW_GESTION_VENTAS` as `a`
      WHERE (YEAR(`a`.`fecha`) >= 2025)) AS `EF`
GROUP BY 1, 2 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view COM_Objetivo_Estrat_Nac as
SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                      `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                      `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                      `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                      `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                      `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                      `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                      `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                      `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                      `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
      FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                            `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                            `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                            `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                            `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                            `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                            `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                            `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                            `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                            `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                            `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
            FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                                  `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                                  `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                  `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                  `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                                  `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                                  `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                                  `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                  `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                  `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                  `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                                        `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                                        `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                        `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                        `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                                        `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                                        `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                                        `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                        `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                        `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                        `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                        FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`                               AS `Anio`,
                                              `SUB`.`Mes`                                AS `Mes`,
                                              `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`                        AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                              `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`                          AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                              `SUB`.`Ruta`                               AS `Ruta`,
                                              (`SUB`.`CajasReales`!:>decimal(45,8) NULL) AS `CajasReales`,
                                              (`SUB`.`Objetivo`!:>double NULL)           AS `Objetivo`,
                                              `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`                       AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                              `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                   AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                              (`SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`!:>double NULL)      AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                              `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento`                   AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                              FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                                                    `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                    `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                                                    `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                    `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                                                          `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                          `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                                                          `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                          `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                          FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                                                                `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                                `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                                                                `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                                `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                FROM (SELECT YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                            AS `Anio`,
                                                             MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                           AS `Mes`,
                                                             `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                             `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                             if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`,
                                                                   LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2))                                                       AS `Ruta`,
                                                             SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`))                                  AS `CajasReales`,
                                                             `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                                 AS `Objetivo`,
                                                             (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)            AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                             `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                             `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                             AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                             if(
                                                                     ((SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                                      1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                                     ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                      (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                      FROM ((((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `v` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                 ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                ON (`v`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
                                                               ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND
                                                                   (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                   (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 10))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
                                                              ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND
                                                                  (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                  (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 10))) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                             ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                            ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                                (if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                    if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2),
                                                                       `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                    LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                                      WHERE ((`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('021', '017')) AND
                                                             (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'B2C') AND
                                                             (YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                             (MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 10) AND
                                                             (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'MAY') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 12000019))
                                                      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10
                                                      UNION ALL
                                                      (SELECT YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                            AS `Anio`,
                                                              MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                           AS `Mes`,
                                                              `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                              `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                              if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                 if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`,
                                                                    LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                 LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2))                                                       AS `Ruta`,
                                                              SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`))                                  AS `CajasReales`,
