                                                              `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                                 AS `Objetivo`,
                                                              (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)            AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                              `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                              `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                             AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                              if(
                                                                      ((SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                                       1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                                      ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                       (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                       FROM ((((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `v` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                  ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                 ON (`v`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
                                                                ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND
                                                                    (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                    (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 10))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
                                                               ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND
                                                                   (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                   (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 10))) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                              ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                             ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                                 (if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                     if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2),
                                                                        `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                     LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                                       WHERE ((`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('222')) AND
                                                              (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'LYA') AND
                                                              (YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                              (MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 10) AND
                                                              (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'MAY') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 12000020))
                                                       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10)) AS `SUB`
                                                UNION ALL
                                                (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                           AS `Anio`,
                                                        MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                          AS `Mes`,
                                                        `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                        `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                        LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                           AS `Ruta`,
                                                        SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))                                  AS `CajasReales`,
                                                        `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                                 AS `Objetivo`,
                                                        (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)            AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                        `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                        `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                             AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                        if(
                                                                ((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                                 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                                ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                 (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                 FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                          ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                         ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                        ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                       ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                           (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                                 WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                        (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 10) AND
                                                        (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'HOR') AND
                                                        (`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('021', '023')) AND
                                                        (`p`.`COD_PRESENTACION` IN ('001', '033', '621')) AND
                                                        (`p`.`COD_ENVASE` = '001') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 12000021))
                                                 GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10)) AS `SUB`
                                          UNION ALL
                                          (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                           AS `Anio`,
                                                  MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                          AS `Mes`,
                                                  `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                  `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                  LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                           AS `Ruta`,
                                                  SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))                                  AS `CajasReales`,
                                                  `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                                 AS `Objetivo`,
                                                  (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)            AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                  `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                  `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                             AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                  if(
                                                          ((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                           1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                          ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                           (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                           FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                    ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                   ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                  ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                 ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                     (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                           WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                  (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 10) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'HOR') AND
                                                  (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` IN
                                                   (33337, 34483, 53072, 44541, 41447, 55762, 33089, 41775, 74030,
                                                    33042, 50509, 53075, 56303, 52824, 33338, 36533, 41774, 44543,
                                                    56302, 41446, 41721, 33148, 41391, 52825, 33118, 48883, 53073,
                                                    36534, 33077, 41720, 55495, 41392, 33120, 35943, 53074, 74029,
                                                    40583, 33071, 33646, 72882, 56299, 56298, 72883)) AND
                                                  (`obj`.`Id` = 12000027))
                                           GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10)) AS `SUB`
                                    UNION ALL
                                    (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                  AS `Anio`,
                                            MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                 AS `Mes`,
                                            `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                        AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                            `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                          AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                            LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                  AS `Ruta`,
                                            SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`))                       AS `CajasReales`,
                                            `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                        AS `Objetivo`,
                                            (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) /
                                             `objr`.`Objetivo`)                                                      AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                            `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                 AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                            `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                            if(((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) /
                                                 `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                               ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) /
                                                 `objr`.`Objetivo`)))                                                AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                     FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                              ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                             ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                            ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                           ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                               (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                     WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 10) AND
                                            (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'HOR') AND (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'PPR') AND
                                            (`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('318', '311')) AND (`obj`.`Id` = 12000022))
                                     GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10)) AS `SUB`
                              UNION ALL
                              (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                         AS `Anio`,
                                      MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                        AS `Mes`,
                                      `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                               AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                      `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                 AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                      LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                         AS `Ruta`,
                                      (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) AS `CajasReales`,
                                      COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                  AS `Objetivo`,
                                      COALESCE(((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `objr`.`Objetivo`),
                                               0)                                     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                      `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                        AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                      COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)              AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                      COALESCE(if(
                                                       (((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                        1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                       ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                        ((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                                               0)                                     AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                               FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                        ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                       ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                      ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                     ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                         (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                               WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 10) AND
                                      (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN') AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` = '046') AND
                                      (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '002') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 12000023))
                               GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9,
                                        `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)) AS `SUB`
                        UNION ALL
                        (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                   AS `Anio`,
                                MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                  AS `Mes`,
                                `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                         AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                           AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                   AS `Ruta`,
                                (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`))!:>decimal(45,8) NULL)             AS `CajasReales`,
                                COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                                            AS `Objetivo`,
                                COALESCE((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`),
                                         0)                                                               AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                  AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                                        AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                COALESCE(if(((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1),
                                            (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100), ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                            (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                                         0)                                                               AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                         FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                  ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                 ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                               ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                         WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 10) AND
                                (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN') AND (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '669') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 12000024))
                         GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9, `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)) AS `SUB`
                  UNION ALL
                  (SELECT 2025                                                                                          AS `Anio`,
                          4                                                                                             AS `Mes`,
                          `a`.`Codigo`                                                                                  AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                          'IND'                                                                                         AS `COD_CANAL`,
                          `unv`.`Ruta`                                                                                  AS `Ruta`,
                          (COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`)!:>decimal(45,8) NULL)                                     AS `CajasReales`,
                          (`objr`.`Objetivo`!:>double NULL)                                                             AS `Objetivo`,
                          (COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)                                      AS `Cumplimiento`,
                          `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                                      AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                          (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`!:>double NULL)                                                         AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                          if(((COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1),
                             (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100), ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                             (COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                   FROM (((((SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Ruta` AS `Ruta`, `SUB`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                             FROM (SELECT LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) AS `Ruta`, `c`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                                   FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                   WHERE ((`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'IND') AND (YEAR(`c`.`FECHA_PRIMERA_COMPRA`) = 2025) AND
                                          (MONTH(`c`.`FECHA_PRIMERA_COMPRA`) = 4))
                                   GROUP BY 1, 2
                                   UNION ALL
                                   (SELECT LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) AS `Ruta`, `c`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                                    FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                    WHERE ((`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'IND') AND (YEAR(`c`.`FECHA_CREACION`) = 2025) AND
                                           (MONTH(`c`.`FECHA_CREACION`) = 7) AND
                                           (`c`.`ID_CLIENTE` IN (SELECT `f`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                                                                 FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `cl`
                                                                       ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `cl`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                                                                 WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                                        (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 4) AND
                                                                        (`cl`.`COD_CANAL` = 'IND')))))
                                    GROUP BY 1, 2)) AS `SUB`) AS `unv` LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                            ON ((`obj`.`Cod_Canal` = 'IND') AND (`obj`.`Mes_Medicion` = 4) AND
                                (`obj`.`Anio_Medicion` = 2025))) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                           ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                               (`unv`.`Ruta` = `objr`.`Ruta`))) LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r`
                          ON (`unv`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Agencias` as `a`
                         ON (`r`.`Agencia_Id` = `a`.`Id`))
                   GROUP BY 5, 3, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9, `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)) AS `SUB`
            UNION ALL
            (SELECT `v3`.`ANIO`                                                                              AS `Anio`,
                    `v3`.`Mes`                                                                               AS `Mes`,
                    `v3`.`AGENCIA`                                                                           AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                    `v3`.`CANAL`                                                                             AS `COD_CANAL`,
                    `v3`.`Ruta`                                                                              AS `Ruta`,
                    (`v3`.`Clientes`!:>decimal(45,8) NULL)                                                   AS `CajasReales`,
                    COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                                                           AS `Objetivo`,
                    COALESCE((`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`), 0)                                       AS `Cumplimiento`,
                    `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                                 AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                    COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                                                       AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                    COALESCE(if(((`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) * (`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                             0)                                                                              AS `PesoCumplimiento`
             FROM (((SELECT `vta`.`ANIO`                       AS `ANIO`,
                            `vta`.`MES`                        AS `Mes`,
                            `vta`.`AGENCIA`                    AS `AGENCIA`,
                            `vta`.`CANAL`                      AS `CANAL`,
                            `vta`.`Ruta`                       AS `Ruta`,
                            COUNT(DISTINCT `vta`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AS `Clientes`
                     FROM (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)  AS `ANIO`,
                                  MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) AS `MES`,
                                  `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`        AS `AGENCIA`,
                                  `c`.`COD_CANAL`          AS `CANAL`,
                                  LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)  AS `Ruta`,
                                  `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`         AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                           FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                  ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                 ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
                           WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 10) AND
                                  (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'LYA') AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` = '085') AND
                                  (`p`.`COD_PRESENTACION` = '088') AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'COB'))
                           GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
                           HAVING (SUM(`vp`.`CANT_ENTREGADA`) >= 4)) AS `vta`
                     GROUP BY 1, 2, 5) AS `v3` LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                    ON (`v3`.`CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                   ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND (`v3`.`Ruta` = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
             WHERE (`obj`.`Id` = 12000025)
             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, `v3`.`Clientes`, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11)) AS `SUB`
      UNION ALL
      (SELECT `v3`.`ANIO`                                                                              AS `Anio`,
              `v3`.`Mes`                                                                               AS `Mes`,
              `v3`.`AGENCIA`                                                                           AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
              `v3`.`CANAL`                                                                             AS `COD_CANAL`,
              `v3`.`Ruta`                                                                              AS `Ruta`,
              (`v3`.`Clientes`!:>decimal(45,8) NULL)                                                   AS `CajasReales`,
              COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                                                           AS `Objetivo`,
              COALESCE((`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`), 0)                                       AS `Cumplimiento`,
              `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                                 AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
              COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                                                       AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
              COALESCE(if(((`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                          ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) * (`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                       0)                                                                              AS `PesoCumplimiento`
       FROM (((SELECT `vta`.`ANIO`                       AS `ANIO`,
                      `vta`.`MES`                        AS `Mes`,
                      `vta`.`AGENCIA`                    AS `AGENCIA`,
                      `vta`.`CANAL`                      AS `CANAL`,
                      `vta`.`Ruta`                       AS `Ruta`,
                      COUNT(DISTINCT `vta`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AS `Clientes`
               FROM (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)  AS `ANIO`,
                            MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) AS `MES`,
                            `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`        AS `AGENCIA`,
                            `c`.`COD_CANAL`          AS `CANAL`,
                            LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)  AS `Ruta`,
                            `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`         AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                     FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                            ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                           ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
                     WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 10) AND
                            (`p`.`COD_MARCA` = '318') AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'COB'))
                     GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
                     HAVING (SUM(`vp`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) > 3)) AS `vta`
               GROUP BY 1, 2, 5) AS `v3` LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
              ON (`v3`.`CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
             ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND (`v3`.`Ruta` = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
       WHERE (`obj`.`Id` = 12000026)
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, `v3`.`Clientes`, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11)) AS `SUB`

                                                                      `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                                                                      `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                                      `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                                      `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                                      `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                      FROM (SELECT YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                            AS `Anio`,
                                                                   MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                           AS `Mes`,
                                                                   `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                                   `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                                   if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                      if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2),
                                                                         `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                      LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2))                                                       AS `Ruta`,
                                                                   SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`))                                  AS `CajasReales`,
                                                                   `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                                 AS `Objetivo`,
                                                                   (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)            AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                                   `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                                   `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                             AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                                   if(
                                                                           ((SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                                            1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                                           ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                            (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                            FROM ((((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `v` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                       ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                      ON (`v`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
                                                                     ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND
                                                                         (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                         (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 7))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
                                                                    ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND
                                                                        (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                        (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 7))) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                                   ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                                  ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                                      (if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                          if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2),
                                                                             `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`,
                                                                             LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                          LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                                            WHERE ((`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('085', '084')) AND
                                                                   (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` IN ('008')) AND
                                                                   (YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                                   (MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) AND
                                                                   (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'MAY') AND
                                                                   (`obj`.`Id` = 11000000))
                                                            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10
                                                            UNION ALL
                                                            (SELECT YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                            AS `Anio`,
                                                                    MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                           AS `Mes`,
                                                                    `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                                    `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                                    if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                       if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2),
                                                                          `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                       LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2))                                                       AS `Ruta`,
                                                                    SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`))                                  AS `CajasReales`,
                                                                    `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                                 AS `Objetivo`,
                                                                    (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)            AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                                    `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                                    `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                             AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                                    if(
                                                                            ((SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                                             1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                                            ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                             (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                             FROM ((((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `v` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                        ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                       ON (`v`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
                                                                      ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND
                                                                          (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                          (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 7))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
                                                                     ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND
                                                                         (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                         (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 7))) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                                    ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                                   ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                                       (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                                             WHERE ((`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('017')) AND
                                                                    (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '039') AND
                                                                    (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'OLN') AND
                                                                    (YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                                    (MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) AND
                                                                    (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'MAY') AND
                                                                    (`obj`.`Id` = 11000001))
                                                             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10)) AS `SUB`
                                                      UNION ALL
                                                      (SELECT YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                            AS `Anio`,
                                                              MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                           AS `Mes`,
                                                              `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                              `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                              if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                 if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`,
                                                                    LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                 LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2))                                                       AS `Ruta`,
                                                              SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`))                                  AS `CajasReales`,
                                                              `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                                 AS `Objetivo`,
                                                              (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)            AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                              `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                              `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                             AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                              if(
                                                                      ((SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                                       1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                                      ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                       (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                       FROM ((((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `v` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                  ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                 ON (`v`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
                                                                ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND
                                                                    (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                    (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 7))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
                                                               ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND
                                                                   (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                   (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 7))) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                              ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                             ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                                 (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                                       WHERE ((`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('017')) AND
                                                              (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '118') AND
                                                              (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'OLN') AND
                                                              (YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                              (MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) AND
                                                              (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'MAY') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 11000002))
                                                       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10)) AS `SUB`
                                                UNION ALL
                                                (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                           AS `Anio`,
                                                        MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                          AS `Mes`,
                                                        `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                        `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                        LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                           AS `Ruta`,
                                                        SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))                                  AS `CajasReales`,
                                                        `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                                 AS `Objetivo`,
                                                        (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)            AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                        `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                        `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                             AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                        if(
                                                                ((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                                 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                                ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                 (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                 FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                          ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                         ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                        ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                       ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                           (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                                 WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                        (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'HOR') AND
                                                        (`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('021', '023')) AND
                                                        (`p`.`COD_PRESENTACION` IN ('001', '033', '621')) AND
                                                        (`obj`.`Id` = 11000003))
                                                 GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10)) AS `SUB`
                                          UNION ALL
                                          (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                            AS `Anio`,
                                                  MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                           AS `Mes`,
                                                  `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                  AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                  `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                    AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                  LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                            AS `Ruta`,
                                                  SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) AS `CajasReales`,
                                                  `objr`.`Objetivo`                                  AS `Objetivo`,
                                                  (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) /
                                                   `objr`.`Objetivo`)                                AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                  `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                           AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                  `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                              AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                  if(((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) /
                                                       `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                     ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                      (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) /
                                                       `objr`.`Objetivo`)))                          AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                           FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                    ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                   ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                  ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                 ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                     (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                           WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                  (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'HOR') AND
                                                  (`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('311')) AND (`obj`.`Id` = 11000004))
                                           GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10)) AS `SUB`
                                    UNION ALL
                                    (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                           AS `Anio`,
                                            MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                          AS `Mes`,
                                            `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                            `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                            LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                           AS `Ruta`,
                                            (SUM(`vp`.`CANT_ENTREGADA`)!:>decimal(45,4) NULL) AS `CajasReales`,
                                            COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                    AS `Objetivo`,
                                            COALESCE(
                                                    ((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `objr`.`Objetivo`),
                                                    0)                                        AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                            `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                            COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                            COALESCE(if(
                                                             (((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                              1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                             ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                              ((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                                                     0)                                       AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                     FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                              ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                             ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                            ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                           ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                               (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                     WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) AND
                                            (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN') AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` = '046') AND
                                            (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '002') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 11000005))
                                     GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9,
                                              `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)) AS `SUB`
                              UNION ALL
                              (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                       AS `Anio`,
                                      MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                      AS `Mes`,
                                      `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                             AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                      `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                               AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                      LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                       AS `Ruta`,
                                      (SUM(`vp`.`CANT_ENTREGADA`)!:>decimal(45,4) NULL)             AS `CajasReales`,
                                      COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                                AS `Objetivo`,
                                      COALESCE((SUM(`vp`.`CANT_ENTREGADA`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`), 0) AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                      `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                      AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                      COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                            AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                      COALESCE(if(((SUM(`vp`.`CANT_ENTREGADA`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1),
                                                  (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100), ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                                  (SUM(`vp`.`CANT_ENTREGADA`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                                               0)                                                   AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                               FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                        ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                       ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                      ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                     ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                         (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                               WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) AND
                                      (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN') AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` = '046') AND
                                      (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '112') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 11000006))
                               GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9,
                                        `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)) AS `SUB`
                        UNION ALL
                        (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                             AS `Anio`,
                                MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                            AS `Mes`,
                                `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                   AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                     AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                             AS `Ruta`,
                                SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))                                    AS `CajasReales`,
                                COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                                                      AS `Objetivo`,
                                COALESCE((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`),
                                         0)                                                                         AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                            AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                                                  AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                COALESCE(
                                        if(((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1),
                                           (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100), ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                           (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                                        0)                                                                          AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                         FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                  ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                 ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                               ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                         WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) AND
                                (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN') AND (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '003') AND
                                (`p`.`COD_MARCA` = '061') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 11000007))
                         GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9, `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)) AS `SUB`
                  UNION ALL
                  (SELECT 2025                                                                                          AS `Anio`,
                          4                                                                                             AS `Mes`,
                          `a`.`Codigo`                                                                                  AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                          'IND'                                                                                         AS `COD_CANAL`,
                          `unv`.`Ruta`                                                                                  AS `Ruta`,
                          (COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`)!:>decimal(45,4) NULL)                                     AS `CajasReales`,
                          (`objr`.`Objetivo`!:>double NULL)                                                             AS `Objetivo`,
                          (COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)                                      AS `Cumplimiento`,
                          `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                                      AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                          (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`!:>double NULL)                                                         AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                          if(((COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1),
                             (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100), ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                             (COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                   FROM (((((SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Ruta` AS `Ruta`, `SUB`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                             FROM (SELECT LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) AS `Ruta`, `c`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                                   FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                   WHERE ((`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'IND') AND (YEAR(`c`.`FECHA_PRIMERA_COMPRA`) = 2025) AND
                                          (MONTH(`c`.`FECHA_PRIMERA_COMPRA`) = 4))
                                   GROUP BY 1, 2
                                   UNION ALL
                                   (SELECT LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) AS `Ruta`, `c`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                                    FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                    WHERE ((`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'IND') AND (YEAR(`c`.`FECHA_CREACION`) = 2025) AND
                                           (MONTH(`c`.`FECHA_CREACION`) = 7) AND
                                           (`c`.`ID_CLIENTE` IN (SELECT `f`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                                                                 FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `cl`
                                                                       ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `cl`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                                                                 WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                                        (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 4) AND
                                                                        (`cl`.`COD_CANAL` = 'IND')))))
                                    GROUP BY 1, 2)) AS `SUB`) AS `unv` LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                            ON ((`obj`.`Cod_Canal` = 'IND') AND (`obj`.`Mes_Medicion` = 4) AND
                                (`obj`.`Anio_Medicion` = 2025))) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                           ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                               (`unv`.`Ruta` = `objr`.`Ruta`))) LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r`
                          ON (`unv`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Agencias` as `a`
                         ON (`r`.`Agencia_Id` = `a`.`Id`))
                   GROUP BY 5, 3, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9, `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)) AS `SUB`
            UNION ALL
            (SELECT `v3`.`ANIO`                                                                              AS `Anio`,
                    `v3`.`Mes`                                                                               AS `Mes`,
                    `v3`.`AGENCIA`                                                                           AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                    `v3`.`CANAL`                                                                             AS `COD_CANAL`,
                    `v3`.`Ruta`                                                                              AS `Ruta`,
                    (`v3`.`Clientes`!:>decimal(45,4) NULL)                                                   AS `CajasReales`,
                    COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                                                           AS `Objetivo`,
                    COALESCE((`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`), 0)                                       AS `Cumplimiento`,
                    `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                                 AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                    COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                                                       AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                    COALESCE(if(((`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) * (`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                             0)                                                                              AS `PesoCumplimiento`
             FROM (((SELECT `vta`.`ANIO`                       AS `ANIO`,
                            `vta`.`MES`                        AS `Mes`,
                            `vta`.`AGENCIA`                    AS `AGENCIA`,
                            `vta`.`CANAL`                      AS `CANAL`,
                            `vta`.`Ruta`                       AS `Ruta`,
                            COUNT(DISTINCT `vta`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AS `Clientes`
                     FROM (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)  AS `ANIO`,
                                  MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) AS `MES`,
                                  `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`        AS `AGENCIA`,
                                  `c`.`COD_CANAL`          AS `CANAL`,
                                  LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)  AS `Ruta`,
                                  `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`         AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                           FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                  ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                 ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
                           WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) AND
                                  (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'LYA') AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` = '222') AND
                                  (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` IN ('057', '009', '084')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'COB'))
                           GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
                           HAVING (SUM(`vp`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) > 3)) AS `vta`
                     GROUP BY 1, 2, 5) AS `v3` LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                    ON (`v3`.`CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                   ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND (`v3`.`Ruta` = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
             WHERE (`obj`.`Id` = 11000009)
             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, `v3`.`Clientes`, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11)) AS `SUB`
      UNION ALL
      (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                              AS `Anio`,
              MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                             AS `Mes`,
              `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                    AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
              `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                      AS `COD_CANAL`,
              LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                              AS `Ruta`,
              (COUNT(DISTINCT `vp`.`ID_CLIENTE`)!:>decimal(45,4) NULL)             AS `CajasReales`,
              COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                                       AS `Objetivo`,
              COALESCE((COUNT(DISTINCT `vp`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`), 0) AS `Cumplimiento`,
              `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                             AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
              COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                                   AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
              COALESCE(if(((COUNT(DISTINCT `vp`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                          ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) * (COUNT(DISTINCT `vp`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                       0)                                                          AS `PesoCumplimiento`
       FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
               ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
              ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
             ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
       WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 7) AND
              (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` IN (73436, 74512, 74513, 73437, 73434, 74519, 73435, 74511)) AND
              (`obj`.`Id` = 11000008) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'COB'))
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9, `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`
       HAVING (SUM(`vp`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) >= 1))) AS `SUB`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Comisiones as
SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Anio`                AS `Anio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Mes`                 AS `Mes`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Familia_Horecas`     AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       'HOR'                                        AS `Cod_Canal`,
       SUM(`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Valor_Comision`) AS `Comision`
FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
UNION ALL
SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR_SUP`.`Anio`                AS `Anio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR_SUP`.`Mes`                 AS `Mes`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR_SUP`.`Familia_Horecas`     AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       'HOR'                                            AS `Cod_Canal`,
       SUM(`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR_SUP`.`Valor_Comision`) AS `Comision`
FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR_SUP` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR_SUP`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
UNION ALL
SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Anio`                       AS `Anio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Mes`                        AS `Mes`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'AMM') THEN 'B2C'
           ELSE `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`UnidadNegocio` END AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       'COB'                                               AS `Cod_Canal`,
       SUM(`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Valor_Comision`)        AS `Comision`
FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
UNION ALL
SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT_SUP`.`Anio`                       AS `Anio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT_SUP`.`Mes`                        AS `Mes`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT_SUP`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'AMM') THEN 'B2C'
           ELSE `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT_SUP`.`UnidadNegocio` END AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       'COB'                                                   AS `Cod_Canal`,
       SUM(`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT_SUP`.`Valor_Comision`)        AS `Comision`
FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT_SUP` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT_SUP`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
UNION ALL
SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Anio`                AS `Anio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Mes`                 AS `Mes`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`UnidadNegocio`       AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       'MAY'                                        AS `Cod_Canal`,
       SUM(`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Valor_Comision`) AS `Comision`
FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
UNION ALL
SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY_SUP`.`Anio`                AS `Anio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY_SUP`.`Mes`                 AS `Mes`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY_SUP`.`UnidadNegocio`       AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       'MAY'                                            AS `Cod_Canal`,
       SUM(`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY_SUP`.`Valor_Comision`) AS `Comision`
FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY_SUP` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY_SUP`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
UNION ALL
SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_PAN`.`Anio`                AS `Anio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_PAN`.`Mes`                 AS `Mes`,
       'B2B'                                        AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       'PAN'                                        AS `Cod_Canal`,
       SUM(`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_PAN`.`Valor_Comision`) AS `Comision`
FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_PAN` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_PAN`
GROUP BY 1, 2
UNION ALL
SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_PAN_SUP`.`Anio`                AS `Anio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_PAN_SUP`.`Mes`                 AS `Mes`,
       'B2B'                                            AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       'PAN'                                            AS `Cod_Canal`,
       SUM(`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_PAN_SUP`.`Valor_Comision`) AS `Comision`
FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_PAN_SUP` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_PAN_SUP`
GROUP BY 1, 2
UNION ALL
(SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Anio`                AS `Anio`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Mes`                 AS `Mes`,
        'B2B'                                        AS `UnidadNegocio`,
        'IND'                                        AS `Cod_Canal`,
        SUM(`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Valor_Comision`) AS `Comision`
 FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`
 GROUP BY 1, 2)
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Costos_Producto as
SELECT `p`.`Anio`                                                                                                                                 AS `Anio`,
       `p`.`Mes`                                                                                                                                  AS `Mes`,
       `p`.`Id_Producto`                                                                                                                          AS `Id_Producto`,
       `p`.`Nombre_Producto`                                                                                                                      AS `Nombre_Producto`,
       `p`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                                                                                                       AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       `pp`.`marca`                                                                                                                               AS `marca`,
       `pp`.`nombre_familia`                                                                                                                      AS `Familia`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Tons`, 0)                                                                                                                    AS `Tons`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Unidades`, 0)                                                                                                                AS `Unidades`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Facturacion`, 0)                                                                                                             AS `Facturacion`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Margen`, 0)                                                                                                                  AS `Margen`,
       COALESCE((`p`.`Margen` / `p`.`Tons`), 0)                                                                                                   AS `Margen_Ton`,
       COALESCE((`p`.`Margen` / `p`.`Unidades`), 0)                                                                                               AS `Margen_Unitario`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Costo_de_Venta`, 0)                                                                                                          AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
       COALESCE((`p`.`Costo_de_Venta` / `p`.`Tons`), 0)                                                                                           AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
       COALESCE((`p`.`Costo_de_Venta` / `p`.`Unidades`), 0)                                                                                       AS `Costo_de_Venta_Unitario`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Costo_Empaques`, 0)                                                                                                          AS `Costo_Empaques`,
       COALESCE((`p`.`Costo_Empaques` / `p`.`Tons`), 0)                                                                                           AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
       COALESCE((`p`.`Costo_Empaques` / `p`.`Unidades`), 0)                                                                                       AS `Costo_Empaques_Unitario`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Costo_Grasas`, 0)                                                                                                            AS `Costo_Grasas`,
       COALESCE((`p`.`Costo_Grasas` / `p`.`Tons`), 0)                                                                                             AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
       COALESCE((`p`.`Costo_Grasas` / `p`.`Unidades`), 0)                                                                                         AS `Costo_Grasas_Unitario`,
