                                                                           SUM(`m`.`CPGRASASTON`)  AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                           SUM(`m`.`CPINSUMOSTON`) AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                           SUM(`m`.`CPOTROSTON`)   AS `Costo_Otros`
                                                                    FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_COSTO_MARGEN` as `m` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                          ON (`m`.`CODITEM` = `p`.`id_producto`))
                                                                    WHERE ((YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`) = 2025) AND (`m`.`CANAL` = 'EXP'))
                                                                    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `c`
                      ON ((`v`.`Anio` = `c`.`Anio`) AND (`v`.`Mes` = `c`.`Mes`) AND
                          (`v`.`Id_Producto` = `c`.`Id_Producto`)))) AS `ventas_exp`)) AS `p` LEFT JOIN (SELECT `Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Anio`         AS `anio`,
                                                                                                                `Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Mes`          AS `mes`,
                                                                                                                SUM(`Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Importe`) AS `Importe_MP`
                                                                                                         FROM `Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio` as `Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`
                                                                                                         WHERE ((`Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Categoria_28` =
                                                                                                                 'COSTO DE PRODUCCION           ') AND
                                                                                                                (`Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Anio` = 2025) AND
                                                                                                                (`Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Categoria_29` = 'CIF') AND
                                                                                                                (`Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Categoria_30` IN
                                                                                                                 ('MANTENIMIENTO                 ',
                                                                                                                  'DETERIORO - OBSOLESCENCIA     ',
                                                                                                                  'DEPRECIACION                  ',
                                                                                                                  'FLETES                        ',
                                                                                                                  'OTROS                         ')))
                                                                                                         GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `mp`
        ON ((`p`.`Anio` = `mp`.`anio`) AND (`p`.`Mes` = `mp`.`mes`))) LEFT JOIN (SELECT `proffits_losses`.`Anio` AS `Anio`,
                                                                                        `proffits_losses`.`Mes`  AS `Mes`,
                                                                                        SUM(CASE
                                                                                                WHEN (`proffits_losses`.`Costo_Grasas` > 0)
                                                                                                    THEN `proffits_losses`.`Tons`
                                                                                                ELSE 0 END)      AS `Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`
                                                                                 FROM (SELECT `ventas_local`.`Anio`                      AS `Anio`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Mes`                       AS `Mes`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Id_Canal`                  AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Id_Producto`               AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Nombre_Producto`           AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Unidad_Negocio`            AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Unidades`                  AS `Unidades`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Tons`                      AS `Tons`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Kilos`                     AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Facturacion`               AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Margen`                    AS `Margen`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta`            AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`        AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Kilos_Conta`               AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Conta`      AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta` AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Margen_Estimado_Conta`     AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Empaques_Ton`        AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Grasas_Ton`          AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Insumos_Ton`         AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Otros_Ton`           AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Empaques`            AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Grasas`              AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Insumos`             AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Otros`               AS `Costo_Otros`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Ajuste_Otros`              AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Tipo_Venta`                AS `Tipo_Venta`
                                                                                       FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`                                                   AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Mes`                                                    AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Id_Canal`                                               AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Id_Producto`                                            AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Nombre_Producto`                                        AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                         AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Unidades`                                               AS `Unidades`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Tons`                                                   AS `Tons`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Facturacion`                                            AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Margen`                                                 AS `Margen`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Costo_de_Venta`                                         AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`                                     AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                                                                                                    `c`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                                                                                                    `c`.`Costo`                                                  AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                                                                                                    `c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo`                                       AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                                                                                                    (`v`.`Facturacion` - (`c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo` * `v`.`Kilos`)) AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Empaques`, 0)                            AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Grasas`, 0)                              AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Insumos`, 0)                             AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Otros`, 0)                               AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Empaques` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)             AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Grasas` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)               AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Insumos` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)              AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)                AS `Costo_Otros`,
                                                                                                    CASE
                                                                                                        WHEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) > 0)
                                                                                                            THEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) * .36)
                                                                                                        ELSE 0 END                                               AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                                                                                                    'Local'                                                      AS `Tipo_Venta`
                                                                                             FROM ((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                             AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                           MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                            AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                           `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                    AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                                           `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                  AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                           `p`.`nombre_producto`                              AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                                           `p`.`segmento`                                     AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                           SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))      AS `Tons`,
                                                                                                           SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))               AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                           SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                       AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                                           SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                  AS `Margen`,
                                                                                                           (SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                                           ((SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) /
                                                                                                            SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)))    AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                                                                                                           SUM((`f`.`CANT_VENDIDA` + `f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`))   AS `Unidades`
                                                                                                    FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                                                           ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                                                          ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                                                                                                    WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                                                                           (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                                                                                                           (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL')) AND
                                                                                                           (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101') AND
                                                                                                           (`p`.`segmento` NOT IN ('EXP')))
                                                                                                    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 6, 4, 5) AS `v` LEFT JOIN (SELECT YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`)       AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                                                                        MONTH(`m`.`FECHA`)      AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                                                                        `p`.`segmento`          AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                                                                        `m`.`CODITEM`           AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`KILOS`)        AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`COSTO`)        AS `Costo`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`COSTOXKILO`)   AS `Costo_Venta_Kilo`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`CPEMPAQUETON`) AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`CPGRASASTON`)  AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`CPINSUMOSTON`) AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`CPOTROSTON`)   AS `Costo_Otros`
                                                                                                                                                 FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_COSTO_MARGEN` as `m` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                                                                                                       ON (`m`.`CODITEM` = `p`.`id_producto`))
                                                                                                                                                 WHERE ((YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`) = 2025) AND (`m`.`CANAL` = 'LOC'))
                                                                                                                                                 GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `c`
                                                                                                   ON ((`v`.`Anio` = `c`.`Anio`) AND
                                                                                                       (`v`.`Mes` = `c`.`Mes`) AND
                                                                                                       (`v`.`Id_Producto` = `c`.`Id_Producto`)))) AS `ventas_local`
                                                                                       UNION ALL
                                                                                       (SELECT `ventas_exp`.`Anio`                      AS `Anio`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Mes`                       AS `Mes`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Id_Canal`                  AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Id_Producto`               AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Nombre_Producto`           AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Unidad_Negocio`            AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Unidades`                  AS `Unidades`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Tons`                      AS `Tons`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Kilos`                     AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Facturacion`               AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Margen`                    AS `Margen`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta`            AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`        AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Kilos_Conta`               AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Conta`      AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta` AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Margen_Estimado_Conta`     AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Empaques_Ton`        AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Grasas_Ton`          AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Insumos_Ton`         AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Otros_Ton`           AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Empaques`            AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Grasas`              AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Insumos`             AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Otros`               AS `Costo_Otros`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Ajuste_Otros`              AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Tipo_Venta`                AS `Tipo_Venta`
                                                                                        FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`                                                   AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Mes`                                                    AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Id_Canal`                                               AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Id_Producto`                                            AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Nombre_Producto`                                        AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                         AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Unidades`                                               AS `Unidades`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Tons`                                                   AS `Tons`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Facturacion`                                            AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Margen`                                                 AS `Margen`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Costo_de_Venta`                                         AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`                                     AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                                                                                                     `c`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                                                                                                     `c`.`Costo`                                                  AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                                                                                                     `c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo`                                       AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                                                                                                     (`v`.`Facturacion` - (`c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo` * `v`.`Kilos`)) AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Empaques`, 0)                            AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Grasas`, 0)                              AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Insumos`, 0)                             AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Otros`, 0)                               AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Empaques` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)             AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Grasas` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)               AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Insumos` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)              AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)                AS `Costo_Otros`,
                                                                                                     CASE
                                                                                                         WHEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) > 0)
                                                                                                             THEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) * .36)
                                                                                                         ELSE 0 END                                               AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                                                                                                     'Exportacion'                                                AS `Tipo_Venta`
                                                                                              FROM ((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                             AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                            MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                            AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                            `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                    AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                                            `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                  AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                            `p`.`nombre_producto`                              AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                                            `p`.`segmento`                                     AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                            SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))      AS `Tons`,
                                                                                                            SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))               AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                            SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                       AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                                            SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                  AS `Margen`,
                                                                                                            (SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                                            ((SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) /
                                                                                                             SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)))    AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                                                                                                            SUM((`f`.`CANT_VENDIDA` + `f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`))   AS `Unidades`
                                                                                                     FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                                                            ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                                                           ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                                                                                                     WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                                                                            (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                                                                                                            (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL')) AND
                                                                                                            (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101') AND
                                                                                                            (`p`.`segmento` IN ('EXP')))
                                                                                                     GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 6, 4, 5) AS `v` LEFT JOIN (SELECT YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`)       AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                                                                         MONTH(`m`.`FECHA`)      AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                                                                         `p`.`segmento`          AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                                                                         `m`.`CODITEM`           AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`KILOS`)        AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`COSTO`)        AS `Costo`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`COSTOXKILO`)   AS `Costo_Venta_Kilo`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`CPEMPAQUETON`) AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`CPGRASASTON`)  AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`CPINSUMOSTON`) AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`CPOTROSTON`)   AS `Costo_Otros`
                                                                                                                                                  FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_COSTO_MARGEN` as `m` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                                                                                                        ON (`m`.`CODITEM` = `p`.`id_producto`))
                                                                                                                                                  WHERE ((YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`) = 2025) AND (`m`.`CANAL` = 'EXP'))
                                                                                                                                                  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `c`
                                                                                                    ON ((`v`.`Anio` = `c`.`Anio`) AND
                                                                                                        (`v`.`Mes` = `c`.`Mes`) AND
                                                                                                        (`v`.`Id_Producto` = `c`.`Id_Producto`)))) AS `ventas_exp`)) AS `proffits_losses`
                                                                                 GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `t`
       ON ((`p`.`Anio` = `t`.`Anio`) AND (`p`.`Mes` = `t`.`Mes`))) LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `pp`
      ON (`pp`.`id_producto` = `p`.`Id_Producto`))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Dolares_Promedio_Cliente_Familia as
SELECT `promedio_por_familia`.`Anio`                     AS `Anio`,
       `promedio_por_familia`.`Mes`                      AS `Mes`,
       `promedio_por_familia`.`Ruta`                     AS `Ruta`,
       `promedio_por_familia`.`segmento`                 AS `segmento`,
       `promedio_por_familia`.`nombre_familia`           AS `nombre_familia`,
       `promedio_por_familia`.`Promedio_Dolares_Cliente` AS `Promedio_Dolares_Cliente`
FROM (SELECT `ventas_cliente_familia`.`Anio`           AS `Anio`,
             `ventas_cliente_familia`.`Mes`            AS `Mes`,
             `ventas_cliente_familia`.`Ruta`           AS `Ruta`,
             `ventas_cliente_familia`.`segmento`       AS `segmento`,
             `ventas_cliente_familia`.`nombre_familia` AS `nombre_familia`,
             AVG(`ventas_cliente_familia`.`Dolares`)   AS `Promedio_Dolares_Cliente`
      FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`           AS `Anio`,
                   `v`.`Mes`            AS `Mes`,
                   `v`.`Ruta`           AS `Ruta`,
                   `p`.`segmento`       AS `segmento`,
                   `p`.`nombre_familia` AS `nombre_familia`,
                   `v`.`ID_CLIENTE`     AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
                   SUM(`v`.`USD`)       AS `Dolares`
            FROM (`com_ventas` as `v` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p` ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`))
            WHERE ((`v`.`Anio` >= 2024) AND (`v`.`Mes` = 7))
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6) AS `ventas_cliente_familia`
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5) AS `promedio_por_familia`
ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Efectividad_Dia as
SELECT `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`fecha`                AS `fecha`,
       `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`canal`                AS `canal`,
       `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`agencia`              AS `agencia`,
       `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`ruta`                 AS `ruta`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`planificado`)     AS `planificado`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`visitado`)        AS `visitado`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`visita_efectiva`) AS `visita_efectiva`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`vendido`)         AS `ventas`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`venta_efectiva`)  AS `venta_planificada`,
       (SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`visita_efectiva`) /
        SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`planificado`))   AS `efectividad_visita`,
       (SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`venta_efectiva`) /
        SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`planificado`))   AS `efectividad_venta`
FROM `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad` as `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Efectividad_Mes as
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`fecha`, '%Y-%m-01') AS `mes`,
       `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`canal`                          AS `canal`,
       `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`agencia`                        AS `agencia`,
       `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`ruta`                           AS `ruta`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`planificado`)               AS `planificado`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`visitado`)                  AS `visitado`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`visita_efectiva`)           AS `visita_efectiva`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`vendido`)                   AS `ventas`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`venta_efectiva`)            AS `venta_planificada`,
       (SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`visita_efectiva`) /
        SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`planificado`))             AS `efectividad_visita`,
       (SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`venta_efectiva`) /
        SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`planificado`))             AS `efectividad_venta`,
       MAX(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`fecha`)                     AS `Etl_Timestamp`
FROM `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad` as `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`
WHERE (YEAR(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`fecha`) >= 2025)
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Efectividad_Mes_Actual as
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`fecha`, '%Y-%m-01') AS `mes`,
       `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`canal`                          AS `canal`,
       `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`agencia`                        AS `agencia`,
       `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`ruta`                           AS `ruta`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`planificado`)               AS `planificado`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`visitado`)                  AS `visitado`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`visita_efectiva`)           AS `visita_efectiva`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`vendido`)                   AS `ventas`,
       SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`venta_efectiva`)            AS `venta_planificada`,
       (SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`visita_efectiva`) /
        SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`planificado`))             AS `efectividad_visita`,
       (SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`venta_efectiva`) /
        SUM(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`planificado`))             AS `efectividad_venta`
FROM `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual` as `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`
WHERE (DATE_FORMAT(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual`.`fecha`, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Efectividad_Rutas as
SELECT DATE(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`FECHA_INFO`)                                  AS `fecha`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`TIPO_CLIENTE`                                      AS `canal`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`AGENCIA`                                           AS `agencia`,
       LEFT(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`RUTA`, 2)                                     AS `ruta`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`RUTA`                                              AS `id_ruta`,
       RIGHT(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`RUTA`, 1)                                    AS `id_dia`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`ID`                                                AS `id_cliente`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`STATUS`                                            AS `id_status`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD`                                           AS `latitud`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LONGITUD`                                          AS `longitud`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD_VISITA`                                    AS `latitud_visita`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LONGITUD_VISITA`                                   AS `longitud_visita`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`PLANEADO`                                          AS `planificado`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`VISITADO`                                          AS `visitado`,
       (111139 * acos((((cos(radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD`)) * cos(radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD_VISITA`))) *
                        cos((radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LONGITUD_VISITA`) - radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LONGITUD`)))) +
                       (sin(radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD`)) *
                        sin(radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD_VISITA`)))))) AS `distancia_metros`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`HORA`                                              AS `hora`
FROM `DW_Visitas_GPS` as `DW_Visitas_GPS`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Efectividad_Ventas as
SELECT IFNULL(`a`.`FECHAORDENTRDJ`, `a`.`DATE_CONTA`)                              AS `fecha_orden`,
       `a`.`DATE_CONTA`                                                            AS `fecha_factura`,
       `d`.`COD_CANAL`                                                             AS `canal`,
       `d`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                           AS `agencia`,
       LEFT(`d`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                     AS `ruta`,
       `d`.`COD_RUTA`                                                              AS `id_ruta`,
       `a`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                            AS `id_cliente`,
       `d`.`COD_STATUS`                                                            AS `id_status`,
       `d`.`COD_DIA_VISITA`                                                        AS `id_dia`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0))                                     AS `dolares`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) / 1000)    AS `toneladas`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_VENDIDA`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0))) AS `unidades`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`MARGEN`, 0))                                                AS `Margen`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `b`
        ON (`a`.`ID_FECHA` = `b`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
       ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `d`
      ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
WHERE ((`a`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
       (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`b`.`anio` >= '2024') AND (`d`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'EXP')))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 5, 7, 6, 9 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Efectividad_Ventas_Actual as
SELECT IFNULL(`a`.`FECHAORDENTRDJ`, `a`.`DATE_CONTA`)                              AS `fecha_orden`,
       `a`.`DATE_CONTA`                                                            AS `fecha_factura`,
       `d`.`COD_CANAL`                                                             AS `canal`,
       `d`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                           AS `agencia`,
       LEFT(`d`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                     AS `ruta`,
       `d`.`COD_RUTA`                                                              AS `id_ruta`,
       `a`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                            AS `id_cliente`,
       `d`.`COD_STATUS`                                                            AS `id_status`,
       `d`.`COD_DIA_VISITA`                                                        AS `id_dia`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0))                                     AS `dolares`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) / 1000)    AS `toneladas`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_VENDIDA`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0))) AS `unidades`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`MARGEN`, 0))                                                AS `Margen`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `b`
        ON (`a`.`ID_FECHA` = `b`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
       ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `d`
      ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
WHERE ((`a`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
       (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`b`.`anio` = YEAR(CURDATE())) AND (`d`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'EXP')))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 5, 7, 6, 9 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Familias_Efectivas_Mayoristas as
SELECT `base`.`Anio`           AS `Anio`,
       `base`.`Mes`            AS `Mes`,
       `base`.`Ruta`           AS `Ruta`,
       `base`.`segmento`       AS `segmento`,
       `base`.`nombre_familia` AS `nombre_familia`,
       `base`.`ID_CLIENTE`     AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
       `base`.`Cajas_Est`      AS `Cajas_Est`,
       `base`.`Dolares`        AS `Dolares`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`base`.`segmento` IN ('B2B', 'B2C', 'LYA')) AND (COALESCE(`base`.`Cajas_Est`, 0) >= 1)) THEN 1
           WHEN ((`base`.`segmento` = 'OLN') AND (COALESCE(`base`.`Dolares`, 0) > 35)) THEN 1
           WHEN ((`base`.`segmento` = 'PPR') AND (COALESCE(`base`.`Dolares`, 0) > 245)) THEN 1
           ELSE 0 END          AS `Familia_Efectiva`
FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`               AS `Anio`,
             `v`.`Mes`                AS `Mes`,
             `v`.`Ruta`               AS `Ruta`,
             `p`.`segmento`           AS `segmento`,
             `p`.`nombre_familia`     AS `nombre_familia`,
             `v`.`ID_CLIENTE`         AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
             (SUM(`v`.`TON`) * 83.33) AS `Cajas_Est`,
             SUM(`v`.`USD`)           AS `Dolares`
      FROM (`com_ventas` as `v` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p` ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`))
      WHERE ((`v`.`Anio` >= 2024) AND (`v`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('MAY')))
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6) AS `base`
ORDER BY 6 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Familias_Mayoristas as
SELECT `base_ventas`.`Anio`                                                               AS `Anio`,
       `base_ventas`.`Mes`                                                                AS `Mes`,
       `base_ventas`.`Tipo_Ruta`                                                          AS `Tipo_Ruta`,
       `base_ventas`.`Ruta`                                                               AS `Ruta`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT `base_ventas`.`ID_CLIENTE`)                                         AS `Clientes_Activos`,
       SUM(`base_ventas`.`Tiene_Venta`)                                                   AS `Familias_con_Venta`,
       (SUM(`base_ventas`.`Tiene_Venta`) /
        COUNT(DISTINCT `base_ventas`.`ID_CLIENTE`))                                       AS `Promedio_Familias_ConVenta_x_Cliente`,
       SUM(`base_ventas`.`Venta_Efectiva`)                                                AS `Familias_Efectivas`,
       (SUM(`base_ventas`.`Venta_Efectiva`) /
        COUNT(DISTINCT `base_ventas`.`ID_CLIENTE`))                                       AS `Promedio_Familias_x_Cliente`
FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`                                                                                     AS `Anio`,
             `v`.`Mes`                                                                                      AS `Mes`,
             CASE
                 WHEN (LENGTH(`v`.`Ruta`) = 2) THEN 'Base'
                 WHEN (LENGTH(`v`.`Ruta`) > 2)
                     THEN 'Espejo' END                                                                      AS `Tipo_Ruta`,
             `v`.`Ruta`                                                                                     AS `Ruta`,
             `p`.`segmento`                                                                                 AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
             `p`.`nombre_familia`                                                                           AS `Familia`,
             `v`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                                               AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
             (SUM(`v`.`TON`) * 83.33)                                                                       AS `Cajas_Est`,
             SUM(`v`.`USD`)                                                                                 AS `Dolares`,
             CASE
                 WHEN ((SUM(`v`.`USD`) > 0) OR (SUM(`v`.`TON`) > 0)) THEN 1
                 ELSE 0 END                                                                                 AS `Tiene_Venta`,
             CASE
                 WHEN (LENGTH(`v`.`Ruta`) = 2) THEN CASE
                                                        WHEN ((`p`.`segmento` IN ('B2B', 'B2C')) AND
                                                              ((SUM(`v`.`TON`) * 83.33) >= 1)) THEN 1
                                                        WHEN ((`p`.`segmento` = 'LYA') AND ((SUM(`v`.`TON`) * 83.33) >= .5))
                                                            THEN 1
                                                        WHEN ((`p`.`segmento` = 'OLN') AND (SUM(`v`.`USD`) > 15)) THEN 1
                                                        WHEN ((`p`.`segmento` = 'PPR') AND (SUM(`v`.`USD`) > 10)) THEN 1
                                                        ELSE 0 END
                 ELSE CASE
                          WHEN ((`p`.`segmento` IN ('B2B', 'B2C')) AND ((SUM(`v`.`TON`) * 83.33) >= 1)) THEN 1
                          WHEN ((`p`.`segmento` = 'LYA') AND ((SUM(`v`.`TON`) * 83.33) >= .5)) THEN 1
                          WHEN ((`p`.`segmento` = 'OLN') AND (SUM(`v`.`USD`) > 25)) THEN 1
                          WHEN ((`p`.`segmento` = 'PPR') AND (SUM(`v`.`USD`) > 35)) THEN 1
                          ELSE 0 END END                                                                    AS `Venta_Efectiva`
      FROM ((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                           AS `Anio`,
                    MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                          AS `Mes`,
                    `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                  AS `COD_CANAL`,
                    `a`.`Nombre`                                     AS `Agencia`,
                    CASE
                        WHEN (`c`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('DIS', 'AUT')) THEN `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`
                        ELSE if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) END         AS `Ruta`,
                    `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                 AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
                    `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`                                AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
                    `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                    `f`.`SERVICIO`                                   AS `SERVICIO`,
                    SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))    AS `TON`,
                    SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                     AS `USD`,
                    SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                AS `Margen`,
                    SUM((`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) AS `CJ_Real`,
                    SUM((`f`.`CANT_VENDIDA` + `f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`)) AS `Unidades`,
                    `f`.`ETL_TSTAMP`                                 AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
             FROM ((((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                        ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                       ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
                      ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                          (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY))))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
                     ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                         (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY))))) LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r`
                    ON (if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                           if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                           LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) = `r`.`Codigo`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Agencias` as `a`
                   ON (`r`.`Agencia_Id` = `a`.`Id`))
             WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024, 2025, 2026)) AND (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                    (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))
             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 15) AS `v` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
            ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`))
      WHERE ((`v`.`Anio` = 2025) AND (`v`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('MAY')) AND (`v`.`Ruta` NOT IN ('AY', 'CM', 'WY', 'LS')))
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7) AS `base_ventas`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes as
SELECT `r`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                                          AS `Cod_Canal`,
       `r`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                                                         AS `Id_Cliente`,
       `c`.`COD_RUTA`                                                                                           AS `Cod_Ruta`,
       LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                                                  AS `Ruta`,
       `c`.`COD_STATUS`                                                                                         AS `Cod_Status`,
       `c`.`NOM_STATUS`                                                                                         AS `Nom_Status`,
       `r`.`venta_ton`                                                                                          AS `Ton_Venta_12m`,
       `r`.`rn`                                                                                                 AS `Rank_por_canal`,
       `r`.`cum_ton`                                                                                            AS `Ton_Cumulado`,
       `r`.`total_canal_ton`                                                                                    AS `Ton_Total_Canal`,
       ROUND((`r`.`cum_ton` / nullif(`r`.`total_canal_ton`, 0)), 4)                                             AS `Pct_Cum_Ton`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`r`.`cum_ton` / nullif(`r`.`total_canal_ton`, 0)) <= .80) THEN 'Pareto'
           ELSE 'No Pareto' END                                                                                 AS `Clasificacion_Pareto`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`r`.`cum_ton` / nullif(`r`.`total_canal_ton`, 0)) < .50) THEN 'AAA'
           WHEN (((`r`.`cum_ton` / nullif(`r`.`total_canal_ton`, 0)) >= .50) AND
                 ((`r`.`cum_ton` / nullif(`r`.`total_canal_ton`, 0)) < .80)) THEN 'A'
           WHEN (((`r`.`cum_ton` / nullif(`r`.`total_canal_ton`, 0)) >= .80) AND
                 ((`r`.`cum_ton` / nullif(`r`.`total_canal_ton`, 0)) < .95)) THEN 'B'
           WHEN (((`r`.`cum_ton` / nullif(`r`.`total_canal_ton`, 0)) >= .95) AND
                 ((`r`.`cum_ton` / nullif(`r`.`total_canal_ton`, 0)) < .99)) THEN 'C'
           ELSE 'D' END                                                                                         AS `Clasificacion_Ton`
FROM ((SELECT `ventas_12m`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                                                                 AS `COD_CANAL`,
              `ventas_12m`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                                                                                AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
              `ventas_12m`.`venta_ton`                                                                                                                 AS `venta_ton`,
              ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY `ventas_12m`.`COD_CANAL` ORDER BY `ventas_12m`.`venta_ton` DESC)                                         AS `rn`,
              SUM(`ventas_12m`.`venta_ton`)
                  OVER (PARTITION BY `ventas_12m`.`COD_CANAL` ORDER BY `ventas_12m`.`venta_ton` DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `cum_ton`,
              SUM(`ventas_12m`.`venta_ton`)
                  OVER (PARTITION BY `ventas_12m`.`COD_CANAL`)                                                                                         AS `total_canal_ton`
       FROM (SELECT `v`.`COD_CANAL` AS `COD_CANAL`, `v`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`, SUM(`v`.`TON`) AS `venta_ton`
             FROM (`com_ventas` as `v` JOIN (SELECT ((YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)) * 100) +
                                                     MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH))) AS `start_yyyymm`,
                                                    ((YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) * 100) +
                                                     MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)))  AS `end_yyyymm`) AS `p`
                   ON (1 = 1))
             WHERE (((`v`.`Anio` * 100) + `v`.`Mes`) BETWEEN `p`.`start_yyyymm` AND `p`.`end_yyyymm`)
             GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `ventas_12m`) AS `r` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
      ON (`r`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
ORDER BY 1, 8 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio as
SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
                `SUB`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
                `SUB`.`Categoria_28` AS `Categoria_28`,
                `SUB`.`Categoria_27` AS `Categoria_27`,
                `SUB`.`Categoria_29` AS `Categoria_29`,
                `SUB`.`Categoria_30` AS `Categoria_30`,
                `SUB`.`Cuenta`       AS `Cuenta`,
                `SUB`.`Importe`      AS `Importe`
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
                      `SUB`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
                      `SUB`.`Categoria_28` AS `Categoria_28`,
                      `SUB`.`Categoria_27` AS `Categoria_27`,
                      `SUB`.`Categoria_29` AS `Categoria_29`,
                      `SUB`.`Categoria_30` AS `Categoria_30`,
                      `SUB`.`Cuenta`       AS `Cuenta`,
                      `SUB`.`Importe`      AS `Importe`
      FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
                            `SUB`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
                            `SUB`.`Categoria_28` AS `Categoria_28`,
                            `SUB`.`Categoria_27` AS `Categoria_27`,
                            `SUB`.`Categoria_29` AS `Categoria_29`,
                            `SUB`.`Categoria_30` AS `Categoria_30`,
                            `SUB`.`Cuenta`       AS `Cuenta`,
                            `SUB`.`Importe`      AS `Importe`
            FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
                                  `SUB`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
                                  `SUB`.`Categoria_28` AS `Categoria_28`,
                                  `SUB`.`Categoria_27` AS `Categoria_27`,
                                  `SUB`.`Categoria_29` AS `Categoria_29`,
                                  `SUB`.`Categoria_30` AS `Categoria_30`,
                                  `SUB`.`Cuenta`       AS `Cuenta`,
                                  `SUB`.`Importe`      AS `Importe`
                  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
                                        `SUB`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
                                        `SUB`.`Categoria_28` AS `Categoria_28`,
                                        `SUB`.`Categoria_27` AS `Categoria_27`,
                                        `SUB`.`Categoria_29` AS `Categoria_29`,
                                        `SUB`.`Categoria_30` AS `Categoria_30`,
                                        `SUB`.`Cuenta`       AS `Cuenta`,
                                        `SUB`.`Importe`      AS `Importe`
                        FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
                                              `SUB`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
                                              `SUB`.`Categoria_28` AS `Categoria_28`,
                                              `SUB`.`Categoria_27` AS `Categoria_27`,
                                              `SUB`.`Categoria_29` AS `Categoria_29`,
                                              `SUB`.`Categoria_30` AS `Categoria_30`,
                                              `SUB`.`Cuenta`       AS `Cuenta`,
                                              `SUB`.`Importe`      AS `Importe`
                              FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Categoria_28` AS `Categoria_28`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Categoria_27` AS `Categoria_27`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Categoria_29` AS `Categoria_29`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Categoria_30` AS `Categoria_30`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Cuenta`       AS `Cuenta`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Importe`      AS `Importe`
                                    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Categoria_28` AS `Categoria_28`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Categoria_27` AS `Categoria_27`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Categoria_29` AS `Categoria_29`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Categoria_30` AS `Categoria_30`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Cuenta`       AS `Cuenta`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Importe`      AS `Importe`
                                          FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Categoria_28` AS `Categoria_28`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Categoria_27` AS `Categoria_27`,

                                                                                `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
                                                                                `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
                                                                                SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ENE_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
                                                                         FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
                                                                         WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
                                                                                (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
                                                                                (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
                                                                         GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
                                                                  UNION ALL
                                                                  (SELECT '2025'                                    AS `Anio`,
                                                                          '2'                                       AS `Mes`,
                                                                          `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `Categoria_28`,
                                                                          `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `Categoria_27`,
                                                                          `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `Categoria_29`,
                                                                          `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
                                                                          `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
                                                                          SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`FEB_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
                                                                   FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
                                                                   WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
                                                                          (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
                                                                          (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
                                                                   GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
                                                            UNION ALL
                                                            (SELECT '2025'                                    AS `Anio`,
                                                                    '3'                                       AS `Mes`,
                                                                    `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `Categoria_28`,
                                                                    `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `Categoria_27`,
                                                                    `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `Categoria_29`,
                                                                    `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
                                                                    `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
                                                                    SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`MAR_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
                                                             FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
                                                             WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
                                                                    (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
                                                                    (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
                                                             GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
                                                      UNION ALL
                                                      (SELECT '2025'                                    AS `Anio`,
                                                              '4'                                       AS `Mes`,
                                                              `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `Categoria_28`,
                                                              `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `Categoria_27`,
                                                              `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `Categoria_29`,
                                                              `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
                                                              `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
                                                              SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ABR_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
                                                       FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
                                                       WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
                                                              (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
                                                              (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
                                                       GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
                                                UNION ALL
                                                (SELECT '2025'                                    AS `Anio`,
                                                        '5'                                       AS `Mes`,
                                                        `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `Categoria_28`,
                                                        `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `Categoria_27`,
                                                        `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `Categoria_29`,
                                                        `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
                                                        `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
                                                        SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`MAY_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
                                                 FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
                                                 WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
                                                        (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
                                                        (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
                                                 GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
                                          UNION ALL
                                          (SELECT '2025'                                    AS `Anio`,
                                                  '6'                                       AS `Mes`,
                                                  `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `Categoria_28`,
                                                  `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `Categoria_27`,
                                                  `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `Categoria_29`,
                                                  `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
                                                  `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
                                                  SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`JUN_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
                                           FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
                                           WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
                                                  (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
                                                  (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
                                           GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
                                    UNION ALL
                                    (SELECT '2025'                                    AS `Anio`,
                                            '7'                                       AS `Mes`,
                                            `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `Categoria_28`,
                                            `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `Categoria_27`,
                                            `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `Categoria_29`,
                                            `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
                                            `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
                                            SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`JUL_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
                                     FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
                                     WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
                                            (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
                                            (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
                                     GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
                              UNION ALL
                              (SELECT '2025'                                    AS `Anio`,
                                      '8'                                       AS `Mes`,
                                      `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `Categoria_28`,
                                      `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `Categoria_27`,
                                      `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `Categoria_29`,
                                      `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
                                      `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
                                      SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`AGO_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
                               FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
                               WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
                                      (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
                                      (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
                               GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
                        UNION ALL
                        (SELECT '2025'                                    AS `Anio`,
                                '9'                                       AS `Mes`,
                                `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `Categoria_28`,
                                `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `Categoria_27`,
                                `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `Categoria_29`,
