                                `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
                                `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
                                SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`SEP_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
                         FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
                         WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
                                (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
                                (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
                         GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
                  UNION ALL
                  (SELECT '2025'                                    AS `Anio`,
                          '10'                                      AS `Mes`,
                          `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `Categoria_28`,
                          `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `Categoria_27`,
                          `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `Categoria_29`,
                          `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
                          `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
                          SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`OCT_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
                   FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
                   WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
                          (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
                          (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
                   GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
            UNION ALL
            (SELECT '2025'                                    AS `Anio`,
                    '11'                                      AS `Mes`,
                    `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `Categoria_28`,
                    `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `Categoria_27`,
                    `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `Categoria_29`,
                    `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
                    `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
                    SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOV_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
             FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
             WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
                    (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
                    (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
             GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
      UNION ALL
      (SELECT '2025'                                    AS `Anio`,
              '12'                                      AS `Mes`,
              `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `Categoria_28`,
              `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `Categoria_27`,
              `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `Categoria_29`,
              `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `Categoria_30`,
              `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `Cuenta`,
              SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`DIC_ACT`)  AS `Importe`
       FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
       WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` = 25) AND
              (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27` = 'RESULTADO DEL EJERCICIO       ') AND
              (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` = 'INDUSTRIAL DANEC'))
       GROUP BY 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) AS `SUB`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad as
SELECT `base`.`fecha`                                                                              AS `fecha`,
       `base`.`canal`                                                                              AS `canal`,
       `base`.`agencia`                                                                            AS `agencia`,
       `base`.`ruta`                                                                               AS `ruta`,
       `base`.`id_ruta`                                                                            AS `id_ruta`,
       `base`.`id_dia`                                                                             AS `id_dia`,
       `base`.`id_cliente`                                                                         AS `id_cliente`,
       `base`.`id_status`                                                                          AS `id_status`,
       `base`.`latitud`                                                                            AS `latitud`,
       `base`.`longitud`                                                                           AS `longitud`,
       `base`.`latitud_visita`                                                                     AS `latitud_visita`,
       `base`.`longitud_visita`                                                                    AS `longitud_visita`,
       `base`.`planificado`                                                                        AS `planificado`,
       `base`.`visitado`                                                                           AS `visitado`,
       `base`.`distancia_metros`                                                                   AS `distancia_metros`,
       `base`.`hora`                                                                               AS `hora`,
       `base`.`vendido`                                                                            AS `vendido`,
       `base`.`tipo_visita`                                                                        AS `tipo_visita`,
       `base`.`dolares`                                                                            AS `dolares`,
       `base`.`toneladas`                                                                          AS `toneladas`,
       CASE
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 6) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 6, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 4) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 4, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 3) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 4, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           ELSE NULL END                                                                           AS `hora_formateada`,
       CASE WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`base`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS `visita_efectiva`,
       CASE WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END         AS `venta_efectiva`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`base`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 'En Rango'
           WHEN (`base`.`visitado` = 0) THEN 'No Visitado'
           WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND ((`base`.`distancia_metros` > 50) OR ISNULL(`base`.`distancia_metros`)))
               THEN 'Fuera de Rango'
           ELSE 'Sin Información' END                                                              AS `MarcacionGPS`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND (`base`.`dolares` < 0)) THEN 'Devolución'
           WHEN (`base`.`vendido` = 0) THEN 'Sin Venta'
           WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 'Venta en Ruta'
           WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND ((`base`.`planificado` <> 1) OR ISNULL(`base`.`planificado`)))
               THEN 'Venta Fuera de Ruta'
           ELSE 'Sin Información' END                                                              AS `GestionVenta`,
       CASE
           WHEN (CASE
                     WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND (`base`.`dolares` < 0)) THEN 'Devolución'
                     WHEN (`base`.`vendido` = 0) THEN 'Sin Venta'
                     WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 'Venta en Ruta'
                     WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND ((`base`.`planificado` <> 1) OR ISNULL(`base`.`planificado`)))
                         THEN 'Venta Fuera de Ruta'
                     ELSE 'Sin Información' END = 'Devolución') THEN 0
           ELSE 1 END                                                                              AS `ClientesGestionados`
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`fecha`            AS `fecha`,
                      `SUB`.`canal`            AS `canal`,
                      `SUB`.`agencia`          AS `agencia`,
                      `SUB`.`ruta`             AS `ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`id_ruta`          AS `id_ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`id_dia`           AS `id_dia`,
                      `SUB`.`id_cliente`       AS `id_cliente`,
                      `SUB`.`id_status`        AS `id_status`,
                      `SUB`.`latitud`          AS `latitud`,
                      `SUB`.`longitud`         AS `longitud`,
                      `SUB`.`latitud_visita`   AS `latitud_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`longitud_visita`  AS `longitud_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`planificado`      AS `planificado`,
                      `SUB`.`visitado`         AS `visitado`,
                      `SUB`.`distancia_metros` AS `distancia_metros`,
                      `SUB`.`hora`             AS `hora`,
                      `SUB`.`vendido`          AS `vendido`,
                      `SUB`.`tipo_visita`      AS `tipo_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`dolares`          AS `dolares`,
                      `SUB`.`toneladas`        AS `toneladas`
      FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `r`.`fecha`                                                                                                  AS `fecha`,
                            `r`.`canal`                                                                                                  AS `canal`,
                            `r`.`agencia`                                                                                                AS `agencia`,
                            `r`.`ruta`                                                                                                   AS `ruta`,
                            `r`.`id_ruta`                                                                                                AS `id_ruta`,
                            `r`.`id_dia`                                                                                                 AS `id_dia`,
                            `r`.`id_cliente`                                                                                             AS `id_cliente`,
                            `r`.`id_status`                                                                                              AS `id_status`,
                            (`r`.`latitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                AS `latitud`,
                            (`r`.`longitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `longitud`,
                            (`r`.`latitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                         AS `latitud_visita`,
                            (`r`.`longitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                        AS `longitud_visita`,
                            (`r`.`planificado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                            AS `planificado`,
                            (`r`.`visitado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `visitado`,
                            (`r`.`distancia_metros`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                       AS `distancia_metros`,
                            (`r`.`hora`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                   AS `hora`,
                            (if((NOT ISNULL(`v`.`id_cliente`)), 1, 0)!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NOT NULL) AS `vendido`,
                            'Planificado'                                                                                                AS `tipo_visita`,
                            `v`.`dolares`                                                                                                AS `dolares`,
                            `v`.`toneladas`                                                                                              AS `toneladas`
            FROM (`Comercial_Efectividad_Rutas` as `r` LEFT JOIN `Comercial_Efectividad_Ventas` as `v`
                  ON ((`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha_orden`) AND (`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`)))
            UNION ALL
            (SELECT DATE(`v`.`fecha_orden`) AS `fecha`,
                    `v`.`canal`             AS `canal`,
                    `v`.`agencia`           AS `agencia`,
                    `v`.`ruta`              AS `ruta`,
                    `v`.`id_ruta`           AS `id_ruta`,
                    `v`.`id_dia`            AS `id_dia`,
                    `v`.`id_cliente`        AS `id_cliente`,
                    `v`.`id_status`         AS `id_status`,
                    ''                      AS `latitud`,
                    ''                      AS `longitud`,
                    ''                      AS `latitud_visita`,
                    ''                      AS `longitud_visita`,
                    ''                      AS `planificado`,
                    ''                      AS `visitado`,
                    ''                      AS `distancia_metros`,
                    ''                      AS `hora`,
                    '1'                     AS `vendido`,
                    'Fuera de Ruta'         AS `tipo_visita`,
                    `v`.`dolares`           AS `dolares`,
                    `v`.`toneladas`         AS `toneladas`
             FROM `Comercial_Efectividad_Ventas` as `v`
             WHERE (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 AS `1`
                               FROM `Comercial_Efectividad_Rutas` as `r`
                               WHERE ((`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`) AND (`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha_orden`))
                               LIMIT 1)))) AS `SUB`) AS `base`
WHERE ((NOT (`base`.`id_cliente` IN (SELECT `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`.`Cliente_Id` AS `Cliente_Id`
                                     FROM `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita` as `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`
                                     WHERE (NOT ISNULL(`Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`.`Cliente_Id`))))) AND
       (RIGHT(`base`.`id_ruta`, 1) NOT IN ('6', '7', '8', '9', '0')))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad2 as
SELECT `base`.`fecha`                                                                              AS `fecha`,
       `base`.`canal`                                                                              AS `canal`,
       `base`.`agencia`                                                                            AS `agencia`,
       `base`.`ruta`                                                                               AS `ruta`,
       `base`.`id_ruta`                                                                            AS `id_ruta`,
       `base`.`id_dia`                                                                             AS `id_dia`,
       `base`.`id_cliente`                                                                         AS `id_cliente`,
       `base`.`id_status`                                                                          AS `id_status`,
       `base`.`latitud`                                                                            AS `latitud`,
       `base`.`longitud`                                                                           AS `longitud`,
       `base`.`latitud_visita`                                                                     AS `latitud_visita`,
       `base`.`longitud_visita`                                                                    AS `longitud_visita`,
       `base`.`planificado`                                                                        AS `planificado`,
       `base`.`visitado`                                                                           AS `visitado`,
       `base`.`distancia_metros`                                                                   AS `distancia_metros`,
       `base`.`hora`                                                                               AS `hora`,
       `base`.`vendido`                                                                            AS `vendido`,
       `base`.`tipo_visita`                                                                        AS `tipo_visita`,
       `base`.`dolares`                                                                            AS `dolares`,
       `base`.`toneladas`                                                                          AS `toneladas`,
       CASE
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 6) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 6, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 4) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 4, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 3) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 4, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           ELSE NULL END                                                                           AS `hora_formateada`,
       CASE WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`base`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS `visita_efectiva`,
       CASE WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END         AS `venta_efectiva`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`base`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 'En Rango'
           WHEN (`base`.`visitado` = 0) THEN 'No Visitado'
           WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND ((`base`.`distancia_metros` > 50) OR ISNULL(`base`.`distancia_metros`)))
               THEN 'Fuera de Rango'
           ELSE 'Sin Información' END                                                              AS `MarcacionGPS`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND (`base`.`dolares` < 0)) THEN 'Devolución'
           WHEN (`base`.`vendido` = 0) THEN 'Sin Venta'
           WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 'Venta en Ruta'
           WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND ((`base`.`planificado` <> 1) OR ISNULL(`base`.`planificado`)))
               THEN 'Venta Fuera de Ruta'
           ELSE 'Sin Información' END                                                              AS `GestionVenta`,
       CASE CASE
                WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND (`base`.`dolares` < 0)) THEN 'Devolución'
                WHEN (`base`.`vendido` = 0) THEN 'Sin Venta'
                WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 'Venta en Ruta'
                WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND ((`base`.`planificado` <> 1) OR ISNULL(`base`.`planificado`)))
                    THEN 'Venta Fuera de Ruta'
                ELSE 'Sin Información' END
           WHEN 'Devolución' THEN 0
           ELSE 1 END                                                                              AS `ClientesGestisonados`
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`fecha`            AS `fecha`,
                      `SUB`.`canal`            AS `canal`,
                      `SUB`.`agencia`          AS `agencia`,
                      `SUB`.`ruta`             AS `ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`id_ruta`          AS `id_ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`id_dia`           AS `id_dia`,
                      `SUB`.`id_cliente`       AS `id_cliente`,
                      `SUB`.`id_status`        AS `id_status`,
                      `SUB`.`latitud`          AS `latitud`,
                      `SUB`.`longitud`         AS `longitud`,
                      `SUB`.`latitud_visita`   AS `latitud_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`longitud_visita`  AS `longitud_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`planificado`      AS `planificado`,
                      `SUB`.`visitado`         AS `visitado`,
                      `SUB`.`distancia_metros` AS `distancia_metros`,
                      `SUB`.`hora`             AS `hora`,
                      `SUB`.`vendido`          AS `vendido`,
                      `SUB`.`tipo_visita`      AS `tipo_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`dolares`          AS `dolares`,
                      `SUB`.`toneladas`        AS `toneladas`
      FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `r`.`fecha`                                                                                                  AS `fecha`,
                            `r`.`canal`                                                                                                  AS `canal`,
                            `r`.`agencia`                                                                                                AS `agencia`,
                            `r`.`ruta`                                                                                                   AS `ruta`,
                            `r`.`id_ruta`                                                                                                AS `id_ruta`,
                            `r`.`id_dia`                                                                                                 AS `id_dia`,
                            `r`.`id_cliente`                                                                                             AS `id_cliente`,
                            `r`.`id_status`                                                                                              AS `id_status`,
                            (`r`.`latitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                AS `latitud`,
                            (`r`.`longitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `longitud`,
                            (`r`.`latitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                         AS `latitud_visita`,
                            (`r`.`longitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                        AS `longitud_visita`,
                            (`r`.`planificado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                            AS `planificado`,
                            (`r`.`visitado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `visitado`,
                            (`r`.`distancia_metros`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                       AS `distancia_metros`,
                            (`r`.`hora`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                   AS `hora`,
                            (if((NOT ISNULL(`v`.`id_cliente`)), 1, 0)!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NOT NULL) AS `vendido`,
                            'Planificado'                                                                                                AS `tipo_visita`,
                            `v`.`dolares`                                                                                                AS `dolares`,
                            `v`.`toneladas`                                                                                              AS `toneladas`
            FROM (`Comercial_Efectividad_Rutas` as `r` LEFT JOIN `Comercial_Efectividad_Ventas` as `v`
                  ON ((`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha_orden`) AND (`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`)))
            UNION ALL
            (SELECT DATE(`v`.`fecha_orden`) AS `fecha`,
                    `v`.`canal`             AS `canal`,
                    `v`.`agencia`           AS `agencia`,
                    `v`.`ruta`              AS `ruta`,
                    `v`.`id_ruta`           AS `id_ruta`,
                    `v`.`id_dia`            AS `id_dia`,
                    `v`.`id_cliente`        AS `id_cliente`,
                    `v`.`id_status`         AS `id_status`,
                    ''                      AS `latitud`,
                    ''                      AS `longitud`,
                    ''                      AS `latitud_visita`,
                    ''                      AS `longitud_visita`,
                    ''                      AS `planificado`,
                    ''                      AS `visitado`,
                    ''                      AS `distancia_metros`,
                    ''                      AS `hora`,
                    '1'                     AS `vendido`,
                    'Fuera de Ruta'         AS `tipo_visita`,
                    `v`.`dolares`           AS `dolares`,
                    `v`.`toneladas`         AS `toneladas`
             FROM `Comercial_Efectividad_Ventas` as `v`
             WHERE (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 AS `1`
                               FROM `Comercial_Efectividad_Rutas` as `r`
                               WHERE ((`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`) AND (`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha_orden`))
                               LIMIT 1)))) AS `SUB`) AS `base`
WHERE (NOT (`base`.`id_cliente` IN (SELECT `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`.`Cliente_Id` AS `Cliente_Id`
                                    FROM `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita` as `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`
                                    WHERE (NOT ISNULL(`Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`.`Cliente_Id`)))))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad3 as
SELECT `base`.`fecha`                                                                              AS `fecha`,
       `base`.`canal`                                                                              AS `canal`,
       `base`.`agencia`                                                                            AS `agencia`,
       `base`.`ruta`                                                                               AS `ruta`,
       `base`.`id_ruta`                                                                            AS `id_ruta`,
       `base`.`id_dia`                                                                             AS `id_dia`,
       `base`.`id_cliente`                                                                         AS `id_cliente`,
       `base`.`id_status`                                                                          AS `id_status`,
       `base`.`latitud`                                                                            AS `latitud`,
       `base`.`longitud`                                                                           AS `longitud`,
       `base`.`latitud_visita`                                                                     AS `latitud_visita`,
       `base`.`longitud_visita`                                                                    AS `longitud_visita`,
       `base`.`planificado`                                                                        AS `planificado`,
       `base`.`visitado`                                                                           AS `visitado`,
       `base`.`distancia_metros`                                                                   AS `distancia_metros`,
       `base`.`hora`                                                                               AS `hora`,
       `base`.`vendido`                                                                            AS `vendido`,
       `base`.`tipo_visita`                                                                        AS `tipo_visita`,
       `base`.`dolares`                                                                            AS `dolares`,
       `base`.`toneladas`                                                                          AS `toneladas`,
       CASE
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 6) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 6, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 4) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 4, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 3) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 4, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           ELSE NULL END                                                                           AS `hora_formateada`,
       CASE WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`base`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS `visita_efectiva`,
       CASE WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END         AS `venta_efectiva`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`base`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 'En Rango'
           WHEN (`base`.`visitado` = 0) THEN 'No Visitado'
           WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND ((`base`.`distancia_metros` > 50) OR ISNULL(`base`.`distancia_metros`)))
               THEN 'Fuera de Rango'
           ELSE 'Sin Información' END                                                              AS `MarcacionGPS`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND (`base`.`dolares` < 0)) THEN 'Devolución'
           WHEN (`base`.`vendido` = 0) THEN 'Sin Venta'
           WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 'Venta en Ruta'
           WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND ((`base`.`planificado` <> 1) OR ISNULL(`base`.`planificado`)))
               THEN 'Venta Fuera de Ruta'
           ELSE 'Sin Información' END                                                              AS `GestionVenta`,
       CASE
           WHEN (CASE
                     WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND (`base`.`dolares` < 0)) THEN 'Devolución'
                     WHEN (`base`.`vendido` = 0) THEN 'Sin Venta'
                     WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 'Venta en Ruta'
                     WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND ((`base`.`planificado` <> 1) OR ISNULL(`base`.`planificado`)))
                         THEN 'Venta Fuera de Ruta'
                     ELSE 'Sin Información' END = 'Devolución') THEN 0
           ELSE 1 END                                                                              AS `ClientesGestionados`
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`fecha`            AS `fecha`,
                      `SUB`.`canal`            AS `canal`,
                      `SUB`.`agencia`          AS `agencia`,
                      `SUB`.`ruta`             AS `ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`id_ruta`          AS `id_ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`id_dia`           AS `id_dia`,
                      `SUB`.`id_cliente`       AS `id_cliente`,
                      `SUB`.`id_status`        AS `id_status`,
                      `SUB`.`latitud`          AS `latitud`,
                      `SUB`.`longitud`         AS `longitud`,
                      `SUB`.`latitud_visita`   AS `latitud_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`longitud_visita`  AS `longitud_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`planificado`      AS `planificado`,
                      `SUB`.`visitado`         AS `visitado`,
                      `SUB`.`distancia_metros` AS `distancia_metros`,
                      `SUB`.`hora`             AS `hora`,
                      `SUB`.`vendido`          AS `vendido`,
                      `SUB`.`tipo_visita`      AS `tipo_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`dolares`          AS `dolares`,
                      `SUB`.`toneladas`        AS `toneladas`
      FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `r`.`fecha`                                                                                                  AS `fecha`,
                            `r`.`canal`                                                                                                  AS `canal`,
                            `r`.`agencia`                                                                                                AS `agencia`,
                            `r`.`ruta`                                                                                                   AS `ruta`,
                            `r`.`id_ruta`                                                                                                AS `id_ruta`,
                            `r`.`id_dia`                                                                                                 AS `id_dia`,
                            `r`.`id_cliente`                                                                                             AS `id_cliente`,
                            `r`.`id_status`                                                                                              AS `id_status`,
                            (`r`.`latitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                AS `latitud`,
                            (`r`.`longitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `longitud`,
                            (`r`.`latitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                         AS `latitud_visita`,
                            (`r`.`longitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                        AS `longitud_visita`,
                            (`r`.`planificado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                            AS `planificado`,
                            (`r`.`visitado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `visitado`,
                            (`r`.`distancia_metros`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                       AS `distancia_metros`,
                            (`r`.`hora`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                   AS `hora`,
                            (if((NOT ISNULL(`v`.`id_cliente`)), 1, 0)!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NOT NULL) AS `vendido`,
                            'Planificado'                                                                                                AS `tipo_visita`,
                            `v`.`dolares`                                                                                                AS `dolares`,
                            `v`.`toneladas`                                                                                              AS `toneladas`
            FROM (`Comercial_Efectividad_Rutas` as `r` LEFT JOIN `Comercial_Efectividad_Ventas` as `v`
                  ON ((`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha_orden`) AND (`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`)))
            UNION ALL
            (SELECT DATE(`v`.`fecha_orden`) AS `fecha`,
                    `v`.`canal`             AS `canal`,
                    `v`.`agencia`           AS `agencia`,
                    `v`.`ruta`              AS `ruta`,
                    `v`.`id_ruta`           AS `id_ruta`,
                    `v`.`id_dia`            AS `id_dia`,
                    `v`.`id_cliente`        AS `id_cliente`,
                    `v`.`id_status`         AS `id_status`,
                    ''                      AS `latitud`,
                    ''                      AS `longitud`,
                    ''                      AS `latitud_visita`,
                    ''                      AS `longitud_visita`,
                    ''                      AS `planificado`,
                    ''                      AS `visitado`,
                    ''                      AS `distancia_metros`,
                    ''                      AS `hora`,
                    '1'                     AS `vendido`,
                    'Fuera de Ruta'         AS `tipo_visita`,
                    `v`.`dolares`           AS `dolares`,
                    `v`.`toneladas`         AS `toneladas`
             FROM `Comercial_Efectividad_Ventas` as `v`
             WHERE (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 AS `1`
                               FROM `Comercial_Efectividad_Rutas` as `r`
                               WHERE ((`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`) AND (`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha_orden`))
                               LIMIT 1)))) AS `SUB`) AS `base`
WHERE ((NOT (`base`.`id_cliente` IN (SELECT `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`.`Cliente_Id` AS `Cliente_Id`
                                     FROM `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita` as `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`
                                     WHERE (NOT ISNULL(`Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`.`Cliente_Id`))))) AND
       (RIGHT(`base`.`id_ruta`, 1) NOT IN ('6', '7', '8', '9', '0')))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Actual as
SELECT `base`.`fecha`                                                                              AS `fecha`,
       `base`.`canal`                                                                              AS `canal`,
       `base`.`agencia`                                                                            AS `agencia`,
       `base`.`ruta`                                                                               AS `ruta`,
       `base`.`id_ruta`                                                                            AS `id_ruta`,
       `base`.`id_dia`                                                                             AS `id_dia`,
       `base`.`id_cliente`                                                                         AS `id_cliente`,
       `base`.`id_status`                                                                          AS `id_status`,
       `base`.`latitud`                                                                            AS `latitud`,
       `base`.`longitud`                                                                           AS `longitud`,
       `base`.`latitud_visita`                                                                     AS `latitud_visita`,
       `base`.`longitud_visita`                                                                    AS `longitud_visita`,
       `base`.`planificado`                                                                        AS `planificado`,
       `base`.`visitado`                                                                           AS `visitado`,
       `base`.`distancia_metros`                                                                   AS `distancia_metros`,
       `base`.`hora`                                                                               AS `hora`,
       `base`.`vendido`                                                                            AS `vendido`,
       `base`.`tipo_visita`                                                                        AS `tipo_visita`,
       `base`.`dolares`                                                                            AS `dolares`,
       `base`.`toneladas`                                                                          AS `toneladas`,
       CASE
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 6) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 6, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 4) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 4, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           WHEN (LENGTH(`base`.`hora`) = 3) THEN TIME_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`base`.`hora`, 4, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
           ELSE NULL END                                                                           AS `hora_formateada`,
       CASE WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`base`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS `visita_efectiva`,
       CASE WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END         AS `venta_efectiva`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`base`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 'En Rango'
           WHEN (`base`.`visitado` = 0) THEN 'No Visitado'
           WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND ((`base`.`distancia_metros` > 50) OR ISNULL(`base`.`distancia_metros`)))
               THEN 'Fuera de Rango'
           ELSE 'Sin Información' END                                                              AS `MarcacionGPS`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND (`base`.`dolares` < 0)) THEN 'Devolución'
           WHEN (`base`.`vendido` = 0) THEN 'Sin Venta'
           WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 'Venta en Ruta'
           WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND ((`base`.`planificado` <> 1) OR ISNULL(`base`.`planificado`)))
               THEN 'Venta Fuera de Ruta'
           ELSE 'Sin Información' END                                                              AS `GestionVenta`,
       CASE
           WHEN (CASE
                     WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND (`base`.`dolares` < 0)) THEN 'Devolución'
                     WHEN (`base`.`vendido` = 0) THEN 'Sin Venta'
                     WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 'Venta en Ruta'
                     WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND ((`base`.`planificado` <> 1) OR ISNULL(`base`.`planificado`)))
                         THEN 'Venta Fuera de Ruta'
                     ELSE 'Sin Información' END = 'Devolución') THEN 0
           ELSE 1 END                                                                              AS `ClientesGestionados`
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`fecha`            AS `fecha`,
                      `SUB`.`canal`            AS `canal`,
                      `SUB`.`agencia`          AS `agencia`,
                      `SUB`.`ruta`             AS `ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`id_ruta`          AS `id_ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`id_dia`           AS `id_dia`,
                      `SUB`.`id_cliente`       AS `id_cliente`,
                      `SUB`.`id_status`        AS `id_status`,
                      `SUB`.`latitud`          AS `latitud`,
                      `SUB`.`longitud`         AS `longitud`,
                      `SUB`.`latitud_visita`   AS `latitud_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`longitud_visita`  AS `longitud_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`planificado`      AS `planificado`,
                      `SUB`.`visitado`         AS `visitado`,
                      `SUB`.`distancia_metros` AS `distancia_metros`,
                      `SUB`.`hora`             AS `hora`,
                      `SUB`.`vendido`          AS `vendido`,
                      `SUB`.`tipo_visita`      AS `tipo_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`dolares`          AS `dolares`,
                      `SUB`.`toneladas`        AS `toneladas`
      FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `r`.`fecha`                                                                                                  AS `fecha`,
                            `r`.`canal`                                                                                                  AS `canal`,
                            `r`.`agencia`                                                                                                AS `agencia`,
                            `r`.`ruta`                                                                                                   AS `ruta`,
                            `r`.`id_ruta`                                                                                                AS `id_ruta`,
                            `r`.`id_dia`                                                                                                 AS `id_dia`,
                            `r`.`id_cliente`                                                                                             AS `id_cliente`,
                            `r`.`id_status`                                                                                              AS `id_status`,
                            (`r`.`latitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                AS `latitud`,
                            (`r`.`longitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `longitud`,
                            (`r`.`latitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                         AS `latitud_visita`,
                            (`r`.`longitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                        AS `longitud_visita`,
                            (`r`.`planificado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                            AS `planificado`,
                            (`r`.`visitado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `visitado`,
                            (`r`.`distancia_metros`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                       AS `distancia_metros`,
                            (`r`.`hora`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                   AS `hora`,
                            (if((NOT ISNULL(`v`.`id_cliente`)), 1, 0)!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NOT NULL) AS `vendido`,
                            'Planificado'                                                                                                AS `tipo_visita`,
                            `v`.`dolares`                                                                                                AS `dolares`,
                            `v`.`toneladas`                                                                                              AS `toneladas`
            FROM (`Comercial_Efectividad_Rutas` as `r` LEFT JOIN `Comercial_Efectividad_Ventas` as `v`
                  ON ((`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha_orden`) AND (`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`)))
            UNION ALL
            (SELECT DATE(`v`.`fecha_orden`) AS `fecha`,
                    `v`.`canal`             AS `canal`,
                    `v`.`agencia`           AS `agencia`,
                    `v`.`ruta`              AS `ruta`,
                    `v`.`id_ruta`           AS `id_ruta`,
                    `v`.`id_dia`            AS `id_dia`,
                    `v`.`id_cliente`        AS `id_cliente`,
                    `v`.`id_status`         AS `id_status`,
                    ''                      AS `latitud`,
                    ''                      AS `longitud`,
                    ''                      AS `latitud_visita`,
                    ''                      AS `longitud_visita`,
                    ''                      AS `planificado`,
                    ''                      AS `visitado`,
                    ''                      AS `distancia_metros`,
                    ''                      AS `hora`,
                    '1'                     AS `vendido`,
                    'Fuera de Ruta'         AS `tipo_visita`,
                    `v`.`dolares`           AS `dolares`,
                    `v`.`toneladas`         AS `toneladas`
             FROM `Comercial_Efectividad_Ventas` as `v`
             WHERE (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 AS `1`
                               FROM `Comercial_Efectividad_Rutas` as `r`
                               WHERE ((`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`) AND (`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha_orden`))
                               LIMIT 1)))) AS `SUB`) AS `base`
WHERE ((NOT (`base`.`id_cliente` IN (SELECT `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`.`Cliente_Id` AS `Cliente_Id`
                                     FROM `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita` as `Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`
                                     WHERE (NOT ISNULL(`Comercial_Frecuencia_Visita`.`Cliente_Id`))))) AND
       (RIGHT(`base`.`id_ruta`, 1) NOT IN ('6', '7', '8', '9', '0')))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad_Resumen as
SELECT YEAR(`h`.`fecha`)                                                                         AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`h`.`fecha`)                                                                        AS `Mes`,
       `h`.`fecha`                                                                               AS `fecha`,
       `h`.`agencia`                                                                             AS `agencia`,
       `h`.`ruta`                                                                                AS `ruta`,
       MIN(`h`.`hora_formateada`)                                                                AS `hora_inicio`,
       MAX(`h`.`hora_formateada`)                                                                AS `hora_fin`,
       (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(MAX(`h`.`hora_formateada`), MIN(`h`.`hora_formateada`))) /
        60)                                                                                      AS `minutos_trabajados`,
       CONCAT(FLOOR((TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(MAX(`h`.`hora_formateada`), MIN(`h`.`hora_formateada`))) / 3600)), ':',
              LPAD(FLOOR(((TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(MAX(`h`.`hora_formateada`), MIN(`h`.`hora_formateada`))) / 60) % 60)),
                   2, '0'))                                                                      AS `tiempo_trabajado`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
                          WHEN (`h`.`tipo_visita` = 'Planificado')
                              THEN `h`.`id_cliente` END)                                         AS `clientes_planificados`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
                          WHEN (`h`.`visitado` = 1)
                              THEN `h`.`id_cliente` END)                                         AS `clientes_visitados`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
                          WHEN (`h`.`visitado` = 0)
                              THEN `h`.`id_cliente` END)                                         AS `clientes_no_visitados`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
                          WHEN (`h`.`tipo_visita` = 'Fuera de Ruta')
                              THEN `h`.`id_cliente` END)                                         AS `clientes_fuera_ruta`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN (`h`.`visita_efectiva` = 1) THEN `h`.`id_cliente` END)           AS `visitas_efectivas`,
       ROUND(AVG(`t`.`tiempo_entre_clientes`), 2)                                                AS `tiempo_promedio_entre_clientes`
FROM ((SELECT `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`fecha`            AS `fecha`,
              `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`agencia`          AS `agencia`,
              `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`ruta`             AS `ruta`,
              `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`id_cliente`       AS `id_cliente`,
              `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`             AS `hora`,
              CASE
                  WHEN (LENGTH(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`) = 6) THEN TIME_FORMAT(
                          STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`, 6, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
                  WHEN (LENGTH(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`) = 4) THEN TIME_FORMAT(
                          STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`, 4, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
                  WHEN (LENGTH(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`) = 3) THEN TIME_FORMAT(
                          STR_TO_DATE(LPAD(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`, 4, '0'), '%H%i'), '%H:%i')
                  ELSE NULL END                                      AS `hora_formateada`,
              `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`tipo_visita`      AS `tipo_visita`,
              `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`visitado`         AS `visitado`,
              `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`distancia_metros` AS `distancia_metros`,
              `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`vendido`          AS `vendido`,
              `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`GestionVenta`     AS `gestionventa`,
              `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`visita_efectiva`  AS `visita_efectiva`
       FROM `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad` as `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`
       WHERE (YEAR(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`fecha`) = 2025)) AS `h` LEFT JOIN (SELECT `SEGUIMIENTO`.`fecha`           AS `fecha`,
                                                                                                  `SEGUIMIENTO`.`agencia`         AS `agencia`,
                                                                                                  `SEGUIMIENTO`.`ruta`            AS `ruta`,
                                                                                                  `SEGUIMIENTO`.`id_cliente`      AS `id_cliente`,
                                                                                                  `SEGUIMIENTO`.`hora_formateada` AS `hora_formateada`,
                                                                                                  (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF(
                                                                                                          `SEGUIMIENTO`.`hora_formateada`,
                                                                                                          LAG(
                                                                                                                  `SEGUIMIENTO`.`hora_formateada`)
                                                                                                                  OVER (PARTITION BY `SEGUIMIENTO`.`fecha`, `SEGUIMIENTO`.`ruta` ORDER BY `SEGUIMIENTO`.`hora_formateada`))) /
                                                                                                   60)                            AS `tiempo_entre_clientes`
                                                                                           FROM (SELECT `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`fecha`            AS `fecha`,
                                                                                                        `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`agencia`          AS `agencia`,
                                                                                                        `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`ruta`             AS `ruta`,
                                                                                                        `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`id_cliente`       AS `id_cliente`,
                                                                                                        `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`             AS `hora`,
                                                                                                        CASE
                                                                                                            WHEN (LENGTH(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`) = 6)
                                                                                                                THEN TIME_FORMAT(
                                                                                                                    STR_TO_DATE(
                                                                                                                            LPAD(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`, 6, '0'),
                                                                                                                            '%H%i'),
                                                                                                                    '%H:%i')
                                                                                                            WHEN (LENGTH(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`) = 4)
                                                                                                                THEN TIME_FORMAT(
                                                                                                                    STR_TO_DATE(
                                                                                                                            LPAD(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`, 4, '0'),
                                                                                                                            '%H%i'),
                                                                                                                    '%H:%i')
                                                                                                            WHEN (LENGTH(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`) = 3)
                                                                                                                THEN TIME_FORMAT(
                                                                                                                    STR_TO_DATE(
                                                                                                                            LPAD(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`hora`, 4, '0'),
                                                                                                                            '%H%i'),
                                                                                                                    '%H:%i')
                                                                                                            ELSE NULL END                                      AS `hora_formateada`,
                                                                                                        `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`tipo_visita`      AS `tipo_visita`,
                                                                                                        `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`visitado`         AS `visitado`,
                                                                                                        `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`distancia_metros` AS `distancia_metros`,
                                                                                                        `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`vendido`          AS `vendido`,
                                                                                                        `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`GestionVenta`     AS `gestionventa`,
                                                                                                        `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`visita_efectiva`  AS `visita_efectiva`
                                                                                                 FROM `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad` as `Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`
                                                                                                 WHERE (YEAR(`Comercial_Seguimiento_Efectividad`.`fecha`) = 2025)) AS `SEGUIMIENTO`
                                                                                           WHERE ((`SEGUIMIENTO`.`visitado` = 1) AND
                                                                                                  (NOT ISNULL(`SEGUIMIENTO`.`hora_formateada`)))) AS `t`
      ON ((`h`.`fecha` = `t`.`fecha`) AND (`h`.`ruta` = `t`.`ruta`) AND (`h`.`id_cliente` = `t`.`id_cliente`)))
WHERE (YEAR(`h`.`fecha`) = 2025)
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Seguimiento_Infaltables_Sustitutos as
SELECT `clasificada`.`Anio`            AS `Anio`,
       `clasificada`.`Mes`             AS `Mes`,
       `clasificada`.`COD_CANAL`       AS `COD_CANAL`,
       `clasificada`.`ID_AGENCIA`      AS `ID_AGENCIA`,
       `clasificada`.`Ruta`            AS `Ruta`,
       `clasificada`.`ID_CLIENTE`      AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
       `clasificada`.`ID_SEGMENTO`     AS `ID_SEGMENTO`,
       `clasificada`.`NOMBRE_SEGMENTO` AS `NOMBRE_SEGMENTO`,
       `clasificada`.`ID_PRODUCTO`     AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
       `clasificada`.`TIPO_PRODUCTO`   AS `TIPO_PRODUCTO`,
       `clasificada`.`PROD_INFALTABLE` AS `PROD_INFALTABLE`,
       `clasificada`.`PROD_SUSTITUTO`  AS `PROD_SUSTITUTO`,
       `clasificada`.`Toneladas`       AS `Toneladas`,
       `clasificada`.`Unidades`        AS `Unidades`,
       `clasificada`.`ETL_TSTAMP`      AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
FROM (SELECT `vs`.`Anio`                                                     AS `Anio`,
             `vs`.`Mes`                                                      AS `Mes`,
             `vs`.`COD_CANAL`                                                AS `COD_CANAL`,
             `vs`.`ID_AGENCIA`                                               AS `ID_AGENCIA`,
             `vs`.`Ruta`                                                     AS `Ruta`,
             `vs`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                               AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
             `vs`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                              AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
             `vs`.`Toneladas`                                                AS `Toneladas`,
             `vs`.`Unidades`                                                 AS `Unidades`,
             `vs`.`ETL_TSTAMP`                                               AS `ETL_TSTAMP`,
             `vs`.`ID_SEGMENTO`                                              AS `ID_SEGMENTO`,
             `vs`.`NOMBRE_SEGMENTO`                                          AS `NOMBRE_SEGMENTO`,
             CASE WHEN (NOT ISNULL(`pi_inf`.`INFALTABLE`)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS `PROD_INFALTABLE`,
             CASE WHEN (NOT ISNULL(`ps`.`SUSTITUTO`)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END      AS `PROD_SUSTITUTO`,
             CASE
                 WHEN (NOT ISNULL(`pi_inf`.`INFALTABLE`)) THEN 'INFALTABLE'
                 WHEN (NOT ISNULL(`ps`.`SUSTITUTO`)) THEN 'SUSTITUTO'
                 ELSE 'OTRO' END                                             AS `TIPO_PRODUCTO`
      FROM (((SELECT `vt`.`Anio`        AS `Anio`,
                     `vt`.`Mes`         AS `Mes`,
                     `vt`.`COD_CANAL`   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                     `vt`.`ID_AGENCIA`  AS `ID_AGENCIA`,
                     `vt`.`Ruta`        AS `Ruta`,
                     `vt`.`ID_CLIENTE`  AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
                     `vt`.`ID_PRODUCTO` AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                     `vt`.`Toneladas`   AS `Toneladas`,
                     `vt`.`Unidades`    AS `Unidades`,
                     `vt`.`ETL_TSTAMP`  AS `ETL_TSTAMP`,
                     `cl`.`COD_GRUPO`   AS `ID_SEGMENTO`,
                     `cl`.`DESC_GRUPO`  AS `NOMBRE_SEGMENTO`
              FROM ((SELECT `v`.`Anio`            AS `Anio`,
                            `v`.`Mes`             AS `Mes`,
                            `v`.`COD_CANAL`       AS `COD_CANAL`,
                            `c`.`id_agencia`      AS `ID_AGENCIA`,
                            `v`.`Ruta`            AS `Ruta`,
                            `v`.`ID_CLIENTE`      AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
                            `v`.`ID_PRODUCTO`     AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                            SUM(`v`.`TON`)        AS `Toneladas`,
                            SUM(`v`.`Unidades`)   AS `Unidades`,
                            MAX(`v`.`ETL_TSTAMP`) AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
                     FROM (`com_ventas` as `v` LEFT JOIN `com_cliente` as `c` ON (`v`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`id_cliente`))
                     WHERE (`v`.`Anio` >= 2025)
                     GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7) AS `vt` LEFT JOIN `GD_CLUSTER_CLIENTES` as `cl`
                    ON ((`cl`.`COD_CLIENTE` = `vt`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND
                        (`cl`.`COD_CANAL` = `vt`.`COD_CANAL`)))) AS `vs` LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`.`COD_CANAL`       AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                                                                    `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`.`ID_AGENCIA`      AS `ID_AGENCIA`,
                                                                                                    `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`.`ID_SEGMENTO`     AS `ID_SEGMENTO`,
                                                                                                    `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`.`NOMBRE_SEGMENTO` AS `NOMBRE_SEGMENTO`,
                                                                                                    `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`.`INFALTABLE`      AS `INFALTABLE`
                                                                                    FROM `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos` as `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`) AS `pi_inf`
             ON ((`pi_inf`.`COD_CANAL` = `vs`.`COD_CANAL`) AND (`pi_inf`.`ID_AGENCIA` = `vs`.`ID_AGENCIA`) AND
                 (`pi_inf`.`NOMBRE_SEGMENTO` = `vs`.`NOMBRE_SEGMENTO`) AND
                 (`pi_inf`.`INFALTABLE` = `vs`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))) LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`.`COD_CANAL`       AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                                                           `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`.`ID_AGENCIA`      AS `ID_AGENCIA`,
                                                                                           `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`.`ID_SEGMENTO`     AS `ID_SEGMENTO`,
                                                                                           `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`.`NOMBRE_SEGMENTO` AS `NOMBRE_SEGMENTO`,
                                                                                           `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`.`SUSTITUTO`       AS `SUSTITUTO`
                                                                           FROM `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos` as `Comercial_Infaltables_Sustitutos`) AS `ps`
            ON ((`ps`.`COD_CANAL` = `vs`.`COD_CANAL`) AND (`ps`.`ID_AGENCIA` = `vs`.`ID_AGENCIA`) AND
                (`ps`.`NOMBRE_SEGMENTO` = `vs`.`NOMBRE_SEGMENTO`) AND
                (`ps`.`SUSTITUTO` = `vs`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)))) AS `clasificada`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Seguimiento_Portafolio_Ideal as
SELECT `i`.`Anio`                                                                         AS `Anio`,
       `i`.`Mes`                                                                          AS `Mes`,
       `i`.`Cod_Canal`                                                                    AS `Cod_Canal`,
       `i`.`Agencia`                                                                      AS `Agencia`,
       `i`.`Ruta`                                                                         AS `Ruta`,
       `i`.`Id_Cliente`                                                                   AS `Id_Cliente`,
       `i`.`Segmento`                                                                     AS `Segmento`,
       `u`.`Productos`                                                                    AS `Productos`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT `i`.`Id_Producto`)                                                  AS `Productos_Vendidos`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT `i`.`Id_Producto_Portafolio`)                                       AS `Productos_Portafolio_Ideal_Vendidos`,
       (COUNT(DISTINCT `i`.`Id_Producto_Portafolio`) / COUNT(DISTINCT `i`.`Id_Producto`)) AS `Cumplimiento_Parcial_PI`,
       (COUNT(DISTINCT `i`.`Id_Producto_Portafolio`) / `u`.`Productos`)                   AS `Cumplimiento_Total_PI`
FROM ((SELECT `a`.`Anio`           AS `Anio`,
              `a`.`Mes`            AS `Mes`,
              `a`.`Cod_Canal`      AS `Cod_Canal`,
              `a`.`Agencia`        AS `Agencia`,
              `a`.`Ruta`           AS `Ruta`,
              `a`.`Id_Cliente`     AS `Id_Cliente`,
              `a`.`Id_Producto`    AS `Id_Producto`,
              `p`.`Id_Producto`    AS `Id_Producto_Portafolio`,
              `b`.`DESC_GRUPO`     AS `Segmento`,
              SUM(`a`.`Toneladas`) AS `Toneladas_Vendidas`
       FROM (((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                           AS `Anio`,
                      MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                          AS `Mes`,
                      `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                  AS `Cod_Canal`,
                      `a`.`Nombre`                                     AS `Agencia`,
                      CASE
                          WHEN (`c`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('DIS', 'AUT')) THEN `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`
                          ELSE if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                  if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                  LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) END         AS `Ruta`,
                      `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                 AS `Id_Cliente`,
                      `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`                                AS `Nombre_Cliente`,
                      `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                AS `Id_Producto`,
                      `f`.`ETL_TSTAMP`                                 AS `Etl_Timestamp`,
                      SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))    AS `Toneladas`,
                      SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                     AS `Facturacion`,
                      SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                AS `Margen`,
                      SUM((`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) AS `Cajas_Reales`,
                      SUM((`f`.`CANT_VENDIDA` + `f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`)) AS `Unidades`
               FROM ((((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                          ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                         ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
                        ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                            (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 1))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
                       ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                           (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 1))) LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r` ON (if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                                           if(
                                                                                                   (`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2),
                                                                                                   `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`,
                                                                                                   LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                                           LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) =
                                                                                        `r`.`Codigo`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Agencias` as `a`
                     ON (`r`.`Agencia_Id` = `a`.`Id`))
               WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) >= 2025) AND (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                      (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))
               GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, `f`.`SERVICIO`, 9) AS `a` LEFT JOIN `GD_CLUSTER_CLIENTES` as `b`
              ON (`a`.`Id_Cliente` = `b`.`COD_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `Comercial_Portafolio_Ideal` as `p`
             ON ((`b`.`DESC_GRUPO` = `p`.`Segmento`) AND (`a`.`Id_Producto` = `p`.`Id_Producto`) AND
                 (`a`.`Agencia` = `p`.`Agencia`)))
       WHERE (`a`.`Anio` >= 2025)
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9) AS `i` LEFT JOIN (SELECT `Comercial_Portafolio_Ideal`.`Canal`                       AS `Canal`,
                                                                    `Comercial_Portafolio_Ideal`.`Segmento`                    AS `Segmento`,
                                                                    `Comercial_Portafolio_Ideal`.`Agencia`                     AS `Agencia`,
                                                                    COUNT(DISTINCT `Comercial_Portafolio_Ideal`.`Id_Producto`) AS `Productos`
                                                             FROM `Comercial_Portafolio_Ideal` as `Comercial_Portafolio_Ideal`
                                                             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) AS `u`
      ON ((`i`.`Cod_Canal` = `u`.`Canal`) AND (`i`.`Segmento` = `u`.`Segmento`) AND (`i`.`Agencia` = `u`.`Agencia`)))
WHERE (`i`.`Cod_Canal` IN ('COB', 'HOR', 'MAY', 'PAN'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Skus_Canal as
SELECT `productos_por_cliente`.`Anio`                            AS `Anio`,
       `productos_por_cliente`.`Mes`                             AS `Mes`,
       `productos_por_cliente`.`COD_CANAL`                       AS `COD_CANAL`,
       ROUND(AVG(`productos_por_cliente`.`skus_por_cliente`), 2) AS `promedio_skus_por_cliente`
FROM (SELECT `com_ventas`.`Anio`                        AS `Anio`,
             `com_ventas`.`Mes`                         AS `Mes`,
             `com_ventas`.`COD_CANAL`                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
             `com_ventas`.`ID_CLIENTE`                  AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
             COUNT(DISTINCT `com_ventas`.`ID_PRODUCTO`) AS `skus_por_cliente`
      FROM `com_ventas` as `com_ventas`
      WHERE (`com_ventas`.`Anio` >= 2025)
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `productos_por_cliente`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
ORDER BY 1 DESC, 2 DESC, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Skus_Ruta as
SELECT `productos_por_cliente`.`Anio`                            AS `Anio`,
       `productos_por_cliente`.`Mes`                             AS `Mes`,
       `productos_por_cliente`.`COD_CANAL`                       AS `COD_CANAL`,
       `productos_por_cliente`.`Ruta`                            AS `Ruta`,
       ROUND(AVG(`productos_por_cliente`.`skus_por_cliente`), 2) AS `promedio_skus_por_cliente`
FROM (SELECT `com_ventas`.`Anio`                        AS `Anio`,
             `com_ventas`.`Mes`                         AS `Mes`,
             `com_ventas`.`COD_CANAL`                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
             `com_ventas`.`Ruta`                        AS `Ruta`,
             `com_ventas`.`ID_CLIENTE`                  AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
             COUNT(DISTINCT `com_ventas`.`ID_PRODUCTO`) AS `skus_por_cliente`
      FROM `com_ventas` as `com_ventas`
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5) AS `productos_por_cliente`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
ORDER BY 1 DESC, 2 DESC, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Venta_Promedio_Diaria as
SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`        AS `Anio`,
                `SUB`.`Mes`         AS `Mes`,
                `SUB`.`ID_PRODUCTO` AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                `SUB`.`Toneladas`   AS `Toneladas`,
                `SUB`.`Dolares`     AS `Dolares`
FROM (SELECT `ventas_mes_cerrado`.`Anio`        AS `Anio`,
             `ventas_mes_cerrado`.`Mes`         AS `Mes`,
             `ventas_mes_cerrado`.`ID_PRODUCTO` AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
             `ventas_mes_cerrado`.`Toneladas`   AS `Toneladas`,
             `ventas_mes_cerrado`.`Dolares`     AS `Dolares`
      FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`        AS `Anio`,
                   `v`.`Mes`         AS `Mes`,
                   `v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                   `v`.`Toneladas`   AS `Toneladas`,
                   `v`.`Dolares`     AS `Dolares`
            FROM ((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                        AS `Anio`,
                          MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                       AS `Mes`,
                          `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                             AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                          SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)) AS `Toneladas`,
                          SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                  AS `Dolares`
                   FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                          ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                         ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
                   WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN 2024 AND YEAR(CURDATE())) AND
                          (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND
                          (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))
                   GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) AS `v` JOIN (SELECT YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH))  AS `Anio`,
                                                         MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS `Mes`) AS `umc`
                  ON ((`v`.`Anio` = `umc`.`Anio`) AND (`v`.`Mes` = `umc`.`Mes`)))) AS `ventas_mes_cerrado`
      UNION ALL
      (SELECT `ventas_ultimas`.`Anio`        AS `Anio`,
              `ventas_ultimas`.`Mes`         AS `Mes`,
              `ventas_ultimas`.`ID_PRODUCTO` AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
              `ventas_ultimas`.`Toneladas`   AS `Toneladas`,
              `ventas_ultimas`.`Dolares`     AS `Dolares`
       FROM (SELECT `vm`.`Anio`        AS `Anio`,
                    `vm`.`Mes`         AS `Mes`,
                    `vm`.`ID_PRODUCTO` AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                    `vm`.`Toneladas`   AS `Toneladas`,
                    `vm`.`Dolares`     AS `Dolares`
             FROM (SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                        AS `Anio`,
                          MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                       AS `Mes`,
                          `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                             AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                          SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)) AS `Toneladas`,
                          SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                  AS `Dolares`
                   FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                          ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                         ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
                   WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN 2024 AND YEAR(CURDATE())) AND
                          (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND
                          (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))
                   GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) AS `vm`
             WHERE ((NOT (`vm`.`ID_PRODUCTO` IN (SELECT `ventas_mes_cerrado`.`ID_PRODUCTO` AS `ID_PRODUCTO`
                                                 FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`        AS `Anio`,
                                                              `v`.`Mes`         AS `Mes`,
                                                              `v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                                                              `v`.`Toneladas`   AS `Toneladas`,
                                                              `v`.`Dolares`     AS `Dolares`
                                                       FROM ((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                        AS `Anio`,
                                                                     MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                       AS `Mes`,
