                                                                     `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                             AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                                                                     SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)) AS `Toneladas`,
                                                                     SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                  AS `Dolares`
                                                              FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                     ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                    ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
                                                              WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN 2024 AND YEAR(CURDATE())) AND
                                                                     (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                                                                     (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND
                                                                     (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))
                                                              GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) AS `v` JOIN (SELECT YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH))  AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                    MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS `Mes`) AS `umc`
                                                             ON ((`v`.`Anio` = `umc`.`Anio`) AND (`v`.`Mes` = `umc`.`Mes`)))) AS `ventas_mes_cerrado`))) AND
                    (((`vm`.`Anio` * 100) + `vm`.`Mes`) =
                     (SELECT MAX(((`vm2`.`Anio` * 100) + `vm2`.`Mes`)) AS `max(vm2.Anio * 100 + vm2.Mes)`
                      FROM (SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                        AS `Anio`,
                                   MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                       AS `Mes`,
                                   `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                             AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
                                   SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)) AS `Toneladas`,
                                   SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                  AS `Dolares`
                            FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                   ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                  ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
                            WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) BETWEEN 2024 AND YEAR(CURDATE())) AND
                                   (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND
                                   (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))
                            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) AS `vm2`
                      WHERE (`vm2`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `vm`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))))) AS `ventas_ultimas`)) AS `SUB`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Venta_Promedio_Diario as
SELECT `ventas_filtradas`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                                                          AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       `ventas_filtradas`.`Nombre_Familia`                                                                          AS `Nombre_Familia`,
       `ventas_filtradas`.`Id_Producto`                                                                             AS `Id_Producto`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT `ventas_filtradas`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                              AS `Dias_Con_Venta`,
       ROUND(SUM(`ventas_filtradas`.`Toneladas`), 2)                                                                AS `Total_Toneladas`,
       ROUND(SUM(`ventas_filtradas`.`Cajas_Reales`), 2)                                                             AS `Total_Cajas_Reales`,
       SUM(`ventas_filtradas`.`Unidades`)                                                                           AS `Total_Unidades`,
       ROUND((SUM(`ventas_filtradas`.`Toneladas`) / nullif(COUNT(DISTINCT `ventas_filtradas`.`DATE_CONTA`), 0)),
             2)                                                                                                     AS `Promedio_Toneladas_Dia`,
       ROUND((SUM(`ventas_filtradas`.`Cajas_Reales`) / nullif(COUNT(DISTINCT `ventas_filtradas`.`DATE_CONTA`), 0)),
             2)                                                                                                     AS `Promedio_Cajas_Reales_Dia`,
       ROUND((SUM(`ventas_filtradas`.`Unidades`) / nullif(COUNT(DISTINCT `ventas_filtradas`.`DATE_CONTA`), 0)),
             2)                                                                                                     AS `Promedio_Unidades_Dia`
FROM (SELECT `b`.`segmento`                              AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
             `b`.`nombre_familia`                        AS `Nombre_Familia`,
             `b`.`id_producto`                           AS `Id_Producto`,
             `f`.`DATE_CONTA`                            AS `DATE_CONTA`,
             ((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)    AS `Toneladas`,
             (`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`) AS `Cajas_Reales`,
             (`f`.`CANT_VENDIDA` + `f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`) AS `Unidades`
      FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
              ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `b`
             ON (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`id_producto`)) JOIN (SELECT `b`.`segmento`        AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                      `b`.`nombre_familia`  AS `Nombre_Familia`,
                                                                      `b`.`id_producto`     AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                      MAX(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) AS `Fecha_Max`
                                                               FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                      ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `b`
                                                                     ON (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`id_producto`))
                                                               WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024, 2025)) AND
                                                                      (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('111', '999', '0')))
                                                               GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `fm`
            ON ((`b`.`segmento` = `fm`.`Unidad_Negocio`) AND (`b`.`nombre_familia` = `fm`.`Nombre_Familia`)))
      WHERE ((`f`.`DATE_CONTA` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(`fm`.`Fecha_Max`, INTERVAL 60 DAY) AND `fm`.`Fecha_Max`) AND
             (YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024, 2025)) AND
             (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('111', '999', '0')))) AS `ventas_filtradas`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Venta_Promedio_Diario_30_Dias as
SELECT `ventas_mensuales`.`Unidad_Negocio`                     AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       `ventas_mensuales`.`Nombre_Familia`                     AS `Nombre_Familia`,
       `ventas_mensuales`.`Id_Producto`                        AS `Id_Producto`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT `ventas_mensuales`.`DATE_CONTA`)         AS `Dias_Con_Venta`,
       ROUND(SUM(`ventas_mensuales`.`Toneladas`), 2)           AS `Total_Toneladas`,
       ROUND(SUM(`ventas_mensuales`.`Cajas_Reales`), 2)        AS `Total_Cajas_Reales`,
       SUM(`ventas_mensuales`.`Unidades`)                      AS `Total_Unidades`,
       ROUND((SUM(`ventas_mensuales`.`Toneladas`) / 30), 2)    AS `Promedio_Toneladas_Dia`,
       ROUND((SUM(`ventas_mensuales`.`Cajas_Reales`) / 30), 2) AS `Promedio_Cajas_Reales_Dia`,
       ROUND((SUM(`ventas_mensuales`.`Unidades`) / 30), 2)     AS `Promedio_Unidades_Dia`
FROM (SELECT `b`.`segmento`                              AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
             `b`.`nombre_familia`                        AS `Nombre_Familia`,
             `b`.`id_producto`                           AS `Id_Producto`,
             `f`.`DATE_CONTA`                            AS `DATE_CONTA`,
             ((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)    AS `Toneladas`,
             (`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`) AS `Cajas_Reales`,
             (`f`.`CANT_VENDIDA` + `f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`) AS `Unidades`
      FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
              ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `b`
             ON (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`id_producto`)) JOIN (SELECT `b`.`segmento`                                 AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                      `b`.`nombre_familia`                           AS `Nombre_Familia`,
                                                                      `b`.`id_producto`                              AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                      MAX(DATE_FORMAT(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`, '%Y-%m-01')) AS `Mes_Venta`
                                                               FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                      ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `b`
                                                                     ON (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`id_producto`))
                                                               WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024, 2025)) AND
                                                                      (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('111', '999', '0')))
                                                               GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) AS `fm`
            ON ((`b`.`segmento` = `fm`.`Unidad_Negocio`) AND (`b`.`nombre_familia` = `fm`.`Nombre_Familia`) AND
                (`b`.`id_producto` = `fm`.`Id_Producto`)))
      WHERE ((`f`.`DATE_CONTA` BETWEEN `fm`.`Mes_Venta` AND LAST_DAY(`fm`.`Mes_Venta`)) AND
             (YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024, 2025)) AND
             (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('111', '999', '0')))) AS `ventas_mensuales`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Comercial_Ventas_Pareto as
SELECT `mc`.`Anio`                                                           AS `Anio`,
       `mc`.`Mes`                                                            AS `Mes`,
       `mc`.`COD_CANAL`                                                      AS `COD_CANAL`,
       `bp`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                     AS `Cliente`,
       `bp`.`ruta`                                                           AS `Ruta`,
       COALESCE(`bp`.`clasificacion_pareto`, 'No Clasificado')               AS `Clasificacion`,
       CASE WHEN (COALESCE(`va`.`Venta_Ton`, 0) > 0) THEN 'Sí' ELSE 'No' END AS `Compra`,
       COALESCE(`va`.`Venta_Ton`, 0)                                         AS `Venta_Ton`
FROM (((SELECT DISTINCT `ventas_agrupadas`.`Anio`      AS `Anio`,
                        `ventas_agrupadas`.`Mes`       AS `Mes`,
                        `ventas_agrupadas`.`COD_CANAL` AS `COD_CANAL`
        FROM (SELECT `com_ventas`.`Anio`       AS `Anio`,
                     `com_ventas`.`Mes`        AS `Mes`,
                     `com_ventas`.`COD_CANAL`  AS `COD_CANAL`,
                     `com_ventas`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
                     SUM(`com_ventas`.`TON`)   AS `Venta_Ton`
              FROM `com_ventas` as `com_ventas`
              WHERE (`com_ventas`.`Anio` >= 2025)
              GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `ventas_agrupadas`) AS `mc` JOIN (SELECT `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes`.`Cod_Canal`            AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                                               `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes`.`Id_Cliente`           AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
                                                                               `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes`.`Clasificacion_Pareto` AS `clasificacion_pareto`,
                                                                               `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes`.`Ruta`                 AS `ruta`
                                                                        FROM `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes` as `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes`) AS `bp`
       ON (`bp`.`COD_CANAL` = `mc`.`COD_CANAL`)) LEFT JOIN (SELECT `com_ventas`.`Anio`       AS `Anio`,
                                                                   `com_ventas`.`Mes`        AS `Mes`,
                                                                   `com_ventas`.`COD_CANAL`  AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                                   `com_ventas`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
                                                                   SUM(`com_ventas`.`TON`)   AS `Venta_Ton`
                                                            FROM `com_ventas` as `com_ventas`
                                                            WHERE (`com_ventas`.`Anio` >= 2025)
                                                            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `va`
      ON ((`va`.`Anio` = `mc`.`Anio`) AND (`va`.`Mes` = `mc`.`Mes`) AND (`va`.`COD_CANAL` = `mc`.`COD_CANAL`) AND
          (`va`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `bp`.`ID_CLIENTE`)))
UNION ALL
(SELECT `va`.`Anio`                                                           AS `Anio`,
        `va`.`Mes`                                                            AS `Mes`,
        `va`.`COD_CANAL`                                                      AS `COD_CANAL`,
        `va`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                     AS `Cliente`,
        `bp`.`ruta`                                                           AS `Ruta`,
        'No Clasificado'                                                      AS `Clasificacion`,
        CASE WHEN (COALESCE(`va`.`Venta_Ton`, 0) > 0) THEN 'Sí' ELSE 'No' END AS `Compra`,
        COALESCE(`va`.`Venta_Ton`, 0)                                         AS `Venta_Ton`
 FROM ((SELECT `com_ventas`.`Anio`       AS `Anio`,
               `com_ventas`.`Mes`        AS `Mes`,
               `com_ventas`.`COD_CANAL`  AS `COD_CANAL`,
               `com_ventas`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
               SUM(`com_ventas`.`TON`)   AS `Venta_Ton`
        FROM `com_ventas` as `com_ventas`
        WHERE (`com_ventas`.`Anio` >= 2025)
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `va` LEFT JOIN (SELECT `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes`.`Cod_Canal`            AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                       `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes`.`Id_Cliente`           AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
                                                       `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes`.`Clasificacion_Pareto` AS `clasificacion_pareto`,
                                                       `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes`.`Ruta`                 AS `ruta`
                                                FROM `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes` as `Comercial_Priorizacion_Clientes`) AS `bp`
       ON ((`bp`.`COD_CANAL` = `va`.`COD_CANAL`) AND (`bp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `va`.`ID_CLIENTE`)))
 WHERE ISNULL(`bp`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = DAT@`` view DAT_IVA_COMPRADO as
SELECT `k`.`ITEMCORTO`   AS `ITEMCORTO`,
       `k`.`DESCRIPCION` AS `DESCRIPCION`,
       `k`.`CANTID`      AS `CANTID`,
       `k`.`UM`          AS `UM`,
       `k`.`COSTOUNIT`   AS `COSTOUNIT`,
       `k`.`COSTOTOTAL`  AS `COSTOTOTAL`,
       `k`.`FECHAT`      AS `FECHAT`
FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_KARDEX` as `k` JOIN `DAT_Productos_Cambiados_IVA_mayo` as `P` ON (`k`.`ITEMCORTO` = `P`.`CORTO`))
WHERE (`k`.`TIPODOC` = 'OV')
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = DAT@`` view DAT_IVA_Diferente as
SELECT `B180`.`COD_CORTO`   AS `COD_CORTO`,
       `B180`.`COD_LARGO`   AS `COD_LARGO`,
       `P`.`Producto`       AS `Producto`,
       `B180`.`BODEGA`      AS `BODEGA`,
       `B180`.`ESTATUS`     AS `B180_ESTATUS`,
       `P`.`ESTATUS`        AS `PESTATUS`,
       `B180`.`IVACOMPRA`   AS `IVACOMPRA`,
       `P`.`COD_IMP_COMPRA` AS `PIVACOMPRA`,
       `B180`.`IVAVENTAS`   AS `IVAVENTAS`,
       `P`.`COD_IMP_VENTA`  AS `PIVAVENTA`,
       `B180`.`GLCLASS`     AS `GLCLASS`,
       `P`.`Cod_GL_CLASS`   AS `PGL_CLASS`
FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`DAT_F4102_180MM_AGO` as `B180` JOIN `DAT_Bodegas_Sin_Resurtido` as `BOD`
       ON (`B180`.`BODEGA` = `BOD`.`Cod_Bodega`)) JOIN `DAT_Productos` as `P` ON (`P`.`Cod_Corto` = `B180`.`COD_CORTO`))
WHERE (((`P`.`ESTATUS` = 'S') OR (`P`.`ESTATUS` = 'U')) AND
       ((`P`.`COD_IMP_COMPRA` <> `B180`.`IVACOMPRA`) OR (`P`.`COD_IMP_VENTA` <> `B180`.`IVAVENTAS`)))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = DAT@`` view DAT_Inventario as
SELECT `Inventory`.`PARTNUMBER`      AS `PARTNUMBER`,
       `Inventory`.`ONHANDINVENTORY` AS `ONHANDINVENTORY`,
       MAX(`Inventory`.`DATE`)       AS `ULT_FECHA`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`Inventory` as `Inventory`
WHERE (`Inventory`.`ONHANDINVENTORY` > 0)
GROUP BY 1 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = DAT@`` view DAT_M4101 as

       `M`.`COD_2_PROD`       AS `COD_PRODUCTO`,

       `M`.`NOM_TIPO_PROD`    AS `TIPO_PRODUCTO`,
       `M`.`COD_TIPO_FAB`     AS `COD_TIPO_FAB`,
       `M`.`NOM_TIPO_FAB`     AS `TIPO_FABRICACION`,
       `M`.`COD_SEGMENTO`     AS `COD_SEGMENTO`,

       `M`.`NOM_TIPO_CONSUM`  AS `NOM_TIPO_CONSUM`,
       `M`.`COD_CALSIF_MCIA`  AS `COD_CALSIF_MCIA`,
       `M`.`NOM_CLASIF_MCIA`  AS `NOM_CLASIF_MCIA`,
       `M`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` AS `COD_SCLASIF_MCIA`,
       `M`.`NOM_SCLASIF_MCIA` AS `NOM_SCLASIF_MCIA`,
       `M`.`COD_TIPO_ART`     AS `COD_TIPO_ART`,

       `M`.`FACTOR_CAJA_REAL` AS `FACTOR_CAJA_REAL`,
       `M`.`FACTOR_PESO`      AS `FACTOR_PESO`,
       `M`.`BOD_PRINCIPAL`    AS `BOD_PRINCIPAL`,
       `M`.`NOM_PROD_MD`      AS `MTA`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `M`
WHERE (`M`.`COD_TIPO_ART` <> 'O')
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = DAT@`` view DAT_bodegas_items as
SELECT `b180`.`corto`      AS `corto`,
       `b180`.`CODIGO`     AS `CODIGO`,
       `b180`.`BODEGA`     AS `BODEGA`,
       `b180`.`IVA_COMPRA` AS `IVA_COMPRA`,
       `b180`.`IVA_VENTA`  AS `IVA_VENTA`,
       `li`.`Estatus`      AS `Estatus`,
       `li`.`IVA_C`        AS `IVA_C`,
       `li`.`IVA_V`        AS `IVA_V`
FROM ((`DAT_180MM_BODEG_ITEM` as `b180` JOIN `Bodegas_Principales` as `bp`
       ON (`b180`.`BODEGA` = `bp`.`Cod_Bodega`)) JOIN `DAT_iva_n_productos` as `li` ON (`b180`.`corto` = `li`.`corto`))
WHERE ((`li`.`IVA_C` <> `b180`.`IVA_COMPRA`) OR (`li`.`IVA_V` <> `b180`.`IVA_VENTA`))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = DAT@`` view DAT_estatus_Diferente as
SELECT `B180`.`COD_CORTO` AS `COD_CORTO`,
       `B180`.`COD_LARGO` AS `COD_LARGO`,
       `P`.`Producto`     AS `Producto`,
       `B180`.`BODEGA`    AS `BODEGA`,
       `B180`.`ESTATUS`   AS `B180_ESTATUS`,
       `P`.`ESTATUS`      AS `PESTATUS`,
       `P`.`NOM_FAMILIA`  AS `NOM_FAMILIA`
FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`DAT_F4102_180MM_AGO` as `B180` JOIN `DAT_Bodegas_Sin_Resurtido` as `BOD`
       ON (`B180`.`BODEGA` = `BOD`.`Cod_Bodega`)) JOIN `DAT_Productos` as `P` ON (`P`.`Cod_Corto` = `B180`.`COD_CORTO`))
WHERE (`P`.`ESTATUS` <> `B180`.`ESTATUS`)
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view DW_Efectividad_Venta_Mes as
SELECT `m`.`ruta`                                              AS `Ruta`,
       `r`.`Supervisor_Id`                                     AS `Supervisor_Id`,
       `r`.`Jefe_Regional_Id`                                  AS `Jefe_Regional_Id`,
       SUM(`m`.`venta_planificada`)                            AS `ClientesEfectivos`,
       SUM(`m`.`planificado`)                                  AS `Planificados`,
       (SUM(`m`.`venta_planificada`) / SUM(`m`.`planificado`)) AS `EfectividadMes`
FROM (`Comercial_Efectividad_Mes_Actual` as `m` LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r` ON (`m`.`ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`))
WHERE ((NOT ISNULL(`m`.`efectividad_venta`)) AND (`m`.`canal` IN ('MAY', 'COB', 'HOR', 'PAN')))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view DW_GESTION_VENTAS as
SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`fecha`            AS `fecha`,
                `SUB`.`canal`            AS `canal`,
                `SUB`.`agencia`          AS `agencia`,
                `SUB`.`ruta`             AS `ruta`,
                `SUB`.`id_ruta`          AS `id_ruta`,
                `SUB`.`id_dia`           AS `id_dia`,
                `SUB`.`id_cliente`       AS `id_cliente`,
                `SUB`.`id_status`        AS `id_status`,
                `SUB`.`latitud`          AS `latitud`,
                `SUB`.`longitud`         AS `longitud`,
                `SUB`.`latitud_visita`   AS `latitud_visita`,
                `SUB`.`longitud_visita`  AS `longitud_visita`,
                `SUB`.`planificado`      AS `planificado`,
                `SUB`.`visitado`         AS `visitado`,
                `SUB`.`distancia_metros` AS `distancia_metros`,
                `SUB`.`hora`             AS `hora`,
                `SUB`.`vendido`          AS `vendido`,
                `SUB`.`tipo_visita`      AS `tipo_visita`,
                `SUB`.`dolares`          AS `dolares`,
                `SUB`.`toneladas`        AS `toneladas`
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `r`.`fecha`                                                                                                  AS `fecha`,
                      `r`.`canal`                                                                                                  AS `canal`,
                      `r`.`agencia`                                                                                                AS `agencia`,
                      `r`.`ruta`                                                                                                   AS `ruta`,
                      `r`.`id_ruta`                                                                                                AS `id_ruta`,
                      `r`.`id_dia`                                                                                                 AS `id_dia`,
                      `r`.`id_cliente`                                                                                             AS `id_cliente`,
                      `r`.`id_status`                                                                                              AS `id_status`,
                      (`r`.`latitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                AS `latitud`,
                      (`r`.`longitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `longitud`,
                      (`r`.`latitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                         AS `latitud_visita`,
                      (`r`.`longitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                        AS `longitud_visita`,
                      (`r`.`planificado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                            AS `planificado`,
                      (`r`.`visitado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `visitado`,
                      (`r`.`distancia_metros`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                       AS `distancia_metros`,
                      (`r`.`hora`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                   AS `hora`,
                      (if((NOT ISNULL(`v`.`id_cliente`)), 1, 0)!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NOT NULL) AS `vendido`,
                      'Planificado'                                                                                                AS `tipo_visita`,
                      `v`.`dolares`                                                                                                AS `dolares`,
                      `v`.`toneladas`                                                                                              AS `toneladas`
      FROM (`vw_efv_rutas` as `r` LEFT JOIN `vw_efv_ventas` as `v`
            ON ((`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha`) AND (`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`)))
      UNION ALL
      (SELECT `v`.`fecha`      AS `fecha`,
              `v`.`canal`      AS `canal`,
              `v`.`agencia`    AS `agencia`,
              `v`.`ruta`       AS `ruta`,
              `v`.`id_ruta`    AS `id_ruta`,
              `v`.`id_dia`     AS `id_dia`,
              `v`.`id_cliente` AS `id_cliente`,
              `v`.`id_status`  AS `id_status`,
              ''               AS `latitud`,
              ''               AS `longitud`,
              ''               AS `latitud_visita`,
              ''               AS `longitud_visita`,
              ''               AS `planificado`,
              ''               AS `visitado`,
              ''               AS `distancia_metros`,
              ''               AS `hora`,
              '1'              AS `vendido`,
              'Fuera de Ruta'  AS `tipo_visita`,
              `v`.`dolares`    AS `dolares`,
              `v`.`toneladas`  AS `toneladas`
       FROM `vw_efv_ventas` as `v`
       WHERE (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 AS `1`
                         FROM `vw_efv_rutas` as `r`
                         WHERE ((`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`) AND (`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha`))
                         LIMIT 1)))) AS `SUB`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view DW_GESTION_VENTAS_CM as
SELECT `base`.`fecha`                                                                              AS `fecha`,
       `base`.`canal`                                                                              AS `canal`,
       `base`.`agencia`                                                                            AS `agencia`,
       `base`.`ruta`                                                                               AS `ruta`,
       `base`.`id_ruta`                                                                            AS `id_ruta`,
       `base`.`id_dia`                                                                             AS `id_dia`,
       `base`.`id_cliente`                                                                         AS `id_cliente`,
       `base`.`id_status`                                                                          AS `id_status`,
       `base`.`latitud`                                                                            AS `latitud`,
       `base`.`longitud`                                                                           AS `longitud`,
       `base`.`latitud_visita`                                                                     AS `latitud_visita`,
       `base`.`longitud_visita`                                                                    AS `longitud_visita`,
       `base`.`planificado`                                                                        AS `planificado`,
       `base`.`visitado`                                                                           AS `visitado`,
       `base`.`distancia_metros`                                                                   AS `distancia_metros`,
       `base`.`hora`                                                                               AS `hora`,
       `base`.`vendido`                                                                            AS `vendido`,
       `base`.`tipo_visita`                                                                        AS `tipo_visita`,
       `base`.`dolares`                                                                            AS `dolares`,
       `base`.`toneladas`                                                                          AS `toneladas`,
       CASE WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`base`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS `visita_efectiva`,
       CASE WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END         AS `venta_efectiva`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND (`base`.`distancia_metros` <= 50)) THEN 'En Rango'
           WHEN (`base`.`visitado` = 0) THEN 'No Visitado'
           WHEN ((`base`.`visitado` = 1) AND ((`base`.`distancia_metros` > 50) OR ISNULL(`base`.`distancia_metros`)))
               THEN 'Fuera de Rango'
           ELSE 'Sin Información' END                                                              AS `MarcacionGPS`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND (`base`.`dolares` < 0)) THEN 'Devolución'
           WHEN (`base`.`vendido` = 0) THEN 'Sin Venta'
           WHEN ((`base`.`planificado` = 1) AND (`base`.`vendido` = 1)) THEN 'Venta en Ruta'
           WHEN ((`base`.`vendido` = 1) AND ((`base`.`planificado` <> 1) OR ISNULL(`base`.`planificado`)))
               THEN 'Venta Fuera de Ruta'
           ELSE 'Sin Información' END                                                              AS `GestionVenta`
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`fecha`            AS `fecha`,
                      `SUB`.`canal`            AS `canal`,
                      `SUB`.`agencia`          AS `agencia`,
                      `SUB`.`ruta`             AS `ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`id_ruta`          AS `id_ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`id_dia`           AS `id_dia`,
                      `SUB`.`id_cliente`       AS `id_cliente`,
                      `SUB`.`id_status`        AS `id_status`,
                      `SUB`.`latitud`          AS `latitud`,
                      `SUB`.`longitud`         AS `longitud`,
                      `SUB`.`latitud_visita`   AS `latitud_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`longitud_visita`  AS `longitud_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`planificado`      AS `planificado`,
                      `SUB`.`visitado`         AS `visitado`,
                      `SUB`.`distancia_metros` AS `distancia_metros`,
                      `SUB`.`hora`             AS `hora`,
                      `SUB`.`vendido`          AS `vendido`,
                      `SUB`.`tipo_visita`      AS `tipo_visita`,
                      `SUB`.`dolares`          AS `dolares`,
                      `SUB`.`toneladas`        AS `toneladas`
      FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `r`.`fecha`                                                                                                  AS `fecha`,
                            `r`.`canal`                                                                                                  AS `canal`,
                            `r`.`agencia`                                                                                                AS `agencia`,
                            `r`.`ruta`                                                                                                   AS `ruta`,
                            `r`.`id_ruta`                                                                                                AS `id_ruta`,
                            `r`.`id_dia`                                                                                                 AS `id_dia`,
                            `r`.`id_cliente`                                                                                             AS `id_cliente`,
                            `r`.`id_status`                                                                                              AS `id_status`,
                            (`r`.`latitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                AS `latitud`,
                            (`r`.`longitud`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `longitud`,
                            (`r`.`latitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                         AS `latitud_visita`,
                            (`r`.`longitud_visita`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                        AS `longitud_visita`,
                            (`r`.`planificado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                            AS `planificado`,
                            (`r`.`visitado`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                               AS `visitado`,
                            (`r`.`distancia_metros`!:>varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                       AS `distancia_metros`,
                            (`r`.`hora`!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL)                                   AS `hora`,
                            (if((NOT ISNULL(`v`.`id_cliente`)), 1, 0)!:>varchar(21) CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NOT NULL) AS `vendido`,
                            'Planificado'                                                                                                AS `tipo_visita`,
                            `v`.`dolares`                                                                                                AS `dolares`,
                            `v`.`toneladas`                                                                                              AS `toneladas`
            FROM (`VW_EFV_RUTAS_CM` as `r` LEFT JOIN `VW_EFV_VENTAS_CM` as `v`
                  ON ((`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha_orden`) AND (`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`)))
            UNION ALL
            (SELECT DATE(`v`.`fecha_orden`) AS `fecha`,
                    `v`.`canal`             AS `canal`,
                    `v`.`agencia`           AS `agencia`,
                    `v`.`ruta`              AS `ruta`,
                    `v`.`id_ruta`           AS `id_ruta`,
                    `v`.`id_dia`            AS `id_dia`,
                    `v`.`id_cliente`        AS `id_cliente`,
                    `v`.`id_status`         AS `id_status`,
                    ''                      AS `latitud`,
                    ''                      AS `longitud`,
                    ''                      AS `latitud_visita`,
                    ''                      AS `longitud_visita`,
                    ''                      AS `planificado`,
                    ''                      AS `visitado`,
                    ''                      AS `distancia_metros`,
                    ''                      AS `hora`,
                    '1'                     AS `vendido`,
                    'Fuera de Ruta'         AS `tipo_visita`,
                    `v`.`dolares`           AS `dolares`,
                    `v`.`toneladas`         AS `toneladas`
             FROM `VW_EFV_VENTAS_CM` as `v`
             WHERE (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 AS `1`
                               FROM `VW_EFV_RUTAS_CM` as `r`
                               WHERE ((`r`.`id_cliente` = `v`.`id_cliente`) AND (`r`.`fecha` = `v`.`fecha_orden`))
                               LIMIT 1)))) AS `SUB`) AS `base`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view DW_Universo_Clientes_Mes as
SELECT `r`.`Anio` AS `Anio`, `r`.`Mes` AS `Mes`, `r`.`Ruta` AS `Ruta`, COUNT(*) AS `NumClientes`
FROM `DW_Rutero_Planificado` as `r`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view DW_VISITAS_GPS_CM as
SELECT `t1`.`ID`              AS `ID`,
       `t1`.`FECHA_INFO`      AS `FECHA_INFO`,
       `t1`.`LATITUD`         AS `LATITUD`,
       `t1`.`LONGITUD`        AS `LONGITUD`,
       `t1`.`CEDULA_O_RUC`    AS `CEDULA_O_RUC`,
       `t1`.`NOMBRE_CLIENTE`  AS `NOMBRE_CLIENTE`,
       `t1`.`AGENCIA`         AS `AGENCIA`,
       `t1`.`TIPO_CLIENTE`    AS `TIPO_CLIENTE`,
       `t1`.`SUBCANAL`        AS `SUBCANAL`,
       `t1`.`RUTA`            AS `RUTA`,
       `t1`.`SECUENCIA`       AS `SECUENCIA`,
       `t1`.`CALLE_1`         AS `CALLE_1`,
       `t1`.`CALLE_2`         AS `CALLE_2`,
       `t1`.`SECTOR`          AS `SECTOR`,
       `t1`.`TELEFONO`        AS `TELEFONO`,
       `t1`.`STATUS`          AS `STATUS`,
       `t1`.`TIPO_OFERTA`     AS `TIPO_OFERTA`,
       `t1`.`SALDO`           AS `SALDO`,
       `t1`.`TIPO_VISITA`     AS `TIPO_VISITA`,
       `t1`.`PLANEADO`        AS `PLANEADO`,
       `t1`.`LATITUD_VISITA`  AS `LATITUD_VISITA`,
       `t1`.`LONGITUD_VISITA` AS `LONGITUD_VISITA`,
       `t1`.`HORA`            AS `HORA`,
       `t1`.`VISITADO`        AS `VISITADO`,
       `t1`.`ETL_TSTAMP`      AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`GEO_VISITA_TAT` as `t1`
WHERE ((YEAR(`t1`.`FECHA_INFO`) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY))) AND
       (MONTH(`t1`.`FECHA_INFO`) = (MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) - 1)))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view DW_Visitas_GPS as
SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`ID`              AS `ID`,
                `SUB`.`FECHA_INFO`      AS `FECHA_INFO`,
                `SUB`.`LATITUD`         AS `LATITUD`,
                `SUB`.`LONGITUD`        AS `LONGITUD`,
                `SUB`.`CEDULA_O_RUC`    AS `CEDULA_O_RUC`,
                `SUB`.`NOMBRE_CLIENTE`  AS `NOMBRE_CLIENTE`,
                `SUB`.`AGENCIA`         AS `AGENCIA`,
                `SUB`.`TIPO_CLIENTE`    AS `TIPO_CLIENTE`,
                `SUB`.`SUBCANAL`        AS `SUBCANAL`,
                `SUB`.`RUTA`            AS `RUTA`,
                `SUB`.`SECUENCIA`       AS `SECUENCIA`,
                `SUB`.`CALLE_1`         AS `CALLE_1`,
                `SUB`.`CALLE_2`         AS `CALLE_2`,
                `SUB`.`SECTOR`          AS `SECTOR`,
                `SUB`.`TELEFONO`        AS `TELEFONO`,
                `SUB`.`STATUS`          AS `STATUS`,
                `SUB`.`TIPO_OFERTA`     AS `TIPO_OFERTA`,
                `SUB`.`SALDO`           AS `SALDO`,
                `SUB`.`TIPO_VISITA`     AS `TIPO_VISITA`,
                `SUB`.`PLANEADO`        AS `PLANEADO`,
                `SUB`.`LATITUD_VISITA`  AS `LATITUD_VISITA`,
                `SUB`.`LONGITUD_VISITA` AS `LONGITUD_VISITA`,
                `SUB`.`HORA`            AS `HORA`,
                `SUB`.`VISITADO`        AS `VISITADO`,
                `SUB`.`ETL_TSTAMP`      AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
FROM (SELECT `t1`.`ID`              AS `ID`,
             `t1`.`FECHA_INFO`      AS `FECHA_INFO`,
             `t1`.`LATITUD`         AS `LATITUD`,
             `t1`.`LONGITUD`        AS `LONGITUD`,
             `t1`.`CEDULA_O_RUC`    AS `CEDULA_O_RUC`,
             `t1`.`NOMBRE_CLIENTE`  AS `NOMBRE_CLIENTE`,
             `t1`.`AGENCIA`         AS `AGENCIA`,
             `t1`.`TIPO_CLIENTE`    AS `TIPO_CLIENTE`,
             `t1`.`SUBCANAL`        AS `SUBCANAL`,
             `t1`.`RUTA`            AS `RUTA`,
             `t1`.`SECUENCIA`       AS `SECUENCIA`,
             `t1`.`CALLE_1`         AS `CALLE_1`,
             `t1`.`CALLE_2`         AS `CALLE_2`,
             `t1`.`SECTOR`          AS `SECTOR`,
             `t1`.`TELEFONO`        AS `TELEFONO`,
             `t1`.`STATUS`          AS `STATUS`,
             `t1`.`TIPO_OFERTA`     AS `TIPO_OFERTA`,
             `t1`.`SALDO`           AS `SALDO`,
             `t1`.`TIPO_VISITA`     AS `TIPO_VISITA`,
             `t1`.`PLANEADO`        AS `PLANEADO`,
             `t1`.`LATITUD_VISITA`  AS `LATITUD_VISITA`,
             `t1`.`LONGITUD_VISITA` AS `LONGITUD_VISITA`,
             `t1`.`HORA`            AS `HORA`,
             `t1`.`VISITADO`        AS `VISITADO`,
             `t1`.`ETL_TSTAMP`      AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
      FROM `DDM_ERP`.`GEO_VISITA_TAT` as `t1`
      WHERE (`t1`.`HORA` = (SELECT MIN(`t2`.`HORA`) AS `min(t2.hora)`
                            FROM `DDM_ERP`.`GEO_VISITA_TAT` as `t2`
                            WHERE ((`t1`.`FECHA_INFO` = `t2`.`FECHA_INFO`) AND (`t1`.`ID` = `t2`.`ID`))))
      UNION ALL
      (SELECT `t1`.`ID`              AS `ID`,
              `t1`.`FECHA_INFO`      AS `FECHA_INFO`,
              `t1`.`LATITUD`         AS `LATITUD`,
              `t1`.`LONGITUD`        AS `LONGITUD`,
              `t1`.`CEDULA_O_RUC`    AS `CEDULA_O_RUC`,
              `t1`.`NOMBRE_CLIENTE`  AS `NOMBRE_CLIENTE`,
              `t1`.`AGENCIA`         AS `AGENCIA`,
              `t1`.`TIPO_CLIENTE`    AS `TIPO_CLIENTE`,
              `t1`.`SUBCANAL`        AS `SUBCANAL`,
              `t1`.`RUTA`            AS `RUTA`,
              `t1`.`SECUENCIA`       AS `SECUENCIA`,
              `t1`.`CALLE_1`         AS `CALLE_1`,
              `t1`.`CALLE_2`         AS `CALLE_2`,
              `t1`.`SECTOR`          AS `SECTOR`,
              `t1`.`TELEFONO`        AS `TELEFONO`,
              `t1`.`STATUS`          AS `STATUS`,
              `t1`.`TIPO_OFERTA`     AS `TIPO_OFERTA`,
              `t1`.`SALDO`           AS `SALDO`,
              `t1`.`TIPO_VISITA`     AS `TIPO_VISITA`,
              `t1`.`PLANEADO`        AS `PLANEADO`,
              `t1`.`LATITUD_VISITA`  AS `LATITUD_VISITA`,
              `t1`.`LONGITUD_VISITA` AS `LONGITUD_VISITA`,
              `t1`.`HORA`            AS `HORA`,
              `t1`.`VISITADO`        AS `VISITADO`,
              `t1`.`ETL_TSTAMP`      AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
       FROM `DDM_ERP`.`GEO_VISITA_TAT` as `t1`
       WHERE ISNULL(`t1`.`HORA`))) AS `SUB`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Inventario_Actual as
SELECT DATE(`i`.`Fecha`)                                                                     AS `fecha`,
       `i`.`cod_producto`                                                                    AS `Id_Producto`,
       `i`.`cod_ubicacion`                                                                   AS `Cod_Ubicacion`,
       REPLACE(REPLACE(`i`.`nom_location`, 'BODEGA PRODUCTO TERMINADO ', ''), 'BODEGA ', '') AS `Nombre_Ubicacion`,
       `p`.`segmento`                                                                        AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       `p`.`nombre_familia`                                                                  AS `Nombre_Familia`,
       `i`.`cant_cjs_rls`                                                                    AS `Cajas_reales`,
       `i`.`cantidad_ton`                                                                    AS `Toneladas`
FROM (`VW_Inventarios` as `i` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p` ON (`i`.`cod_producto` = `p`.`id_producto`))
WHERE ((`i`.`Fecha` =
        (SELECT MAX(`VW_Inventarios`.`Fecha`) AS `MAX(fecha)` FROM `VW_Inventarios` as `VW_Inventarios`)) AND
       (`i`.`cod_ubicacion` NOT IN ('ENV101', 'ENS101', 'FAB101', 'BPG101', 'REP101', 'MPR101', 'MAQ101')))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Inventario_Cobertura as
SELECT `i`.`fecha`                                                                AS `fecha`,
       `i`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                                       AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       `i`.`Id_Producto`                                                          AS `Id_Producto`,
       `i`.`Nombre_Familia`                                                       AS `Nombre_Familia`,
       `v`.`Total_Toneladas`                                                      AS `Total_Toneladas`,
       `v`.`Dias_Con_Venta`                                                       AS `Dias_Con_Venta`,
       SUM(`i`.`Toneladas`)                                                       AS `Inventario_Toneladas`,
       `v`.`Promedio_Toneladas_Dia`                                               AS `Promedio_Toneladas_Dia`,
       ROUND((SUM(`i`.`Toneladas`) / nullif(`v`.`Promedio_Toneladas_Dia`, 0)), 1) AS `Dias_Cobertura`
FROM ((SELECT DATE(`i`.`Fecha`)    AS `fecha`,
              `i`.`cod_producto`   AS `Id_Producto`,
              `p`.`segmento`       AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
              `p`.`nombre_familia` AS `Nombre_Familia`,
              `i`.`cant_cjs_rls`   AS `Cajas_reales`,
              `i`.`cantidad_ton`   AS `Toneladas`
       FROM (`VW_Inventarios` as `i` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p` ON (`i`.`cod_producto` = `p`.`id_producto`))
       WHERE ((`i`.`Fecha` =
               (SELECT MAX(`VW_Inventarios`.`Fecha`) AS `MAX(Fecha)` FROM `VW_Inventarios` as `VW_Inventarios`)) AND
              (`i`.`cod_location` NOT IN ('ENV101', 'ENS101', 'FAB101', 'BPG101', 'REP101', 'MPR101',
                                          'MAQ101')))) AS `i` LEFT JOIN `Comercial_Venta_Promedio_Diario` as `v`
      ON (`i`.`Id_Producto` = `v`.`Id_Producto`))
GROUP BY 1, 4, 3, 5, 6, 2, 8
ORDER BY 2, 9 DESC
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Inventario_Cobertura_Mes as
SELECT `i`.`fecha`                                                               AS `fecha`,
       `i`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                                      AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       `i`.`Id_Producto`                                                         AS `Id_Producto`,
       `i`.`Nombre_Familia`                                                      AS `Nombre_Familia`,
       `v`.`Toneladas`                                                           AS `Toneladas`,
       SUM(`i`.`Toneladas`)                                                      AS `Inventario_Toneladas`,
       (SUM(`v`.`Toneladas`) / 30)                                               AS `Promedio_Toneladas_Dia`,
       ROUND((SUM(`i`.`Toneladas`) / nullif((SUM(`v`.`Toneladas`) / 30), 0)), 1) AS `Dias_Cobertura`
FROM ((SELECT DATE(`i`.`Fecha`)    AS `fecha`,
              `i`.`cod_producto`   AS `Id_Producto`,
              `p`.`segmento`       AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
              `p`.`nombre_familia` AS `Nombre_Familia`,
              `i`.`cant_cjs_rls`   AS `Cajas_reales`,
              `i`.`cantidad_ton`   AS `Toneladas`
       FROM (`VW_Inventarios` as `i` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p` ON (`i`.`cod_producto` = `p`.`id_producto`))
       WHERE ((`i`.`Fecha` =
               (SELECT MAX(`VW_Inventarios`.`Fecha`) AS `MAX(Fecha)` FROM `VW_Inventarios` as `VW_Inventarios`)) AND
              (`i`.`cod_location` NOT IN ('ENV101', 'ENS101', 'FAB101', 'BPG101', 'REP101', 'MPR101',
                                          'MAQ101')))) AS `i` LEFT JOIN `Comercial_Venta_Promedio_Diaria` as `v`
      ON (`i`.`Id_Producto` = `v`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
GROUP BY 1, 4, 3, 5, 2
ORDER BY 2, 8 DESC
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Inventario_Historico as
SELECT DATE(`i`.`Fecha`)                                                                     AS `fecha`,
       `i`.`cod_producto`                                                                    AS `Id_Producto`,
       `i`.`cod_ubicacion`                                                                   AS `Cod_Ubicacion`,
       REPLACE(REPLACE(`i`.`nom_location`, 'BODEGA PRODUCTO TERMINADO ', ''), 'BODEGA ', '') AS `Nombre_Ubicacion`,
       `p`.`segmento`                                                                        AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       `p`.`nombre_familia`                                                                  AS `Nombre_Familia`,
       `i`.`cant_cjs_rls`                                                                    AS `Cajas_reales`,
       `i`.`cantidad_ton`                                                                    AS `Toneladas`
FROM (`VW_Inventarios` as `i` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p` ON (`i`.`cod_producto` = `p`.`id_producto`))
WHERE ((`i`.`Fecha` BETWEEN (SELECT DATE_SUB(MAX(`VW_Inventarios`.`Fecha`), INTERVAL 120 DAY) AS `DATE_SUB(MAX(fecha), INTERVAL 120 DAY)`
                             FROM `VW_Inventarios` as `VW_Inventarios`) AND (SELECT MAX(`VW_Inventarios`.`Fecha`) AS `MAX(fecha)`
                                                                             FROM `VW_Inventarios` as `VW_Inventarios`)) AND
       (`i`.`cod_ubicacion` NOT IN ('ENV101', 'ENS101', 'FAB101', 'BPG101', 'REP101', 'MPR101', 'MAQ101')))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Materias_Primas as
SELECT `FAC_COSTOS_MATPRIMA`.`ID_PRODUCTO` AS `Id_Producto`,
       `FAC_COSTOS_MATPRIMA`.`CUINVEN`     AS `Costo_Ton_Inv`,
       `FAC_COSTOS_MATPRIMA`.`CEMP`        AS `Costo_Ton_Consumida`,
       `FAC_COSTOS_MATPRIMA`.`MPTONCON`    AS `Ton_Consumida`,
       `FAC_COSTOS_MATPRIMA`.`MPTONINV`    AS `Ton_Inv`,
       `FAC_COSTOS_MATPRIMA`.`FECACT`      AS `Fecha_Actualizacion`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_COSTOS_MATPRIMA` as `FAC_COSTOS_MATPRIMA`;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Mercadeo_PyG_Un_Negocio as
SELECT `Mercadeo_Inversion`.`anio`                                                                                    AS `anio`,
       `Mercadeo_Inversion`.`mes`                                                                                     AS `mes`,
       `Mercadeo_Inversion`.`Segmento`                                                                                AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       CONCAT(`Mercadeo_Inversion`.`anio`, LPAD(`Mercadeo_Inversion`.`mes`, 2, '0'),
              `Mercadeo_Inversion`.`Segmento`)                                                                        AS `Id`,
       SUM(`Mercadeo_Inversion`.`Gasto`)                                                                              AS `Gasto_Mercadeo`
FROM `Mercadeo_Inversion` as `Mercadeo_Inversion`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Ppto_Pyl as
SELECT `DW_Presupuesto_Ventas`.`Anio`              AS `Anio`,
       `DW_Presupuesto_Ventas`.`Mes`               AS `Mes`,
       `DW_Presupuesto_Ventas`.`Cod_UnidadNegocio` AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       SUM(`DW_Presupuesto_Ventas`.`Toneladas`)    AS `Ppto_Ton`,
       SUM(`DW_Presupuesto_Ventas`.`Facturacion`)  AS `Ppto_Dolares`,
       SUM(`DW_Presupuesto_Ventas`.`Margen`)       AS `Ppto_Margen`
FROM `DW_Presupuesto_Ventas` as `DW_Presupuesto_Ventas`
WHERE (`DW_Presupuesto_Ventas`.`Anio` >= 2025)
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Productos_Rentabilidad as
SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                   AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                  AS `Mes_Numero`,
       DATE_FORMAT(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`, '%Y-%m-01')                                AS `mes`,
       `f`.`DATE_CONTA`                                                         AS `Fecha`,
       `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                         AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
       `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`                                                        AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
       `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                                        AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
       `p`.`NOM_ESTATUS`                                                        AS `NOM_ESTATUS`,
       SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))                            AS `toneladas`,
       SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                                             AS `facturacion`,
       SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                                        AS `margen`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0)) - SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`MARGEN`, 0))) AS `costo_produccion`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`USD_NOTA_CRED`, 0)) / 1000) * -1)                      AS `dev_usd`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`DEV_KG`, 0)) / 1000) * -1)                             AS `dev_ton`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0))                                     AS `dev_un`,
       MAX(DATE(`f`.`ETL_TSTAMP`))                                              AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
       ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
      ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024, 2025, 2026)) AND
       (`f`.`DATE_CONTA` BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 6 MONTH),
                                             '%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH))) AND
       (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL')) AND
       (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `c`.`COD_CANAL`, 5, 6, 7 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Productos_Rentabilidad_12 as
SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                   AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                  AS `Mes_Numero`,
       DATE_FORMAT(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`, '%Y-%m-01')                                AS `mes`,
       `f`.`DATE_CONTA`                                                         AS `Fecha`,
       `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                         AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
       `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`                                                        AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
       `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                                        AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
       `p`.`NOM_ESTATUS`                                                        AS `NOM_ESTATUS`,
       SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))                            AS `toneladas`,
       SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                                             AS `facturacion`,
       SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                                        AS `margen`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0)) - SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`MARGEN`, 0))) AS `costo_produccion`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`USD_NOTA_CRED`, 0)) / 1000) * -1)                      AS `dev_usd`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`DEV_KG`, 0)) / 1000) * -1)                             AS `dev_ton`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0))                                     AS `dev_un`,
       MAX(DATE(`f`.`ETL_TSTAMP`))                                              AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
       ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
      ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024, 2025, 2026)) AND
       (`f`.`DATE_CONTA` BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 12 MONTH),
                                             '%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH))) AND
       (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL')) AND
       (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `c`.`COD_CANAL`, 5, 6, 7 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Productos_Rentabilidad_24 as
SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                   AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                  AS `Mes_Numero`,
       DATE_FORMAT(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`, '%Y-%m-01')                                AS `mes`,
       `f`.`DATE_CONTA`                                                         AS `Fecha`,
       `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                         AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
       `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`                                                        AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
       `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                                        AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
       `p`.`NOM_ESTATUS`                                                        AS `NOM_ESTATUS`,
       SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))                            AS `toneladas`,
       SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                                             AS `facturacion`,
       SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                                        AS `margen`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0)) - SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`MARGEN`, 0))) AS `costo_produccion`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`USD_NOTA_CRED`, 0)) / 1000) * -1)                      AS `dev_usd`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`DEV_KG`, 0)) / 1000) * -1)                             AS `dev_ton`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0))                                     AS `dev_un`,
       MAX(DATE(`f`.`ETL_TSTAMP`))                                              AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
       ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
      ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024, 2025, 2026)) AND
       (`f`.`DATE_CONTA` BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 24 MONTH),
                                             '%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH))) AND
       (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL')) AND
       (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `c`.`COD_CANAL`, 5, 6, 7 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Productos_Rentabilidad_36 as
SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                   AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                  AS `Mes_Numero`,
       DATE_FORMAT(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`, '%Y-%m-01')                                AS `mes`,
       `f`.`DATE_CONTA`                                                         AS `Fecha`,
       `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                         AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
       `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`                                                        AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
       `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                                        AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
       `p`.`NOM_ESTATUS`                                                        AS `NOM_ESTATUS`,
       SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))                            AS `toneladas`,
       SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                                             AS `facturacion`,
       SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                                        AS `margen`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0)) - SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`MARGEN`, 0))) AS `costo_produccion`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`USD_NOTA_CRED`, 0)) / 1000) * -1)                      AS `dev_usd`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`DEV_KG`, 0)) / 1000) * -1)                             AS `dev_ton`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0))                                     AS `dev_un`,
       MAX(DATE(`f`.`ETL_TSTAMP`))                                              AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
       ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
      ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024, 2025, 2026)) AND
       (`f`.`DATE_CONTA` BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 24 MONTH),
                                             '%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH))) AND
       (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL')) AND
       (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `c`.`COD_CANAL`, 5, 6, 7 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Pyg_CANAL as
SELECT `p`.`Anio`                                                                                                                                 AS `Anio`,
       `p`.`Mes`                                                                                                                                  AS `Mes`,
       `p`.`Tipo_Venta`                                                                                                                           AS `Tipo_Venta`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`p`.`Unidad_Negocio` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ'
           ELSE `p`.`Id_Canal` END                                                                                                                AS `Id_Canal`,
       `p`.`Id_Producto`                                                                                                                          AS `Id_Producto`,
       `p`.`Nombre_Producto`                                                                                                                      AS `Nombre_Producto`,
       `p`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                                                                                                       AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       `pp`.`marca`                                                                                                                               AS `marca`,
       `pp`.`nombre_familia`                                                                                                                      AS `Familia`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Tons`, 0)                                                                                                                    AS `Tons`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Facturacion`, 0)                                                                                                             AS `Facturacion`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Margen`, 0)                                                                                                                  AS `Margen`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Costo_de_Venta`, 0)                                                                                                          AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
       `p`.`Costo_Empaques`                                                                                                                       AS `Costo_Empaques`,
       `p`.`Costo_Grasas`                                                                                                                         AS `Costo_Grasas`,
       `p`.`Costo_Insumos`                                                                                                                        AS `Costo_Insumos`,
       `p`.`Costo_Otros`                                                                                                                          AS `Costo_Otros`,
       `p`.`Ajuste_Otros`                                                                                                                         AS `Ajuste_Mano_Obra_Indirecta`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`p`.`Costo_Grasas` = 0) THEN 0
           ELSE ((`mp`.`Importe_MP` / `t`.`Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`) * `p`.`Tons`) END                                                               AS `Ajuste_Refinacion`,
       ((`p`.`Margen` + `p`.`Ajuste_Otros`) + CASE
                                                  WHEN (`p`.`Costo_Grasas` = 0) THEN 0
                                                  ELSE ((`mp`.`Importe_MP` / `t`.`Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`) * `p`.`Tons`) END)                       AS `Margen_Ajustado`,
       (`p`.`Facturacion` - ((`p`.`Margen` + `p`.`Ajuste_Otros`) + CASE
                                                                       WHEN (`p`.`Costo_Grasas` = 0) THEN 0
                                                                       ELSE ((`mp`.`Importe_MP` / `t`.`Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`) * `p`.`Tons`) END)) AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ajustado`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`p`.`Tons` = 0) THEN 0
           ELSE ((`p`.`Facturacion` - ((`p`.`Margen` + `p`.`Ajuste_Otros`) + CASE
                                                                                 WHEN (`p`.`Costo_Grasas` = 0) THEN 0
                                                                                 ELSE ((`mp`.`Importe_MP` / `t`.`Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`) * `p`.`Tons`) END)) /
                 `p`.`Tons`) END                                                                                                                  AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ajustado_Ton`,
       `mp`.`Importe_MP`                                                                                                                          AS `Importe_MP`,
       `t`.`Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`                                                                                                                 AS `Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`
FROM ((((SELECT `ventas_local`.`Anio`                      AS `Anio`,
                `ventas_local`.`Mes`                       AS `Mes`,
                `ventas_local`.`Id_Canal`                  AS `Id_Canal`,
                `ventas_local`.`Id_Producto`               AS `Id_Producto`,
                `ventas_local`.`Nombre_Producto`           AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                `ventas_local`.`Unidad_Negocio`            AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                `ventas_local`.`Tons`                      AS `Tons`,
                `ventas_local`.`Kilos`                     AS `Kilos`,
                `ventas_local`.`Facturacion`               AS `Facturacion`,
                `ventas_local`.`Margen`                    AS `Margen`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta`            AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`        AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                `ventas_local`.`Kilos_Conta`               AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Conta`      AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta` AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                `ventas_local`.`Margen_Estimado_Conta`     AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Empaques_Ton`        AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Grasas_Ton`          AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Insumos_Ton`         AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Otros_Ton`           AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Empaques`            AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Grasas`              AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Insumos`             AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Otros`               AS `Costo_Otros`,
                `ventas_local`.`Ajuste_Otros`              AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                `ventas_local`.`Tipo_Venta`                AS `Tipo_Venta`
         FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`                                                   AS `Anio`,
                      `v`.`Mes`                                                    AS `Mes`,
                      `v`.`Id_Canal`                                               AS `Id_Canal`,
                      `v`.`Id_Producto`                                            AS `Id_Producto`,
                      `v`.`Nombre_Producto`                                        AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                      `v`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                         AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                      `v`.`Tons`                                                   AS `Tons`,
                      `v`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos`,
                      `v`.`Facturacion`                                            AS `Facturacion`,
                      `v`.`Margen`                                                 AS `Margen`,
                      `v`.`Costo_de_Venta`                                         AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                      `v`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`                                     AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                      `c`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                      `c`.`Costo`                                                  AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                      `c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo`                                       AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                      (`v`.`Facturacion` - (`c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo` * `v`.`Kilos`)) AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                      COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Empaques`, 0)                            AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                      COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Grasas`, 0)                              AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                      COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Insumos`, 0)                             AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                      COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Otros`, 0)                               AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                      COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Empaques` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)             AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                      COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Grasas` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)               AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                      COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Insumos` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)              AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                      COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)                AS `Costo_Otros`,
                      CASE
                          WHEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) > 0)
                              THEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) * .36)
                          ELSE 0 END                                               AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                      'Local'                                                      AS `Tipo_Venta`
               FROM ((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                             AS `Anio`,
                             MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                            AS `Mes`,
                             `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                    AS `Id_Canal`,
                             `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                  AS `Id_Producto`,
                             `p`.`nombre_producto`                              AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                             `p`.`segmento`                                     AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                             SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))      AS `Tons`,
                             SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))               AS `Kilos`,
                             SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                       AS `Facturacion`,
                             SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                  AS `Margen`,
                             (SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                             ((SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) /
                              SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)))    AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`
                      FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                             ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                            ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                      WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                             (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL', 'OFI')) AND (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101') AND
                             (`p`.`segmento` NOT IN ('EXP')))
                      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 6, 4, 5) AS `v` LEFT JOIN (SELECT YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`)       AS `Anio`,
                                                                          MONTH(`m`.`FECHA`)      AS `Mes`,
                                                                          `p`.`segmento`          AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                          `m`.`CODITEM`           AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`KILOS`)        AS `Kilos`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`COSTO`)        AS `Costo`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`COSTOXKILO`)   AS `Costo_Venta_Kilo`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`CPEMPAQUETON`) AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`CPGRASASTON`)  AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`CPINSUMOSTON`) AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`CPOTROSTON`)   AS `Costo_Otros`
                                                                   FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_COSTO_MARGEN` as `m` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                         ON (`m`.`CODITEM` = `p`.`id_producto`))
                                                                   WHERE ((YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`) = 2025) AND (`m`.`CANAL` = 'LOC'))
                                                                   GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `c`
                     ON ((`v`.`Anio` = `c`.`Anio`) AND (`v`.`Mes` = `c`.`Mes`) AND
                         (`v`.`Id_Producto` = `c`.`Id_Producto`)))) AS `ventas_local`
         UNION ALL
         (SELECT `ventas_exp`.`Anio`                      AS `Anio`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Mes`                       AS `Mes`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Id_Canal`                  AS `Id_Canal`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Id_Producto`               AS `Id_Producto`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Nombre_Producto`           AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Unidad_Negocio`            AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Tons`                      AS `Tons`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Kilos`                     AS `Kilos`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Facturacion`               AS `Facturacion`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Margen`                    AS `Margen`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta`            AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`        AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Kilos_Conta`               AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Conta`      AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta` AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Margen_Estimado_Conta`     AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Empaques_Ton`        AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Grasas_Ton`          AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Insumos_Ton`         AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Otros_Ton`           AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Empaques`            AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Grasas`              AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Insumos`             AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Otros`               AS `Costo_Otros`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Ajuste_Otros`              AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Tipo_Venta`                AS `Tipo_Venta`
          FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`                                                   AS `Anio`,
                       `v`.`Mes`                                                    AS `Mes`,
                       `v`.`Id_Canal`                                               AS `Id_Canal`,
                       `v`.`Id_Producto`                                            AS `Id_Producto`,
                       `v`.`Nombre_Producto`                                        AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                       `v`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                         AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                       `v`.`Tons`                                                   AS `Tons`,
                       `v`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos`,
                       `v`.`Facturacion`                                            AS `Facturacion`,
                       `v`.`Margen`                                                 AS `Margen`,
                       `v`.`Costo_de_Venta`                                         AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                       `v`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`                                     AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                       `c`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                       `c`.`Costo`                                                  AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                       `c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo`                                       AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                       (`v`.`Facturacion` - (`c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo` * `v`.`Kilos`)) AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                       COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Empaques`, 0)                            AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                       COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Grasas`, 0)                              AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                       COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Insumos`, 0)                             AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                       COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Otros`, 0)                               AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                       COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Empaques` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)             AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                       COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Grasas` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)               AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                       COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Insumos` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)              AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                       COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)                AS `Costo_Otros`,
                       CASE
                           WHEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) > 0)
                               THEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) * .36)
                           ELSE 0 END                                               AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                       'Exportacion'                                                AS `Tipo_Venta`
                FROM ((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                             AS `Anio`,
                              MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                            AS `Mes`,
                              `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                    AS `Id_Canal`,
                              `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                  AS `Id_Producto`,
                              `p`.`nombre_producto`                              AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                              `p`.`segmento`                                     AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                              SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))      AS `Tons`,
                              SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))               AS `Kilos`,
                              SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                       AS `Facturacion`,
                              SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                  AS `Margen`,
                              (SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                              ((SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) /
                               SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)))    AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`
                       FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                              ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                             ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
