                       WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                              (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL')) AND (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101') AND
                              (`p`.`segmento` IN ('EXP')))
                       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 6, 4, 5) AS `v` LEFT JOIN (SELECT YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`)       AS `Anio`,
                                                                           MONTH(`m`.`FECHA`)      AS `Mes`,
                                                                           `p`.`segmento`          AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                           `m`.`CODITEM`           AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                           SUM(`m`.`KILOS`)        AS `Kilos`,
                                                                           SUM(`m`.`COSTO`)        AS `Costo`,
                                                                           SUM(`m`.`COSTOXKILO`)   AS `Costo_Venta_Kilo`,
                                                                           SUM(`m`.`CPEMPAQUETON`) AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                           SUM(`m`.`CPGRASASTON`)  AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                           SUM(`m`.`CPINSUMOSTON`) AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                           SUM(`m`.`CPOTROSTON`)   AS `Costo_Otros`
                                                                    FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_COSTO_MARGEN` as `m` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                          ON (`m`.`CODITEM` = `p`.`id_producto`))
                                                                    WHERE ((YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`) = 2025) AND (`m`.`CANAL` = 'EXP'))
                                                                    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `c`
                      ON ((`v`.`Anio` = `c`.`Anio`) AND (`v`.`Mes` = `c`.`Mes`) AND
                          (`v`.`Id_Producto` = `c`.`Id_Producto`)))) AS `ventas_exp`)) AS `p` LEFT JOIN (SELECT `Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Anio`         AS `anio`,
                                                                                                                `Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Mes`          AS `mes`,
                                                                                                                SUM(`Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Importe`) AS `Importe_MP`
                                                                                                         FROM `Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio` as `Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`
                                                                                                         WHERE ((`Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Categoria_28` =
                                                                                                                 'COSTO DE PRODUCCION           ') AND
                                                                                                                (`Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Anio` = 2025) AND
                                                                                                                (`Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Categoria_29` = 'CIF') AND
                                                                                                                (`Comercial_Resultados_Ejercicio`.`Categoria_30` IN
                                                                                                                 ('MANTENIMIENTO                 ',
                                                                                                                  'DETERIORO - OBSOLESCENCIA     ',
                                                                                                                  'DEPRECIACION                  ',
                                                                                                                  'FLETES                        ',
                                                                                                                  'OTROS                         ')))
                                                                                                         GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `mp`
        ON ((`p`.`Anio` = `mp`.`anio`) AND (`p`.`Mes` = `mp`.`mes`))) LEFT JOIN (SELECT `proffits_losses`.`Anio` AS `Anio`,
                                                                                        `proffits_losses`.`Mes`  AS `Mes`,
                                                                                        SUM(CASE
                                                                                                WHEN (`proffits_losses`.`Costo_Grasas` > 0)
                                                                                                    THEN `proffits_losses`.`Tons`
                                                                                                ELSE 0 END)      AS `Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`
                                                                                 FROM (SELECT `ventas_local`.`Anio`                      AS `Anio`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Mes`                       AS `Mes`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Id_Canal`                  AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Id_Producto`               AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Nombre_Producto`           AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Unidad_Negocio`            AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Tons`                      AS `Tons`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Kilos`                     AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Facturacion`               AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Margen`                    AS `Margen`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta`            AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`        AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Kilos_Conta`               AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Conta`      AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta` AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Margen_Estimado_Conta`     AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Empaques_Ton`        AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Grasas_Ton`          AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Insumos_Ton`         AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Otros_Ton`           AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Empaques`            AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Grasas`              AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Insumos`             AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Costo_Otros`               AS `Costo_Otros`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Ajuste_Otros`              AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                                                                                              `ventas_local`.`Tipo_Venta`                AS `Tipo_Venta`
                                                                                       FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`                                                   AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Mes`                                                    AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Id_Canal`                                               AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Id_Producto`                                            AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Nombre_Producto`                                        AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                         AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Tons`                                                   AS `Tons`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Facturacion`                                            AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Margen`                                                 AS `Margen`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Costo_de_Venta`                                         AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                                    `v`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`                                     AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                                                                                                    `c`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                                                                                                    `c`.`Costo`                                                  AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                                                                                                    `c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo`                                       AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                                                                                                    (`v`.`Facturacion` - (`c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo` * `v`.`Kilos`)) AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Empaques`, 0)                            AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Grasas`, 0)                              AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Insumos`, 0)                             AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Otros`, 0)                               AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Empaques` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)             AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Grasas` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)               AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Insumos` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)              AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                                    COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)                AS `Costo_Otros`,
                                                                                                    CASE
                                                                                                        WHEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) > 0)
                                                                                                            THEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) * .36)
                                                                                                        ELSE 0 END                                               AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                                                                                                    'Local'                                                      AS `Tipo_Venta`
                                                                                             FROM ((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                             AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                           MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                            AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                           `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                    AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                                           `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                  AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                           `p`.`nombre_producto`                              AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                                           `p`.`segmento`                                     AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                           SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))      AS `Tons`,
                                                                                                           SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))               AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                           SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                       AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                                           SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                  AS `Margen`,
                                                                                                           (SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                                           ((SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) /
                                                                                                            SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)))    AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`
                                                                                                    FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                                                           ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                                                          ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                                                                                                    WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                                                                           (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                                                                                                           (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL', 'OFI')) AND
                                                                                                           (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101') AND
                                                                                                           (`p`.`segmento` NOT IN ('EXP')))
                                                                                                    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 6, 4, 5) AS `v` LEFT JOIN (SELECT YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`)       AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                                                                        MONTH(`m`.`FECHA`)      AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                                                                        `p`.`segmento`          AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                                                                        `m`.`CODITEM`           AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`KILOS`)        AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`COSTO`)        AS `Costo`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`COSTOXKILO`)   AS `Costo_Venta_Kilo`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`CPEMPAQUETON`) AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`CPGRASASTON`)  AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`CPINSUMOSTON`) AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                                                                                        SUM(`m`.`CPOTROSTON`)   AS `Costo_Otros`
                                                                                                                                                 FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_COSTO_MARGEN` as `m` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                                                                                                       ON (`m`.`CODITEM` = `p`.`id_producto`))
                                                                                                                                                 WHERE ((YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`) = 2025) AND (`m`.`CANAL` = 'LOC'))
                                                                                                                                                 GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `c`
                                                                                                   ON ((`v`.`Anio` = `c`.`Anio`) AND
                                                                                                       (`v`.`Mes` = `c`.`Mes`) AND
                                                                                                       (`v`.`Id_Producto` = `c`.`Id_Producto`)))) AS `ventas_local`
                                                                                       UNION ALL
                                                                                       (SELECT `ventas_exp`.`Anio`                      AS `Anio`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Mes`                       AS `Mes`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Id_Canal`                  AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Id_Producto`               AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Nombre_Producto`           AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Unidad_Negocio`            AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Tons`                      AS `Tons`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Kilos`                     AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Facturacion`               AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Margen`                    AS `Margen`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta`            AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`        AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Kilos_Conta`               AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Conta`      AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta` AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Margen_Estimado_Conta`     AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Empaques_Ton`        AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Grasas_Ton`          AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Insumos_Ton`         AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Otros_Ton`           AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Empaques`            AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Grasas`              AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Insumos`             AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Costo_Otros`               AS `Costo_Otros`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Ajuste_Otros`              AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                                                                                               `ventas_exp`.`Tipo_Venta`                AS `Tipo_Venta`
                                                                                        FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`                                                   AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Mes`                                                    AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Id_Canal`                                               AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Id_Producto`                                            AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Nombre_Producto`                                        AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                         AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Tons`                                                   AS `Tons`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Facturacion`                                            AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Margen`                                                 AS `Margen`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Costo_de_Venta`                                         AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                                     `v`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`                                     AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                                                                                                     `c`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                                                                                                     `c`.`Costo`                                                  AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                                                                                                     `c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo`                                       AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                                                                                                     (`v`.`Facturacion` - (`c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo` * `v`.`Kilos`)) AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Empaques`, 0)                            AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Grasas`, 0)                              AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Insumos`, 0)                             AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Otros`, 0)                               AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Empaques` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)             AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Grasas` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)               AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Insumos` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)              AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                                     COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)                AS `Costo_Otros`,
                                                                                                     CASE
                                                                                                         WHEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) > 0)
                                                                                                             THEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) * .36)
                                                                                                         ELSE 0 END                                               AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                                                                                                     'Exportacion'                                                AS `Tipo_Venta`
                                                                                              FROM ((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                             AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                            MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                            AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                            `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                    AS `Id_Canal`,
                                                                                                            `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                  AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                            `p`.`nombre_producto`                              AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                                                                                                            `p`.`segmento`                                     AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                            SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))      AS `Tons`,
                                                                                                            SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))               AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                            SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                       AS `Facturacion`,
                                                                                                            SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                  AS `Margen`,
                                                                                                            (SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                                                                                                            ((SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) /
                                                                                                             SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)))    AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`
                                                                                                     FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                                                            ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                                                           ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                                                                                                     WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                                                                            (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                                                                                                            (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL')) AND
                                                                                                            (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101') AND
                                                                                                            (`p`.`segmento` IN ('EXP')))
                                                                                                     GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 6, 4, 5) AS `v` LEFT JOIN (SELECT YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`)       AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                                                                         MONTH(`m`.`FECHA`)      AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                                                                         `p`.`segmento`          AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                                                                                                         `m`.`CODITEM`           AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`KILOS`)        AS `Kilos`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`COSTO`)        AS `Costo`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`COSTOXKILO`)   AS `Costo_Venta_Kilo`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`CPEMPAQUETON`) AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`CPGRASASTON`)  AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`CPINSUMOSTON`) AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                                                                                                         SUM(`m`.`CPOTROSTON`)   AS `Costo_Otros`
                                                                                                                                                  FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_COSTO_MARGEN` as `m` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                                                                                                        ON (`m`.`CODITEM` = `p`.`id_producto`))
                                                                                                                                                  WHERE ((YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`) = 2025) AND (`m`.`CANAL` = 'EXP'))
                                                                                                                                                  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `c`
                                                                                                    ON ((`v`.`Anio` = `c`.`Anio`) AND
                                                                                                        (`v`.`Mes` = `c`.`Mes`) AND
                                                                                                        (`v`.`Id_Producto` = `c`.`Id_Producto`)))) AS `ventas_exp`)) AS `proffits_losses`
                                                                                 GROUP BY 1, 2) AS `t`
       ON ((`p`.`Anio` = `t`.`Anio`) AND (`p`.`Mes` = `t`.`Mes`))) LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `pp`
      ON (`pp`.`id_producto` = `p`.`Id_Producto`))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Danec_Pyg_CANAL_2024 as
SELECT `p`.`Anio`                                                                                                                                 AS `Anio`,
       `p`.`Mes`                                                                                                                                  AS `Mes`,
       `p`.`Tipo_Venta`                                                                                                                           AS `Tipo_Venta`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`p`.`Unidad_Negocio` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ'
           ELSE `p`.`Id_Canal` END                                                                                                                AS `Id_Canal`,
       `p`.`Id_Producto`                                                                                                                          AS `Id_Producto`,
       `p`.`Nombre_Producto`                                                                                                                      AS `Nombre_Producto`,
       `p`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                                                                                                       AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       `pp`.`marca`                                                                                                                               AS `marca`,
       `pp`.`nombre_familia`                                                                                                                      AS `Familia`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Tons`, 0)                                                                                                                    AS `Tons`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Facturacion`, 0)                                                                                                             AS `Facturacion`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Margen`, 0)                                                                                                                  AS `Margen`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Costo_de_Venta`, 0)                                                                                                          AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
       `p`.`Costo_Empaques`                                                                                                                       AS `Costo_Empaques`,
       `p`.`Costo_Grasas`                                                                                                                         AS `Costo_Grasas`,
       `p`.`Costo_Insumos`                                                                                                                        AS `Costo_Insumos`,
       `p`.`Costo_Otros`                                                                                                                          AS `Costo_Otros`,
       `p`.`Ajuste_Otros`                                                                                                                         AS `Ajuste_Mano_Obra_Indirecta`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`p`.`Costo_Grasas` = 0) THEN 0
           ELSE ((`mp`.`Importe_MP` / `t`.`Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`) * `p`.`Tons`) END                                                               AS `Ajuste_Refinacion`,
       ((`p`.`Margen` + `p`.`Ajuste_Otros`) + CASE
                                                  WHEN (`p`.`Costo_Grasas` = 0) THEN 0
                                                  ELSE ((`mp`.`Importe_MP` / `t`.`Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`) * `p`.`Tons`) END)                       AS `Margen_Ajustado`,
       (`p`.`Facturacion` - ((`p`.`Margen` + `p`.`Ajuste_Otros`) + CASE
                                                                       WHEN (`p`.`Costo_Grasas` = 0) THEN 0
                                                                       ELSE ((`mp`.`Importe_MP` / `t`.`Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`) * `p`.`Tons`) END)) AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ajustado`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`p`.`Tons` = 0) THEN 0
           ELSE ((`p`.`Facturacion` - ((`p`.`Margen` + `p`.`Ajuste_Otros`) + CASE
                                                                                 WHEN (`p`.`Costo_Grasas` = 0) THEN 0
                                                                                 ELSE ((`mp`.`Importe_MP` / `t`.`Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`) * `p`.`Tons`) END)) /
                 `p`.`Tons`) END                                                                                                                  AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ajustado_Ton`,
       `mp`.`Importe_MP`                                                                                                                          AS `Importe_MP`,
       `t`.`Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`                                                                                                                 AS `Total_Tons_Con_Grasa`
FROM ((((SELECT `ventas_local`.`Anio`                      AS `Anio`,
                `ventas_local`.`Mes`                       AS `Mes`,
                `ventas_local`.`Id_Canal`                  AS `Id_Canal`,
                `ventas_local`.`Id_Producto`               AS `Id_Producto`,
                `ventas_local`.`Nombre_Producto`           AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                `ventas_local`.`Unidad_Negocio`            AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                `ventas_local`.`Tons`                      AS `Tons`,
                `ventas_local`.`Kilos`                     AS `Kilos`,
                `ventas_local`.`Facturacion`               AS `Facturacion`,
                `ventas_local`.`Margen`                    AS `Margen`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta`            AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`        AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                `ventas_local`.`Kilos_Conta`               AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Conta`      AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta` AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                `ventas_local`.`Margen_Estimado_Conta`     AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Empaques_Ton`        AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Grasas_Ton`          AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Insumos_Ton`         AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Otros_Ton`           AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Empaques`            AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Grasas`              AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Insumos`             AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                `ventas_local`.`Costo_Otros`               AS `Costo_Otros`,
                `ventas_local`.`Ajuste_Otros`              AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                `ventas_local`.`Tipo_Venta`                AS `Tipo_Venta`
         FROM (SELECT `v`.`Anio`                                                   AS `Anio`,
                      `v`.`Mes`                                                    AS `Mes`,
                      `v`.`Id_Canal`                                               AS `Id_Canal`,
                      `v`.`Id_Producto`                                            AS `Id_Producto`,
                      `v`.`Nombre_Producto`                                        AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                      `v`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                         AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                      `v`.`Tons`                                                   AS `Tons`,
                      `v`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos`,
                      `v`.`Facturacion`                                            AS `Facturacion`,
                      `v`.`Margen`                                                 AS `Margen`,
                      `v`.`Costo_de_Venta`                                         AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                      `v`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`                                     AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                      `c`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                      `c`.`Costo`                                                  AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                      `c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo`                                       AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                      (`v`.`Facturacion` - (`c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo` * `v`.`Kilos`)) AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                      COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Empaques`, 0)                            AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                      COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Grasas`, 0)                              AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                      COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Insumos`, 0)                             AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                      COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Otros`, 0)                               AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                      COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Empaques` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)             AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                      COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Grasas` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)               AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                      COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Insumos` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)              AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                      COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)                AS `Costo_Otros`,
                      CASE
                          WHEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) > 0)
                              THEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) * .36)
                          ELSE 0 END                                               AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                      'Local'                                                      AS `Tipo_Venta`
               FROM ((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                             AS `Anio`,
                             MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                            AS `Mes`,
                             `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                    AS `Id_Canal`,
                             `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                  AS `Id_Producto`,
                             `p`.`nombre_producto`                              AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                             `p`.`segmento`                                     AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                             SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))      AS `Tons`,
                             SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))               AS `Kilos`,
                             SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                       AS `Facturacion`,
                             SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                  AS `Margen`,
                             (SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                             ((SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) /
                              SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)))    AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`
                      FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                             ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                            ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                      WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2024) AND (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                             (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL', 'OFI')) AND (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101') AND
                             (`p`.`segmento` NOT IN ('EXP')))
                      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 6, 4, 5) AS `v` LEFT JOIN (SELECT YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`)       AS `Anio`,
                                                                          MONTH(`m`.`FECHA`)      AS `Mes`,
                                                                          `p`.`segmento`          AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                          `m`.`CODITEM`           AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`KILOS`)        AS `Kilos`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`COSTO`)        AS `Costo`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`COSTOXKILO`)   AS `Costo_Venta_Kilo`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`CPEMPAQUETON`) AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`CPGRASASTON`)  AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`CPINSUMOSTON`) AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                                                                          SUM(`m`.`CPOTROSTON`)   AS `Costo_Otros`
                                                                   FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_COSTO_MARGEN` as `m` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                                                                         ON (`m`.`CODITEM` = `p`.`id_producto`))
                                                                   WHERE ((YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`) = 2024) AND (`m`.`CANAL` = 'LOC'))
                                                                   GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `c`
                     ON ((`v`.`Anio` = `c`.`Anio`) AND (`v`.`Mes` = `c`.`Mes`) AND
                         (`v`.`Id_Producto` = `c`.`Id_Producto`)))) AS `ventas_local`
         UNION ALL
         (SELECT `ventas_exp`.`Anio`                      AS `Anio`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Mes`                       AS `Mes`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Id_Canal`                  AS `Id_Canal`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Id_Producto`               AS `Id_Producto`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Nombre_Producto`           AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Unidad_Negocio`            AS `Unidad_Negocio`,

                 `ventas_exp`.`Kilos`                     AS `Kilos`,

                 `ventas_exp`.`Margen`                    AS `Margen`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta`            AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`        AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Kilos_Conta`               AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Conta`      AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                 `ventas_exp`.`Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta` AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,

                 `ventas_exp`.`Tipo_Venta`                AS `Tipo_Venta`

                       `v`.`Mes`                                                    AS `Mes`,

                       `v`.`Unidad_Negocio`                                         AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                       `v`.`Tons`                                                   AS `Tons`,
                       `v`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos`,
                       `v`.`Facturacion`                                            AS `Facturacion`,
                       `v`.`Margen`                                                 AS `Margen`,
                       `v`.`Costo_de_Venta`                                         AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                       `v`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ton`                                     AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`,
                       `c`.`Kilos`                                                  AS `Kilos_Conta`,
                       `c`.`Costo`                                                  AS `Costo_de_Venta_Conta`,
                       `c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo`                                       AS `Costo_de_Venta_Kilo_Conta`,
                       (`v`.`Facturacion` - (`c`.`Costo_Venta_Kilo` * `v`.`Kilos`)) AS `Margen_Estimado_Conta`,
                       COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Empaques`, 0)                            AS `Costo_Empaques_Ton`,
                       COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Grasas`, 0)                              AS `Costo_Grasas_Ton`,
                       COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Insumos`, 0)                             AS `Costo_Insumos_Ton`,
                       COALESCE(`c`.`Costo_Otros`, 0)                               AS `Costo_Otros_Ton`,
                       COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Empaques` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)             AS `Costo_Empaques`,
                       COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Grasas` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)               AS `Costo_Grasas`,
                       COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Insumos` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)              AS `Costo_Insumos`,
                       COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0)                AS `Costo_Otros`,
                       CASE
                           WHEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) > 0)
                               THEN (COALESCE((`c`.`Costo_Otros` * `v`.`Tons`), 0) * .36)
                           ELSE 0 END                                               AS `Ajuste_Otros`,
                       'Exportacion'                                                AS `Tipo_Venta`
                FROM ((SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                             AS `Anio`,
                              MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                            AS `Mes`,
                              `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                    AS `Id_Canal`,
                              `f`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                  AS `Id_Producto`,
                              `p`.`nombre_producto`                              AS `Nombre_Producto`,
                              `p`.`segmento`                                     AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                              SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))      AS `Tons`,
                              SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`))               AS `Kilos`,
                              SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                       AS `Facturacion`,
                              SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                  AS `Margen`,
                              (SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) AS `Costo_de_Venta`,
                              ((SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) - SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)) /
                               SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)))    AS `Costo_de_Venta_Ton`
                       FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `p`
                              ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                             ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                       WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2024) AND (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                              (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL')) AND (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101') AND
                              (`p`.`segmento` IN ('EXP')))
                       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 6, 4, 5) AS `v` LEFT JOIN (SELECT YEAR(`m`.`FECHA`)       AS `Anio`,
                                                                           MONTH(`m`.`FECHA`)      AS `Mes`,
                                                                           `p`.`segmento`          AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
                                                                           `m`.`CODITEM`           AS `Id_Producto`,
                                                                           SUM(`m`.`KILOS`)        AS `Kilos`,

                                                                           SUM(`m`.`CPEMPAQUETON`) AS `Costo_Empaques`,
