       MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                               AS `Mes`,
       LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                               AS `Ruta`,
       `p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`                                                AS `Familia_Horecas`,
       `prp`.`PrspTON`                                                       AS `Prsp_TON`,
       `prp`.`PrspCJEstad`                                                   AS `Prsp_CJ_Estad`,
       `prp`.`PrspUSD`                                                       AS `Prsp_USD`,
       SUM((`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))                        AS `Venta_CJ_Estad`,
       (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000)                         AS `Venta_TON`,
       SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                                          AS `VentaUSD`,
       if((`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` IN ('OLN', 'PPR')), (SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) / `prp`.`PrspUSD`),
          ((SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `prp`.`PrspTON`)) AS `Cumplimiento`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
        ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
       ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN (SELECT `s`.`Anio`              AS `Anio`,
                                                                     `s`.`Mes`               AS `Mes`,
                                                                     `s`.`Ruta`              AS `Ruta`,
                                                                     `s`.`Cod_UnidadNegocio` AS `Fam`,
                                                                     SUM(`s`.`Toneladas`)    AS `PrspTON`,
                                                                     SUM(`s`.`CJ_Estad`)     AS `PrspCJEstad`,
                                                                     SUM(`s`.`Facturacion`)  AS `PrspUSD`
                                                              FROM `DW_Presupuesto_Ventas` as `s`
                                                              WHERE ((`s`.`Canal` IN ('Horecas', 'HOR')) AND (`s`.`Anio` >= 2025))
                                                              GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `prp`
      ON ((LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `prp`.`Ruta`) AND (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = `prp`.`Fam`) AND
          (YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = `prp`.`Anio`) AND (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = `prp`.`Mes`)))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH))) AND
       (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH))) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'HOR'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_IND as
SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                                                 AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                                                AS `Mes`,
       LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                                                AS `Ruta`,
       if((`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` IN ('B2B', 'B2C', 'EXP', 'NUA', 'IND', 'MAQ')), 'Ind Amm Exp Nua',
          'Otros')                                                                                            AS `Familia_Industriales`,
       `prp`.`PrspTON`                                                                                        AS `Prsp_TON`,
       `prp`.`PrspCJEstad`                                                                                    AS `Prsp_CJ_Estad`,
       SUM((`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))                                                         AS `Venta_CJ_Estad`,
       (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000)                                                          AS `Venta_TON`,
       ((SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `prp`.`PrspTON`)                                      AS `Cumplimiento`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
        ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
       ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN (SELECT `s`.`Anio`                          AS `Anio`,
                                                                     `s`.`Mes`                           AS `Mes`,
                                                                     `s`.`Ruta`                          AS `Ruta`,
                                                                     if(
                                                                             (`s`.`Cod_UnidadNegocio` IN ('B2B', 'B2C', 'EXP', 'NUA', 'IND', 'MAQ')),
                                                                             'Ind Amm Exp Nua', 'Otros') AS `Fam`,
                                                                     SUM(`s`.`Toneladas`)                AS `PrspTON`,
                                                                     SUM(`s`.`CJ_Estad`)                 AS `PrspCJEstad`
                                                              FROM `DW_Presupuesto_Ventas` as `s`
                                                              WHERE ((`s`.`Canal` IN ('Industrias', 'IND')) AND (`s`.`Anio` >= 2025))
                                                              GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `prp`
      ON ((LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `prp`.`Ruta`) AND
          (if((`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` IN ('B2B', 'B2C', 'EXP', 'NUA', 'IND', 'MAQ')), 'Ind Amm Exp Nua', 'Otros') =
           `prp`.`Fam`) AND (YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = `prp`.`Anio`) AND (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = `prp`.`Mes`)))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) >= 2025) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'IND') AND (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` NOT IN ('999')))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_MAY as
SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                               AS `Mes`,
       if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)), if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
          LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2))                                           AS `Ruta`,
       `p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`                                                AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       `prp`.`PrspTON`                                                       AS `Prsp_TON`,
       `prp`.`PrspCJEstad`                                                   AS `Prsp_CJ_Estad`,
       `prp`.`PrspUSD`                                                       AS `Prsp_USD`,
       SUM((`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))                        AS `Venta_CJ_Estad`,
       (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000)                         AS `Venta_TON`,
       SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                                          AS `VentaUSD`,
       if((`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` IN ('OLN', 'PPR')), (SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) / `prp`.`PrspUSD`),
          ((SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `prp`.`PrspTON`)) AS `Cumplimiento`
FROM (((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
          ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
         ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
        ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)) AND
            (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
       ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)) AND
           (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)))) LEFT JOIN (SELECT `s`.`Anio`              AS `Anio`,
                                                                                `s`.`Mes`               AS `Mes`,
                                                                                `s`.`Ruta`              AS `Ruta`,
                                                                                `s`.`Cod_UnidadNegocio` AS `Fam`,
                                                                                SUM(`s`.`Toneladas`)    AS `PrspTON`,
                                                                                SUM(`s`.`CJ_Estad`)     AS `PrspCJEstad`,
                                                                                SUM(`s`.`Facturacion`)  AS `PrspUSD`
                                                                         FROM `DW_Presupuesto_Ventas` as `s`
                                                                         WHERE ((`s`.`Canal` IN ('Mayoristas', 'MAY')) AND (`s`.`Anio` >= 2025))
                                                                         GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `prp`
      ON ((if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
              if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
              LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) = `prp`.`Ruta`) AND (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = `prp`.`Fam`) AND
          (YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = `prp`.`Anio`) AND (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = `prp`.`Mes`)))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY))) AND
       (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY))) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'MAY'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, `prp`.`Ruta`, 4, 5, 6 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_PAN as
SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                            AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                           AS `Mes`,
       LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                           AS `Ruta`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('046', '059', '042', '292')) AND (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` IN ('002', '003')))
               THEN 'Grasas de Panificacion 1'
           WHEN (`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('050', '058', '296', '206')) THEN 'Especializados'
           WHEN ((`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('294')) AND (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '097')) THEN 'Especializados'
           WHEN ((`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` IN ('112')) AND (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'B2B')) THEN 'Harinas y Premezclas'
           WHEN (`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('330', '049')) THEN 'Grasas de Panificacion 2'
           ELSE 'Otros' END                                              AS `Familia_Panaderias`,
       `prp`.`PrspTON`                                                   AS `Prsp_TON`,
       `prp`.`PrspCJEstad`                                               AS `Prsp_CJ_Estad`,
       SUM((`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))                    AS `Venta_CJ_Estad`,
       (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000)                     AS `Venta_TON`,
       ((SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `prp`.`PrspTON`) AS `Cumplimiento`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
        ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
       ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN (SELECT `s`.`Anio`           AS `Anio`,
                                                                     `s`.`Mes`            AS `Mes`,
                                                                     `s`.`Ruta`           AS `Ruta`,
                                                                     CASE
                                                                         WHEN (
                                                                             (`s`.`Cod_Marca` IN ('046', '059', '042', '292')) AND
                                                                             (`s`.`Cod_Familia` IN ('002', '003')))
                                                                             THEN 'Grasas de Panificacion 1'
                                                                         WHEN (`s`.`Cod_Marca` IN ('050', '058', '296', '206'))
                                                                             THEN 'Especializados'
                                                                         WHEN ((`s`.`Cod_Marca` IN ('294')) AND (`s`.`Cod_Familia` = '097'))
                                                                             THEN 'Especializados'
                                                                         WHEN ((`s`.`Cod_Familia` IN ('112')) AND (`s`.`Cod_UnidadNegocio` = 'B2B'))
                                                                             THEN 'Harinas y Premezclas'
                                                                         WHEN (`s`.`Cod_Marca` IN ('330', '049'))
                                                                             THEN 'Grasas de Panificacion 2'
                                                                         ELSE 'Otros' END AS `Fam`,
                                                                     SUM(`s`.`Toneladas`) AS `PrspTON`,
                                                                     SUM(`s`.`CJ_Estad`)  AS `PrspCJEstad`
                                                              FROM `DW_Presupuesto_Ventas` as `s`
                                                              WHERE ((`s`.`Canal` IN ('Panaderias', 'PAN')) AND (`s`.`Anio` >= 2025))
                                                              GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `prp`
      ON ((LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `prp`.`Ruta`) AND (CASE
                                                            WHEN ((`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('046', '059', '042', '292')) AND
                                                                  (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` IN ('002', '003')))
                                                                THEN 'Grasas de Panificacion 1'
                                                            WHEN (`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('050', '058', '296', '206'))
                                                                THEN 'Especializados'
                                                            WHEN ((`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('294')) AND (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '097'))
                                                                THEN 'Especializados'
                                                            WHEN ((`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` IN ('112')) AND (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'B2B'))
                                                                THEN 'Harinas y Premezclas'
                                                            WHEN (`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('330', '049'))
                                                                THEN 'Grasas de Panificacion 2'
                                                            ELSE 'Otros' END = `prp`.`Fam`) AND
          (YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = `prp`.`Anio`) AND (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = `prp`.`Mes`)))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) >= 2025) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_REGIONAL as
SELECT `vol`.`Anio`                                                   AS `Anio`,
       `vol`.`Mes`                                                    AS `Mes`,
       `r`.`Jefe_Regional_Id`                                         AS `Jefe_Regional_Id`,
       `vol`.`Familia_Horecas`                                        AS `Familia_Horecas`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_TON`)                                          AS `PrespTON`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`)                                     AS `PrespCJ_Estad`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_USD`)                                          AS `PrespUSD`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Venta_TON`)                                         AS `VentaTON`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`)                                    AS `Venta_Cj_Estad`,
       SUM(`vol`.`VentaUSD`)                                          AS `VentaUSD`,
       if((`vol`.`Familia_Horecas` IN ('OLN', 'PPR')), (SUM(`vol`.`VentaUSD`) / SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_USD`)),
          (SUM(`vol`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`) / SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`))) AS `Cumplimiento`
FROM (`TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_HOR` as `vol` LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r` ON (`vol`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_SUP_HOR as
SELECT `vol`.`Anio`                                                   AS `Anio`,
       `vol`.`Mes`                                                    AS `Mes`,
       `r`.`Supervisor_Id`                                            AS `Supervisor_Id`,
       `vol`.`Familia_Horecas`                                        AS `Familia_Horecas`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_TON`)                                          AS `PrespTON`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`)                                     AS `PrespCJ_Estad`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_USD`)                                          AS `PrespUSD`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Venta_TON`)                                         AS `VentaTON`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`)                                    AS `Venta_Cj_Estad`,
       SUM(`vol`.`VentaUSD`)                                          AS `Venta_USD`,
       if((`vol`.`Familia_Horecas` IN ('OLN', 'PPR')), (SUM(`vol`.`VentaUSD`) / SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_USD`)),
          (SUM(`vol`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`) / SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`))) AS `Cumplimiento`
FROM (`TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_HOR` as `vol` LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r` ON (`vol`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_SUP_MAY as
SELECT `vol`.`Anio`                                               AS `Anio`,
       `vol`.`Mes`                                                AS `Mes`,
       `r`.`Supervisor_Id`                                        AS `Supervisor_Id`,
       `vol`.`UnidadNegocio`                                      AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_TON`)                                      AS `PrespTON`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`)                                 AS `PrespCJ_Estad`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Venta_TON`)                                     AS `VentaTON`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`)                                AS `Venta_Cj_Estad`,
       (SUM(`vol`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`) / SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`)) AS `Cumplimiento`
FROM (`TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_MAY` as `vol` LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r` ON (`vol`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_SUP_MULTI as
SELECT `m`.`Anio`              AS `Anio`,
       `m`.`Mes`               AS `Mes`,
       `r`.`Supervisor_Id`     AS `Supervisor_Id`,
       SUM(`m`.`TotalCJEstad`) AS `CJ_Estad`
FROM (`TMP_CJ_ESTAD_SUP_MULTI` as `m` LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r` ON (`m`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`))
WHERE (`m`.`Anio` >= 2025)
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_SUP_PAN as
SELECT `vol`.`Anio`                                               AS `Anio`,
       `vol`.`Mes`                                                AS `Mes`,
       `r`.`Supervisor_Id`                                        AS `Supervisor_Id`,
       `vol`.`Familia_Panaderias`                                 AS `Familia_Panaderias`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_TON`)                                      AS `PrespTON`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`)                                 AS `PrespCJ_Estad`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Venta_TON`)                                     AS `VentaTON`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`)                                AS `Venta_Cj_Estad`,
       (SUM(`vol`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`) / SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`)) AS `Cumplimiento`
FROM (`TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_PAN` as `vol` LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r` ON (`vol`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_SUP_TAT as
SELECT `vol`.`Anio`                                                   AS `Anio`,
       `vol`.`Mes`                                                    AS `Mes`,
       `r`.`Supervisor_Id`                                            AS `Supervisor_Id`,
       `vol`.`UnidadNegocio`                                          AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_TON`)                                          AS `PrespTON`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`)                                     AS `PrespCJ_Estad`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_USD`)                                          AS `PrespUSD`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Venta_TON`)                                         AS `VentaTON`,
       SUM(`vol`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`)                                    AS `Venta_Cj_Estad`,
       SUM(`vol`.`VentaUSD`)                                          AS `Venta_USD`,
       if((`vol`.`UnidadNegocio` IN ('OLN', 'PPR')), (SUM(`vol`.`VentaUSD`) / SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_USD`)),
          (SUM(`vol`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`) / SUM(`vol`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`))) AS `Cumplimiento`
FROM (`TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_TAT` as `vol` LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r` ON (`vol`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CJ_ESTAD_COM_TAT as
SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                        AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                       AS `Mes`,
       LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                       AS `Ruta`,
       if((`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` IN ('B2B', 'B2C')), 'AMM', `p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`) AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       `prp`.`PrspTON`                                                               AS `Prsp_TON`,
       `prp`.`PrspCJEstad`                                                           AS `Prsp_CJ_Estad`,
       `prp`.`PrspUSD`                                                               AS `Prsp_USD`,
       SUM((`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))                                AS `Venta_CJ_Estad`,
       (SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000)                                 AS `Venta_TON`,
       SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                                                  AS `VentaUSD`,
       if((`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` IN ('OLN', 'PPR')), (SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) / `prp`.`PrspUSD`),
          ((SUM((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `prp`.`PrspTON`))         AS `Cumplimiento`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
        ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
       ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN (SELECT `s`.`Anio`                           AS `Anio`,
                                                                     `s`.`Mes`                            AS `Mes`,
                                                                     `s`.`Ruta`                           AS `Ruta`,
                                                                     CASE
                                                                         WHEN (`s`.`Cod_UnidadNegocio` IN ('B2B', 'B2C'))
                                                                             THEN 'AMM'
                                                                         ELSE `s`.`Cod_UnidadNegocio` END AS `Fam`,
                                                                     SUM(`s`.`Toneladas`)                 AS `PrspTON`,
                                                                     SUM(`s`.`CJ_Estad`)                  AS `PrspCJEstad`,
                                                                     SUM(`s`.`Facturacion`)               AS `PrspUSD`
                                                              FROM `DW_Presupuesto_Ventas` as `s`
                                                              WHERE ((`s`.`Canal` IN ('Tat', 'COB')) AND (`s`.`Anio` >= 2025))
                                                              GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `prp`
      ON ((LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `prp`.`Ruta`) AND
          (if((`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` IN ('B2B', 'B2C')), 'AMM', `p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`) = `prp`.`Fam`) AND
          (YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = `prp`.`Anio`) AND (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = `prp`.`Mes`)))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) >= 2025) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'COB'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CJ_ESTAD_SUP_MULTI as
SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
                `SUB`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
                `SUB`.`Ruta`         AS `Ruta`,
                `SUB`.`TotalCJEstad` AS `TotalCJEstad`
FROM (SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
             `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
             `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD`.`Ruta`         AS `Ruta`,
             `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD`.`TotalCJEstad` AS `TotalCJEstad`
      FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD`
      UNION ALL
      (SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD_MAY`.`Anio`         AS `Anio`,
              `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD_MAY`.`Mes`          AS `Mes`,
              `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD_MAY`.`Ruta`         AS `Ruta`,
              `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD_MAY`.`TotalCJEstad` AS `TotalCJEstad`
       FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD_MAY` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_CJ_ESTAD_MAY`)) AS `SUB`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CL_NO_IMPACTADOS_COB as
SELECT `dc`.`ID_CLIENTE`        AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
       `dc`.`NOM_CLIENTE`       AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
       LEFT(`dc`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) AS `Ruta`,
       `dc`.`NOM_DIA_VISITA`    AS `NOM_DIA_VISITA`,
       `dc`.`COD_DIA_VISITA`    AS `COD_DIA_VISITA`,
       `dc`.`COD_AGENCIA`       AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
       `dc`.`CIUDAD`            AS `CIUDAD`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `dc`
WHERE ((`dc`.`COD_STATUS` IN ('ACT', 'REA', 'SIN')) AND (`dc`.`COD_CANAL` = 'COB') AND
       (NOT (`dc`.`ID_CLIENTE` IN (SELECT DISTINCT `fvt`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                                   FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `fvt` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `dp`
                                          ON (`fvt`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `dp`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `dc`
                                         ON (`fvt`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `dc`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                                   WHERE ((YEAR(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY))) AND
                                          (MONTH(`fvt`.`DATE_CONTA`) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY))) AND
                                          (`dc`.`COD_CANAL` = 'COB'))))))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_COM_OBJ_ESTRAT_REGIONAL as
SELECT `obj`.`Anio`                                                                             AS `Anio`,
       `obj`.`Mes`                                                                              AS `Mes`,
       `obj`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                        AS `COD_CANAL`,
       `r`.`Jefe_Regional_Id`                                                                   AS `Jefe_Regional_Id`,
       `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                                 AS `NombreObjetivo`,
       SUM(`obj`.`CajasReales`)                                                                 AS `Alcanzado`,
       SUM(`obj`.`Objetivo`)                                                                    AS `Objetivo`,
       (SUM(`obj`.`CajasReales`) / SUM(`obj`.`Objetivo`))                                       AS `Cumplimiento`,
       AVG(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)                                                               AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
       if(((SUM(`obj`.`CajasReales`) / SUM(`obj`.`Objetivo`)) > 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
          ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) * (SUM(`obj`.`CajasReales`) / SUM(`obj`.`Objetivo`)))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
FROM (`TMP_OBJT_ESTRAT_ANC` as `obj` LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r` ON (`obj`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_COM_OBJ_ESTRAT_SUP as
SELECT `obj`.`Anio`                                                                             AS `Anio`,
       `obj`.`Mes`                                                                              AS `Mes`,
       `obj`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                        AS `COD_CANAL`,
       `r`.`Supervisor_Id`                                                                      AS `Supervisor_Id`,
       `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                                 AS `NombreObjetivo`,
       SUM(`obj`.`CajasReales`)                                                                 AS `Alcanzado`,
       SUM(`obj`.`Objetivo`)                                                                    AS `Objetivo`,
       (SUM(`obj`.`CajasReales`) / SUM(`obj`.`Objetivo`))                                       AS `Cumplimiento`,
       AVG(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)                                                               AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
       if(((SUM(`obj`.`CajasReales`) / SUM(`obj`.`Objetivo`)) > 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
          ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) * (SUM(`obj`.`CajasReales`) / SUM(`obj`.`Objetivo`)))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
FROM (`TMP_OBJT_ESTRAT_ANC` as `obj` LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r` ON (`obj`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CURR_COORDS as
SELECT DISTINCT `c`.`COD_CLIENTE`    AS `COD_CLIENTE`,
                `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`    AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
                `c`.`COD_CANAL`      AS `COD_CANAL`,
                `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`    AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                `c`.`COD_RUTA`       AS `COD_RUTA`,
                `c`.`NOM_DIA_VISITA` AS `NOM_DIA_VISITA`,
                `c`.`COD_DIA_VISITA` AS `COD_DIA_VISITA`,
                `t`.`LATITUD`        AS `LATITUD`,
                `t`.`LONGITUD`       AS `LONGITUD`
FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`GEO_VISITA_TAT` as `t` ON (`t`.`ID` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
WHERE ((NOT ISNULL(`t`.`LATITUD`)) AND (NOT ISNULL(`t`.`LONGITUD`)) AND
       (YEAR(`t`.`FECHA_INFO`) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH))) AND
       (MONTH(`t`.`FECHA_INFO`) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH))) AND
       (`c`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('COB', 'MAY', 'HOR', 'PAN')) AND (`c`.`COD_STATUS` IN ('ACT', 'MOR', 'SIN')))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_CUST_DATA as
SELECT `c`.`COD_CLIENTE`              AS `COD_CLIENTE`,
       TRIM(`e`.`MAIL`)               AS `MAIL`,
       TRIM(`t`.`NUM_TELEFONO`)       AS `NUM_TELEFONO`,
       0                              AS `Coor`,
       TRIM(`c`.`COD_CANAL`)          AS `COD_CANAL`,
       TRIM(`c`.`COD_AGENCIA`)        AS `COD_AGECNIA`,
       TRIM(`c`.`COD_STATUS`)         AS `COD_STATUS`,
       TRIM(`c`.`COD_VISIBLE_APP_FV`) AS `Visibilidad`,
       TRIM(`c`.`COD_PROVINCIA`)      AS `Provincia`,
       TRIM(`c`.`COD_TIPO_CLI`)       AS `COD_TIPO_CLI`,
       TRIM(`c`.`PAIS`)               AS `PAIS`,
       TRIM(`c`.`CIUDAD`)             AS `CIUDAD`,
       TRIM(`c`.`RUC_CI`)             AS `RUC_CI`,
       TRIM(`c`.`COD_TIPO_ID`)        AS `COD_TIPO_ID`
FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_REGISTRO_MAIL` as `e`
       ON (`c`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `e`.`COD_CLIENTE_PROVEEDOR`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_REGISTRO_TELEFONICOS` as `t`
      ON (`c`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `t`.`COD_CLIENTE_PROVEEDOR`))
WHERE ((`c`.`COD_TIPO_CLI` = 'CN') AND (`c`.`COD_STATUS` IN ('ACT', 'MOR', 'SIN')))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_HDR_MARCAS as
SELECT DISTINCT `p`.`COD_MARCA` AS `COD_MARCA`, `p`.`NOM_MARCA` AS `NOM_MARCA`
FROM (`MSR_Infaltb_Mayoristas` as `mr` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
      ON (`mr`.`Id_Producto` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_OBJT_ESTRAT_TMP as
SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                      `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                      `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                      `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                      `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                      `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                      `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                      `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                      `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                      `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                      `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
      FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                            `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                            `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                            `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                            `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                            `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                            `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                            `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                            `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                            `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                            `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
            FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                                  `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                                  `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                  `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                  `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                                  `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                                  `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                                  `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                  `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                  `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                  `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                                        `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                                        `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                        `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                        `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                                        `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                                        `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                                        `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                        `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                        `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                        `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                        FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                                              `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                                              `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                              `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                              `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                                              `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                                              `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                                              `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                              `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                              `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                              `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                              FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`                               AS `Anio`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Mes`                                AS `Mes`,
                                                    `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`                        AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                    `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`                          AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Ruta`                               AS `Ruta`,
                                                    (`SUB`.`CajasReales`!:>decimal(45,8) NULL) AS `CajasReales`,
                                                    (`SUB`.`Objetivo`!:>double NULL)           AS `Objetivo`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`                       AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                    `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                   AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                    (`SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`!:>double NULL)      AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                    `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento`                   AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                                                          `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                          `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                                                          `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                          `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                          `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                          FROM (SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`             AS `Anio`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Mes`              AS `Mes`,
                                                                `SUB`.`COD_AGENCIA`      AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                                `SUB`.`COD_CANAL`        AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Ruta`             AS `Ruta`,
                                                                `SUB`.`CajasReales`      AS `CajasReales`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Objetivo`         AS `Objetivo`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Cumplimiento`     AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Nombre_Objetitvo` AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                                `SUB`.`Peso_Objetivo`    AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                                `SUB`.`PesoCumplimiento` AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                FROM (SELECT YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                            AS `Anio`,
                                                             MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                           AS `Mes`,
                                                             `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                             `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                             if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`,
                                                                   LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2))                                                       AS `Ruta`,
                                                             SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`))                                  AS `CajasReales`,
                                                             `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                                 AS `Objetivo`,
                                                             (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)            AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                             `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                             `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                             AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                             if(
                                                                     ((SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                                      1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                                     ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                      (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                      FROM ((((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `v` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                 ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                ON (`v`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
                                                               ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND
                                                                   (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                   (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 8))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
                                                              ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND
                                                                  (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                  (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 8))) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                             ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                            ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                                (if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                    if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2),
                                                                       `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                    LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                                      WHERE ((`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('294', '313')) AND
                                                             (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'PPR') AND
                                                             (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` NOT IN (70279, 72147)) AND
                                                             (YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                             (MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 8) AND
                                                             (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'MAY') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 12000000))
                                                      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10
                                                      UNION ALL
                                                      (SELECT YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                            AS `Anio`,
                                                              MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                           AS `Mes`,
                                                              `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                              `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                              if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                 if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`,
                                                                    LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                 LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2))                                                       AS `Ruta`,
                                                              SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`))                                  AS `CajasReales`,
                                                              `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                                 AS `Objetivo`,
                                                              (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)            AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                              `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                              `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                             AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                              if(
                                                                      ((SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                                       1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                                      ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                       (SUM((`v`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `v`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                       FROM ((((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `v` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                  ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                 ON (`v`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
                                                                ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND
                                                                    (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                    (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 8))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
                                                               ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND
                                                                   (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
                                                                   (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 8))) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                              ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                             ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                                 (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                                       WHERE ((`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('021', '023')) AND
                                                              (`p`.`COD_ENVASE` = '001') AND
                                                              (`p`.`COD_PRESENTACION` = '033') AND
                                                              (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'B2C') AND
                                                              (YEAR(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                              (MONTH(`v`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 8) AND
                                                              (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'MAY') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 12000001))
                                                       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10)) AS `SUB`
                                                UNION ALL
                                                (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                           AS `Anio`,
                                                        MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                          AS `Mes`,
                                                        `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                 AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                        `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                   AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                        LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                           AS `Ruta`,
                                                        SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))                                  AS `CajasReales`,
                                                        `objr`.`Objetivo`                                                                 AS `Objetivo`,
                                                        (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)            AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                        `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                          AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                        `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                                                             AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                        if(
                                                                ((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                                 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                                ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                 (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                                 FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                          ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                         ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                        ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                       ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                           (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                                 WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                        (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 8) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'HOR') AND
                                                        (`p`.`COD_MARCA` IN ('021', '023')) AND
                                                        (`p`.`COD_PRESENTACION` IN ('001', '033', '621')) AND
                                                        (`p`.`COD_ENVASE` = '001') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 12000003))
                                                 GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10)) AS `SUB`
                                          UNION ALL
                                          (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                            AS `Anio`,
                                                  MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                           AS `Mes`,
                                                  `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                  AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                                  `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                    AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                                  LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                            AS `Ruta`,
                                                  SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) AS `CajasReales`,
                                                  `objr`.`Objetivo`                                  AS `Objetivo`,
                                                  (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) /
                                                   `objr`.`Objetivo`)                                AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                                  `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                           AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                                  `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`                              AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                                  if(((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) /
                                                       `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                     ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                      (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) /
                                                       `objr`.`Objetivo`)))                          AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                           FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                    ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                   ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                                  ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                                 ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                                     (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                           WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                  (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 8) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'HOR') AND
                                                  (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'OLN') AND (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '102') AND
                                                  (`obj`.`Id` = 12000004))
                                           GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, 7, 9, 10)) AS `SUB`
                                    UNION ALL
                                    (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                         AS `Anio`,
                                            MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                        AS `Mes`,
                                            `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                               AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                            `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                 AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                            LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                         AS `Ruta`,
                                            (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) AS `CajasReales`,
                                            COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                  AS `Objetivo`,
                                            COALESCE(
                                                    ((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `objr`.`Objetivo`),
                                                    0)                                      AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                            `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                        AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                            COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)              AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                            COALESCE(if(
                                                             (((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) >
                                                              1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                                             ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                              ((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / 1000) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                                                     0)                                     AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                                     FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                              ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                             ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                            ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                           ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                               (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                                     WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 8) AND
                                            (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN') AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` = '046') AND
                                            (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '002') AND (`obj`.`Id` = 12000014))
                                     GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9,
                                              `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)) AS `SUB`
                              UNION ALL
                              (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                   AS `Anio`,
                                      MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                  AS `Mes`,
                                      `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                         AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                      `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                           AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                      LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                   AS `Ruta`,
                                      (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`))!:>decimal(45,8) NULL)             AS `CajasReales`,
                                      COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                                            AS `Objetivo`,
                                      COALESCE((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`),
                                               0)                                                               AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                      `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                  AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                      COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                                        AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                      COALESCE(if(((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1),
                                                  (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100), ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                                  (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_KG` + `vp`.`DEV_KG`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                                               0)                                                               AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                               FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                        ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                       ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                      ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                                     ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                                         (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                               WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 8) AND
                                      (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN') AND (`p`.`COD_FAMILIA` = '669') AND
                                      (`obj`.`Id` = 12000015))
                               GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9,
                                        `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)) AS `SUB`
                        UNION ALL
                        (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                             AS `Anio`,
                                MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                                            AS `Mes`,
                                `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                   AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                                `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                                     AS `COD_CANAL`,
                                LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                             AS `Ruta`,
                                (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`))!:>decimal(45,8) NULL)             AS `CajasReales`,
                                COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                                                      AS `Objetivo`,
                                COALESCE((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`),
                                         0)                                                                         AS `Cumplimiento`,
                                `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                            AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                                COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                                                  AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                                COALESCE(
                                        if(((SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1),
                                           (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100), ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                                           (SUM((`vp`.`VENTA_CAJ_EST` + `vp`.`DEV_CAJ_EST`)) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                                        0)                                                                          AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                         FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                  ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                 ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                                ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                               ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
                         WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 8) AND
                                (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'PAN') AND (`p`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'LYA') AND
                                (`obj`.`Id` = 12000016))
                         GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9, `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)) AS `SUB`
                  UNION ALL
                  (SELECT 2025                                                                                          AS `Anio`,
                          8                                                                                             AS `Mes`,
                          `a`.`Codigo`                                                                                  AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                          'IND'                                                                                         AS `COD_CANAL`,
                          `unv`.`Ruta`                                                                                  AS `Ruta`,
                          (COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`)!:>decimal(45,8) NULL)                                     AS `CajasReales`,
                          (`objr`.`Objetivo`!:>double NULL)                                                             AS `Objetivo`,
                          (COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`)                                      AS `Cumplimiento`,
                          `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                                      AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                          (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`!:>double NULL)                                                         AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                          if(((COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1),
                             (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100), ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) *
                                                             (COUNT(DISTINCT `unv`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))) AS `PesoCumplimiento`
                   FROM (((((SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Ruta` AS `Ruta`, `SUB`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                             FROM (SELECT LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) AS `Ruta`, `c`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                                   FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                   WHERE ((`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'IND') AND (YEAR(`c`.`FECHA_PRIMERA_COMPRA`) = 2025) AND
                                          (MONTH(`c`.`FECHA_PRIMERA_COMPRA`) = 4))
                                   GROUP BY 1, 2
                                   UNION ALL
                                   (SELECT LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) AS `Ruta`, `c`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                                    FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                    WHERE ((`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'IND') AND (YEAR(`c`.`FECHA_CREACION`) = 2025) AND
                                           (MONTH(`c`.`FECHA_CREACION`) = 7) AND
                                           (`c`.`ID_CLIENTE` IN (SELECT `f`.`ID_CLIENTE` AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                                                                 FROM (`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `cl`
                                                                       ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `cl`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
                                                                 WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND
                                                                        (MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 4) AND
                                                                        (`cl`.`COD_CANAL` = 'IND')))))
                                    GROUP BY 1, 2)) AS `SUB`) AS `unv` LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                            ON ((`obj`.`Cod_Canal` = 'IND') AND (`obj`.`Mes_Medicion` = 4) AND
                                (`obj`.`Anio_Medicion` = 2025))) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                           ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND
                               (`unv`.`Ruta` = `objr`.`Ruta`))) LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r`
                          ON (`unv`.`Ruta` = `r`.`Codigo`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Agencias` as `a`
                         ON (`r`.`Agencia_Id` = `a`.`Id`))
                   GROUP BY 5, 3, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9, `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`)) AS `SUB`
            UNION ALL
            (SELECT `v3`.`ANIO`                                                                              AS `Anio`,
                    `v3`.`Mes`                                                                               AS `Mes`,
                    `v3`.`AGENCIA`                                                                           AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
                    `v3`.`CANAL`                                                                             AS `COD_CANAL`,
                    `v3`.`Ruta`                                                                              AS `Ruta`,
                    (`v3`.`Clientes`!:>decimal(45,8) NULL)                                                   AS `CajasReales`,
                    COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                                                           AS `Objetivo`,
                    COALESCE((`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`), 0)                                       AS `Cumplimiento`,
                    `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                                                 AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
                    COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                                                       AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
                    COALESCE(if(((`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                                ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) * (`v3`.`Clientes` / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                             0)                                                                              AS `PesoCumplimiento`
             FROM (((SELECT `vta`.`ANIO`                       AS `ANIO`,
                            `vta`.`MES`                        AS `Mes`,
                            `vta`.`AGENCIA`                    AS `AGENCIA`,
                            `vta`.`CANAL`                      AS `CANAL`,
                            `vta`.`Ruta`                       AS `Ruta`,
                            COUNT(DISTINCT `vta`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AS `Clientes`
                     FROM (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)  AS `ANIO`,
                                  MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) AS `MES`,
                                  `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`        AS `AGENCIA`,
                                  `c`.`COD_CANAL`          AS `CANAL`,
                                  LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)  AS `Ruta`,
                                  `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`         AS `ID_CLIENTE`
                           FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                  ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                 ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
                           WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 8) AND
                                  (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` IN (74710, 74709, 71385)) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'COB'))
                           GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6) AS `vta`
                     GROUP BY 1, 2, 5) AS `v3` LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
                    ON (`v3`.`CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
                   ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND (`v3`.`Ruta` = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
             WHERE (`obj`.`Id` = 12000017)
             GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, `v3`.`Clientes`, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11)) AS `SUB`
      UNION ALL
      (SELECT YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                              AS `Anio`,
              MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                             AS `Mes`,
              `c`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                    AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
              `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                                      AS `COD_CANAL`,
              LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                              AS `Ruta`,
              (COUNT(DISTINCT `vp`.`ID_CLIENTE`)!:>decimal(45,8) NULL)             AS `CajasReales`,
              COALESCE(`objr`.`Objetivo`, 0)                                       AS `Objetivo`,
              COALESCE((COUNT(DISTINCT `vp`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`), 0) AS `Cumplimiento`,
              `obj`.`Nombre_Objetitvo`                                             AS `Nombre_Objetitvo`,
              COALESCE(`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`, 0)                                   AS `Peso_Objetivo`,
              COALESCE(if(((COUNT(DISTINCT `vp`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`) > 1), (`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100),
                          ((`obj`.`Peso_Objetivo` / 100) * (COUNT(DISTINCT `vp`.`ID_CLIENTE`) / `objr`.`Objetivo`))),
                       0)                                                          AS `PesoCumplimiento`
       FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `vp` JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                ON (`vp`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
               ON (`vp`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Objetivos_Estrategicos` as `obj`
              ON (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = `obj`.`Cod_Canal`)) LEFT JOIN `COM_Obj_Estr_Rutas` as `objr`
             ON ((`obj`.`Id` = `objr`.`Objetivo_Id`) AND (LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) = `objr`.`Ruta`)))
       WHERE ((YEAR(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 2025) AND (MONTH(`vp`.`DATE_CONTA`) = 8) AND
              (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` IN (73436, 74512, 74513, 73437, 73434, 74519, 73435, 74511)) AND
              (`obj`.`Id` = 12000018) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'COB'))
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, `objr`.`Ruta`, `objr`.`Objetivo`, 9, `obj`.`Peso_Objetivo`
       HAVING (SUM(`vp`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`) >= 1))) AS `SUB`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_Puratos_Products as
SELECT DISTINCT `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` AS `ID_PRODUCTO`
FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
       ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
      ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024)) AND
       (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN (' ')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND
       (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` = '315'))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_Puratos_Sales as
SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                           AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                          AS `mes`,
       `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
       SUM((`f`.`CANT_VENDIDA` + `f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`)) AS `Unidades`
FROM ((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
       ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
      ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024)) AND
       (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN (' ')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND
       (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`p`.`COD_MARCA` = '315'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, `p`.`COD_2_PROD`, `p`.`DESC_PROD_1`
ORDER BY 1, 2 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_RUTA_DIA as
SELECT YEAR(CURDATE())            AS `anio`,
       MONTH(CURDATE())           AS `mes`,
       CURDATE()                  AS `fecha`,
       (DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 1) AS `dia_ruta`,
       `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`           AS `id_cliente`,
       `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`          AS `nombre_cliente`,
       LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)    AS `ruta`,
       `c`.`COD_RUTA`             AS `id_ruta`,
       `c`.`COD_STATUS`           AS `id_estado`,
       `c`.`NOM_STATUS`           AS `estado`,
       NOW()                      AS `TMSTP`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
WHERE ((DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 1) = `c`.`COD_DIA_VISITA`)
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view TMP_UNIV_TAT as
SELECT `DIM_CLIENTE`.`COD_AGENCIA`                AS `COD_AGENCIA`,
       LEFT(`DIM_CLIENTE`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)          AS `Ruta`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT `DIM_CLIENTE`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AS `Total`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `DIM_CLIENTE`
WHERE ((`DIM_CLIENTE`.`COD_STATUS` IN ('ACT', 'INA', 'MOR', 'DRE', 'REA')) AND (`DIM_CLIENTE`.`COD_CANAL` = 'COB'))
GROUP BY 1, 2 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view Tmp_Danec_PyG_Canal as
SELECT `Danec_Pyg_CANAL`.`Anio`                            AS `anio`,
       `Danec_Pyg_CANAL`.`Mes`                             AS `mes`,
       `Danec_Pyg_CANAL`.`Id_Canal`                        AS `Id_Canal`,
       SUM(`Danec_Pyg_CANAL`.`Tons`)                       AS `Toneladas`,
       SUM(`Danec_Pyg_CANAL`.`Facturacion`)                AS `Facturacion`,
       SUM(`Danec_Pyg_CANAL`.`Costo_de_Venta`)             AS `Costo_Venta`,
       SUM(`Danec_Pyg_CANAL`.`Ajuste_Mano_Obra_Indirecta`) AS `Ajuste_MO_Indirecta`,
       SUM(`Danec_Pyg_CANAL`.`Ajuste_Refinacion`)          AS `Ajuste_Costos_Indirectos_Refinacion`,
       SUM(`Danec_Pyg_CANAL`.`Costo_de_Venta_Ajustado`)    AS `Costo_Venta_Ajust`,
       SUM(`Danec_Pyg_CANAL`.`Margen_Ajustado`)            AS `Margen_Contribucion`,
