                                                                            LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) =
                                                                         `r`.`Codigo`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Agencias` as `a`
      ON (`r`.`Agencia_Id` = `a`.`Id`))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2024, 2025, 2026)) AND (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
       (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 11, 17 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view com_ventas_diario as
SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                           AS `Anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                          AS `Mes`,
       `f`.`DATE_CONTA`                                 AS `fecha`,
       `c`.`COD_CANAL`                                  AS `COD_CANAL`,
       `a`.`Nombre`                                     AS `Agencia`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`c`.`COD_CANAL` LIKE '%DIS%') THEN `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`
           ELSE if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                   if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2), `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`, LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                   LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) END         AS `Ruta`,
       ''                                               AS `Supervisor`,
       `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                 AS `ID_CLIENTE`,
       `c`.`NOM_CLIENTE`                                AS `NOM_CLIENTE`,
       `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                AS `ID_PRODUCTO`,
       `f`.`SERVICIO`                                   AS `SERVICIO`,
       SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))    AS `TON`,
       SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                     AS `USD`,
       SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                AS `Margen`,
       SUM((`f`.`VENTA_CAJ_REAL` + `f`.`DEV_CAJ_REAL`)) AS `CJ_Real`,
       SUM((`f`.`CANT_VENDIDA` + `f`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`)) AS `Unidades`,
       `f`.`ETL_TSTAMP`                                 AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
FROM ((((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
           ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
          ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Productos` as `hom`
         ON ((`hom`.`Marca_id` = `p`.`COD_MARCA`) AND (`hom`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
             (`hom`.`Mes_Calculo` = 1))) LEFT JOIN `HOM_Mayoristas_Clientes` as `homc`
        ON ((`homc`.`CODIGO_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`) AND (`homc`.`Anio_Calculo` = 2025) AND
            (`homc`.`Mes_Calculo` = 1))) LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `r` ON (if((NOT ISNULL(`homc`.`ID`)),
                                                                            if((`hom`.`Tipo_Portafolio` = 2),
                                                                               `homc`.`NUEVA_ZONA`,
                                                                               LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)),
                                                                            LEFT(`c`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)) =
                                                                         `r`.`Codigo`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Agencias` as `a`
      ON (`r`.`Agencia_Id` = `a`.`Id`))
WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2023, 2024, 2025)) AND (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
       (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101') AND
       (`f`.`DATE_CONTA` >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')) AND
       (`f`.`DATE_CONTA` <= LAST_DAY(NOW())))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 11, 17 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view com_ventas_rangos as
SELECT `VW_Sales_Cliente`.`Anio`        AS `anio`,
       `VW_Sales_Cliente`.`Mes`         AS `mes`,
       `VW_Sales_Cliente`.`ID_CLIENTE`  AS `id_cliente`,
       `VW_Sales_Cliente`.`Ruta`        AS `ruta`,
       SUM(`VW_Sales_Cliente`.`TON`)    AS `Toneladas`,
       SUM(`VW_Sales_Cliente`.`USD`)    AS `Facturacion`,
       CASE
           WHEN (SUM(`VW_Sales_Cliente`.`USD`) BETWEEN -9999 AND 20) THEN '(0 a 20)'
           WHEN ((SUM(`VW_Sales_Cliente`.`USD`) > 20) AND (SUM(`VW_Sales_Cliente`.`USD`) <= 40)) THEN '(20 a 40)'
           WHEN ((SUM(`VW_Sales_Cliente`.`USD`) > 40) AND (SUM(`VW_Sales_Cliente`.`USD`) <= 100)) THEN '(40 a 100)'
           WHEN ((SUM(`VW_Sales_Cliente`.`USD`) > 100) AND (SUM(`VW_Sales_Cliente`.`USD`) <= 200)) THEN '(100 a 200)'
           ELSE '(201 en adelante)' END AS `Rango_Facturacion`
FROM `VW_Sales_Cliente` as `VW_Sales_Cliente`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view com_ventas_resumen as
SELECT `a`.`Anio`                   AS `anio`,
       `a`.`Mes`                    AS `mes`,
       `a`.`Agencia`                AS `agencia`,
       `a`.`COD_CANAL`              AS `canal`,
       CASE
           WHEN (NOT ISNULL(`c`.`codigo_ruta`)) THEN `c`.`cod_televenta`
           WHEN (`b`.`cod_unidad_negocio` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ'
           ELSE `a`.`COD_CANAL` END AS `cod_canal`,
       `b`.`segmento`               AS `cod_un_negocio`,
       `b`.`cod_familia`            AS `cod_familia`,
       `b`.`nombre_familia`         AS `nombre_familia`,
       `b`.`cod_marca`              AS `cod_marca`,
       `b`.`nombre_marca`           AS `nombre_marca`,
       `a`.`Ruta`                   AS `Ruta`,
       SUM(`a`.`TON`)               AS `toneladas`,
       SUM(`a`.`USD`)               AS `dolares`,
       SUM(`a`.`Margen`)            AS `margen`,
       MAX(`a`.`ETL_TSTAMP`)        AS `etl_tstamp`,
       SUM(`a`.`CJ_Real`)           AS `cajas_reales`,
       SUM(`a`.`Unidades`)          AS `unidades`
FROM ((`VW_Sales_Cliente` as `a` LEFT JOIN `vw_res_productos` as `b`
       ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `com_televenta_rutas` as `c`
      ON (`a`.`Ruta` = `c`.`codigo_ruta`))
WHERE ((`a`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND (`a`.`Anio` >= '2023'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view danec_avance as
SELECT COALESCE(`v`.`anio`, `p`.`anio`)                     AS `anio`,
       COALESCE(`v`.`mes`, `p`.`mes`)                       AS `mes`,
       COALESCE(`v`.`cod_canal`, `p`.`cod_canal`)           AS `cod_canal`,
       COALESCE(`v`.`unidad_negocio`, `p`.`unidad_negocio`) AS `unidad_negocio`,
       `v`.`ventas_toneladas`                               AS `ventas_toneladas`,
       `v`.`ventas_dolares`                                 AS `ventas_dolares`,
       `v`.`margen`                                         AS `margen`,
       `p`.`presupuesto_toneladas`                          AS `ppto_toneladas`,
       `p`.`presupuesto_dolares`                            AS `ppto_dolares`
FROM ((SELECT `VENTAS_RAW`.`anio`           AS `anio`,
              `VENTAS_RAW`.`mes`            AS `mes`,
              `VENTAS_RAW`.`cod_canal`      AS `cod_canal`,
              `VENTAS_RAW`.`unidad_negocio` AS `unidad_negocio`,
              SUM(`VENTAS_RAW`.`toneladas`) AS `ventas_toneladas`,
              SUM(`VENTAS_RAW`.`dolares`)   AS `ventas_dolares`,
              SUM(`VENTAS_RAW`.`margen`)    AS `margen`
       FROM (SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                       AS `anio`,
                    MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                      AS `mes`,
                    if((`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ'), 'MAQ', `c`.`COD_CANAL`) AS `cod_canal`,
                    `b`.`segmento`                                               AS `unidad_negocio`,
                    ((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000)                     AS `toneladas`,
                    `f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`                                      AS `dolares`,
                    `f`.`MARGEN`                                                 AS `margen`
             FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                     ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                    ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `b`
                   ON (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`id_producto`))
             WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) >= 2024) AND (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                    (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND (`f`.`ID_COMPANIA` = '101'))) AS `VENTAS_RAW`
       GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4) AS `v` FULL  JOIN  ( SELECT `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`.`Anio` AS `anio`, `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`.`Mes` AS `mes`, `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`.`Cod_Canal` AS `cod_canal`, `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`.`Unidad_Negocio` AS `unidad_negocio`, `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`.`Toneladas` AS `presupuesto_toneladas`, `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`.`Dolares` AS `presupuesto_dolares` FROM `DW_Presupuesto_Danec` as `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`  ) AS `p` ON ((`v`.`anio` = `p`.`anio`) AND (`v`.`mes` = `p`.`mes`) AND (`v`.`cod_canal` = `p`.`cod_canal`) AND (`v`.`unidad_negocio` = `p`.`unidad_negocio`)))
ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view danec_kardex_mes as
SELECT YEAR(`k`.`FECHAT`)                                                                    AS `year`,
       MONTH(`k`.`FECHAT`)                                                                   AS `month`,
       `k`.`ITEM`                                                                            AS `ITEM`,
       if((`k`.`ITEM` = 'D0090037032'), 'ACEITE HIBRIDO CPO IP         ', `k`.`DESCRIPCION`) AS `DESCRIPCION`,
       (SUM(`k`.`CANTIDAD`) / 1000)                                                          AS `TotalTon`,
       SUM(`k`.`COSTOTOTAL`)                                                                 AS `CostoTotal`,
       ((SUM(`k`.`COSTOTOTAL`) / SUM(`k`.`CANTIDAD`)) * 1000)                                AS `CostoPorTon`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_KARDEX` as `k`
WHERE ((YEAR(`k`.`FECHAT`) IN (2023, 2024, 2025, 2026, 2027)) AND (`k`.`TIPODOC` = 'IM') AND
       (`k`.`BODEGA` LIKE '%FAB101%') AND (`k`.`ITEM` IN
                                           ('D0090001032', 'D0090011032', 'D5060137032', 'D0090002032', 'D0090037032',
                                            'D0090018032', 'D0090003032')))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, `k`.`DESCRIPCION`
ORDER BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view danec_mercadeo as
SELECT YEAR(`FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`FECHA`)      AS `anio`,
       MONTH(`FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`FECHA`)     AS `mes`,
       `FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`CMARCA`           AS `cod_marca`,
       `FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`NMARCA`           AS `nonbre_marca`,
       `FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`CCATEGORIA`       AS `cod_categoria`,
       `FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`NCATEGORIA`       AS `nombre_categoria`,
       `FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`NACTIVIDAD`       AS `actividad`,
       `FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`CCANAL`           AS `cod_canal`,
       `FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`NCANAL`           AS `nombre_canal`,
       SUM(`FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`PRESUPUESTO`) AS `ppto`,
       SUM(`FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`PROYECTADO`)  AS `proy`,
       SUM(`FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`MENSUAL`)     AS `mensual`,
       SUM(`FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`.`INVENTARIO`)  AS `inventario`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER` as `FAC_GASTOS_PRESUPUESTO_MER`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view danec_productos_rentabilidad as
SELECT `productos_margen`.`id_producto`                                                                              AS `id_producto`,
       `productos_margen`.`segmento_producto`                                                                        AS `segmento_producto`,
       `productos_margen`.`total_toneladas`                                                                          AS `total_toneladas`,
       `productos_margen`.`total_dolares`                                                                            AS `total_dolares`,
       `productos_margen`.`total_margen`                                                                             AS `total_margen`,
       `productos_margen`.`participacion_ventas_porcentaje`                                                          AS `participacion_ventas_porcentaje`,
       `productos_margen`.`participacion_margen_porcentaje`                                                          AS `participacion_margen_porcentaje`,
       `productos_margen`.`participacion_margen_segmento_porcentaje`                                                 AS `participacion_margen_segmento_porcentaje`,
       `productos_margen`.`costo_produccion_tonelada`                                                                AS `costo_produccion_tonelada`,
       `productos_margen`.`ticket_promedio`                                                                          AS `ticket_promedio`,
       `productos_margen`.`promedio_toneladas_mes`                                                                   AS `promedio_toneladas_mes`,
       `productos_margen`.`promedio_dolares_mes`                                                                     AS `promedio_dolares_mes`,
       `productos_margen`.`promedio_margen_mes`                                                                      AS `promedio_margen_mes`,
       `productos_margen`.`total_clientes`                                                                           AS `total_clientes`,
       `productos_margen`.`promedio_clientes_mes`                                                                    AS `promedio_clientes_mes`,
       `productos_margen`.`total_transacciones`                                                                      AS `total_transacciones`,
       `productos_margen`.`promedio_transacciones_mes`                                                               AS `promedio_transacciones_mes`,
       `productos_margen`.`meses_con_venta`                                                                          AS `meses_con_venta`,
       `productos_margen`.`semanas_con_venta`                                                                        AS `semanas_con_venta`,
       ROUND(((100 * SUM(`productos_margen`.`total_margen`)
                         OVER (PARTITION BY `productos_margen`.`segmento_producto` ORDER BY `productos_margen`.`total_margen` DESC)) /
              SUM(`productos_margen`.`total_margen`) OVER (PARTITION BY `productos_margen`.`segmento_producto`)),
             2)                                                                                                      AS `porcentaje_margen_acumulado_segmento`,
       CASE
           WHEN (ROUND(((100 * SUM(`productos_margen`.`total_margen`)
                                   OVER (PARTITION BY `productos_margen`.`segmento_producto` ORDER BY `productos_margen`.`total_margen` DESC)) /
                        SUM(`productos_margen`.`total_margen`)
                            OVER (PARTITION BY `productos_margen`.`segmento_producto`)), 2) <= 50) THEN 'AAA'
           WHEN (ROUND(((100 * SUM(`productos_margen`.`total_margen`)
                                   OVER (PARTITION BY `productos_margen`.`segmento_producto` ORDER BY `productos_margen`.`total_margen` DESC)) /
                        SUM(`productos_margen`.`total_margen`)
                            OVER (PARTITION BY `productos_margen`.`segmento_producto`)), 2) <= 80) THEN 'A'
           WHEN (ROUND(((100 * SUM(`productos_margen`.`total_margen`)
                                   OVER (PARTITION BY `productos_margen`.`segmento_producto` ORDER BY `productos_margen`.`total_margen` DESC)) /
                        SUM(`productos_margen`.`total_margen`)
                            OVER (PARTITION BY `productos_margen`.`segmento_producto`)), 2) <= 95) THEN 'B'
           WHEN (ROUND(((100 * SUM(`productos_margen`.`total_margen`)
                                   OVER (PARTITION BY `productos_margen`.`segmento_producto` ORDER BY `productos_margen`.`total_margen` DESC)) /
                        SUM(`productos_margen`.`total_margen`)
                            OVER (PARTITION BY `productos_margen`.`segmento_producto`)), 2) <= 99) THEN 'C'
           ELSE 'D' END                                                                                              AS `clasificacion_producto`
FROM (SELECT `a`.`id_producto`                                                                                  AS `id_producto`,
             `p`.`segmento`                                                                                     AS `segmento_producto`,
             ROUND(SUM(`a`.`toneldas`), 2)                                                                      AS `total_toneladas`,
             ROUND(SUM(`a`.`facturacion`), 2)                                                                   AS `total_dolares`,
             ROUND(SUM(`a`.`margen`), 2)                                                                        AS `total_margen`,
             ROUND(((SUM(`a`.`facturacion`) / `t`.`total_facturacion_empresa`) * 100),
                   2)                                                                                           AS `participacion_ventas_porcentaje`,
             ROUND(((SUM(`a`.`margen`) / `t`.`total_margen_empresa`) * 100), 2)                                 AS `participacion_margen_porcentaje`,
             ROUND(((SUM(`a`.`margen`) / `s`.`total_margen_segmento`) * 100),
                   2)                                                                                           AS `participacion_margen_segmento_porcentaje`,
             ROUND((SUM(`a`.`costo_produccion`) / SUM(`a`.`toneldas`)), 2)                                      AS `costo_produccion_tonelada`,
             ROUND((SUM(`a`.`facturacion`) / COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(`a`.`id_cliente`, '_', `a`.`fecha`))),
                   2)                                                                                           AS `ticket_promedio`,
             ROUND((SUM(`a`.`toneldas`) / COUNT(DISTINCT `a`.`mes`)), 2)                                        AS `promedio_toneladas_mes`,
             ROUND((SUM(`a`.`facturacion`) / COUNT(DISTINCT `a`.`mes`)), 2)                                     AS `promedio_dolares_mes`,
             ROUND((SUM(`a`.`margen`) / COUNT(DISTINCT `a`.`mes`)), 2)                                          AS `promedio_margen_mes`,
             COUNT(DISTINCT `a`.`id_cliente`)                                                                   AS `total_clientes`,
             ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT `a`.`id_cliente`) / COUNT(DISTINCT `a`.`mes`)),
                   2)                                                                                           AS `promedio_clientes_mes`,
             COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(`a`.`id_cliente`, '_', `a`.`fecha`))                                         AS `total_transacciones`,
             ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(`a`.`id_cliente`, '_', `a`.`fecha`)) / COUNT(DISTINCT `a`.`mes`)),
                   2)                                                                                           AS `promedio_transacciones_mes`,
             COUNT(DISTINCT `a`.`mes`)                                                                          AS `meses_con_venta`,
             COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(`a`.`fecha`, '%Y-%u'))                                                  AS `semanas_con_venta`
      FROM (((`com_productos_rentabilidad` as `a` LEFT JOIN `vw_res_productos` as `p`
              ON (`a`.`id_producto` = `p`.`id_producto`)) JOIN (SELECT SUM(`com_productos_rentabilidad`.`facturacion`) AS `total_facturacion_empresa`,
                                                                       SUM(`com_productos_rentabilidad`.`margen`)      AS `total_margen_empresa`
                                                                FROM `com_productos_rentabilidad` as `com_productos_rentabilidad`) AS `t`) LEFT JOIN (SELECT `p`.`segmento`    AS `segmento`,
                                                                                                                                                             SUM(`a`.`margen`) AS `total_margen_segmento`
                                                                                                                                                      FROM (`com_productos_rentabilidad` as `a` LEFT JOIN `vw_res_productos` as `p`
                                                                                                                                                            ON (`a`.`id_producto` = `p`.`id_producto`))
                                                                                                                                                      GROUP BY 1) AS `s`
            ON (`p`.`segmento` = `s`.`segmento`))
      GROUP BY 1, 2, `t`.`total_facturacion_empresa`, `t`.`total_margen_empresa`,
               `s`.`total_margen_segmento`) AS `productos_margen`
ORDER BY 2, 5 DESC
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view danec_seguimiento_optimus as
SELECT `a`.`anio`                                                                     AS `anio`,
       `a`.`mes`                                                                      AS `mes`,
       TO_DATE(CONCAT(`a`.`anio`, '-', LPAD(`a`.`mes`, 2, '0'), '-01'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS `fecha`,
       `b`.`nombre_agencia`                                                           AS `nombre_agencia`,
       `c`.`nombre_canal`                                                             AS `nombre_canal`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT `a`.`id_cliente`)                                               AS `numero_clientes`,
       SUM(`a`.`ton`)                                                                 AS `toneladas`,
       SUM(`a`.`USD`)                                                                 AS `dolares`
FROM ((`com_ventas_detalle` as `a` LEFT JOIN `com_rutas_detalle` as `b`
       ON (`a`.`ruta` = `b`.`ruta`)) LEFT JOIN `com_canales` as `c` ON (`a`.`cod_canal` = `c`.`codigo_canal`))
WHERE ((`a`.`anio` >= 2024) AND (`a`.`cod_canal` IN ('COB', 'TEL', 'PAN', 'HOR', 'MAY')))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view danec_seguimiento_ventas as
SELECT `c`.`Anio`                          AS `Anio`,
       `c`.`Mes`                           AS `Mes`,
       `c`.`Cod_Canal`                     AS `Cod_Canal`,
       `c`.`Unidad_Negocio`                AS `Unidad_Negocio`,
       COALESCE(`v`.`ventas_toneladas`, 0) AS `ventas_toneladas`,
       COALESCE(`v`.`ventas_dolares`, 0)   AS `ventas_dolares`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Toneladas`, 0)        AS `ppto_toneladas`,
       COALESCE(`p`.`Dolares`, 0)          AS `ppto_dolares`,
       COALESCE(`v`.`Margen`, 0)           AS `margen`
FROM (((SELECT DISTINCT `SUB`.`Anio`           AS `Anio`,
                        `SUB`.`Mes`            AS `Mes`,
                        `SUB`.`Cod_Canal`      AS `Cod_Canal`,
                        `SUB`.`Unidad_Negocio` AS `Unidad_Negocio`
        FROM (SELECT DISTINCT (`ventas_resumen`.`Anio`!:>double NULL) AS `Anio`,
                              (`ventas_resumen`.`Mes`!:>double NULL)  AS `Mes`,
                              `ventas_resumen`.`cod_canal`            AS `Cod_Canal`,
                              `ventas_resumen`.`unidad_negocio`       AS `Unidad_Negocio`
              FROM (SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                       AS `Anio`,
                           MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                      AS `Mes`,
                           if((`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ'), 'MAQ', `c`.`COD_CANAL`) AS `cod_canal`,
                           `b`.`segmento`                                               AS `unidad_negocio`,
                           SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))                AS `ventas_toneladas`,
                           SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                                 AS `ventas_dolares`,
                           SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                            AS `Margen`
                    FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                            ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                           ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `b`
                          ON (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`id_producto`))
                    WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2023, 2024, 2025, 2026)) AND
                           (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')))
                    GROUP BY 1, 2, `c`.`COD_CANAL`, `b`.`unidad_negocio`) AS `ventas_resumen`
              UNION ALL
              (SELECT DISTINCT `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`.`Anio`           AS `Anio`,
                               `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`.`Mes`            AS `Mes`,
                               `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`.`Cod_Canal`      AS `Cod_Canal`,
                               `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`.`Unidad_Negocio` AS `Unidad_Negocio`
               FROM `DW_Presupuesto_Danec` as `DW_Presupuesto_Danec`)) AS `SUB`) AS `c` LEFT JOIN (SELECT YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                       AS `Anio`,
                                                                                                          MONTH(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`)                                      AS `Mes`,
                                                                                                          if((`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ'), 'MAQ', `c`.`COD_CANAL`) AS `cod_canal`,
                                                                                                          `b`.`segmento`                                               AS `unidad_negocio`,
                                                                                                          SUM(((`f`.`VENTA_KG` + `f`.`DEV_KG`) / 1000))                AS `ventas_toneladas`,
                                                                                                          SUM(`f`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`)                                 AS `ventas_dolares`,
                                                                                                          SUM(`f`.`MARGEN`)                                            AS `Margen`
                                                                                                   FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `f` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
                                                                                                           ON (`f`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
                                                                                                          ON (`f`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `com_producto` as `b`
                                                                                                         ON (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`id_producto`))
                                                                                                   WHERE ((YEAR(`f`.`DATE_CONTA`) IN (2023, 2024, 2025, 2026)) AND
                                                                                                          (`f`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
                                                                                                          (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')))
                                                                                                   GROUP BY 1, 2, `c`.`COD_CANAL`, `b`.`unidad_negocio`) AS `v`
       ON ((`c`.`Anio` = `v`.`Anio`) AND (`c`.`Mes` = `v`.`Mes`) AND (`c`.`Cod_Canal` = `v`.`cod_canal`) AND
           (`c`.`Unidad_Negocio` = `v`.`unidad_negocio`))) LEFT JOIN `DW_Presupuesto_Danec` as `p`
      ON ((`c`.`Anio` = `p`.`Anio`) AND (`c`.`Mes` = `p`.`Mes`) AND (`c`.`Cod_Canal` = `p`.`Cod_Canal`) AND
          (`c`.`Unidad_Negocio` = `p`.`Unidad_Negocio`)))
ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view finanzas_resumen_ventas_fpa as
SELECT `a`.`Anio`                            AS `anio`,
       `a`.`Mes`                             AS `mes`,
       `b`.`segmento`                        AS `unidad_negocio`,
       'USD'                                 AS `descripcion`,
       `a`.`COD_CANAL`                       AS `codigo_canal`,
       `c`.`id_agencia`                      AS `id_agencia`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`a`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('AUT', 'DIS')) OR (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` IN
                                                         (857062, 1054602, 140147, 374633, 85470, 139831, 139827,
                                                          987473, 1055186, 139976, 140146, 139099, 80141, 1055663,
                                                          721621, 80146, 142407, 151837, 140049, 767898, 242597, 95678,
                                                          140150, 89054, 129550, 289603, 778237, 117087, 1054550,
                                                          139836, 564340, 89978, 497151, 343556, 87592, 449208, 128456,
                                                          348721, 69314, 281837, 144075, 133952, 331965, 523588,
                                                          1119769, 1055145, 140048, 651384, 264545)))
               THEN `c`.`id_cliente`
           ELSE 0 END                        AS `id_cliente`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`a`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('AUT', 'DIS')) OR (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` IN
                                                         (857062, 1054602, 140147, 374633, 85470, 139831, 139827,
                                                          987473, 1055186, 139976, 140146, 139099, 80141, 1055663,
                                                          721621, 80146, 142407, 151837, 140049, 767898, 242597, 95678,
                                                          140150, 89054, 129550, 289603, 778237, 117087, 1054550,
                                                          139836, 564340, 89978, 497151, 343556, 87592, 449208, 128456,
                                                          348721, 69314, 281837, 144075, 133952, 331965, 523588,
                                                          1119769, 1055145, 140048, 651384, 264545)))
               THEN `c`.`nombre_cliente`
           ELSE 'Resto clientes' END         AS `nombre_cliente`,
       `a`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                     AS `id_producto`,
       `b`.`nombre_producto`                 AS `nombre_producto`,
       `c`.`id_agencia`                      AS `agencia`,
       (SUM(`a`.`USD`)!:>decimal(65,8) NULL) AS `valor`
FROM ((`com_ventas` as `a` LEFT JOIN `vw_res_productos` as `b`
       ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `com_clientes` as `c`
      ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`id_cliente`))
WHERE (`a`.`Anio` >= 2024)
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10
UNION ALL
(SELECT `a`.`Anio`                    AS `anio`,
        `a`.`Mes`                     AS `mes`,
        `b`.`segmento`                AS `unidad_negocio`,
        'TON'                         AS `descripcion`,
        `a`.`COD_CANAL`               AS `codigo_canal`,
        `c`.`id_agencia`              AS `id_agencia`,
        CASE
            WHEN ((`a`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('AUT', 'DIS')) OR (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` IN
                                                          (857062, 1054602, 140147, 374633, 85470, 139831, 139827,
                                                           987473, 1055186, 139976, 140146, 139099, 80141, 1055663,
                                                           721621, 80146, 142407, 151837, 140049, 767898, 242597, 95678,
                                                           140150, 89054, 129550, 289603, 778237, 117087, 1054550,
                                                           139836, 564340, 89978, 497151, 343556, 87592, 449208, 128456,
                                                           348721, 69314, 281837, 144075, 133952, 331965, 523588,
                                                           1119769, 1055145, 140048, 651384, 264545)))
                THEN `c`.`id_cliente`
            ELSE 0 END                AS `id_cliente`,
        CASE
            WHEN ((`a`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('AUT', 'DIS')) OR (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` IN
                                                          (857062, 1054602, 140147, 374633, 85470, 139831, 139827,
                                                           987473, 1055186, 139976, 140146, 139099, 80141, 1055663,
                                                           721621, 80146, 142407, 151837, 140049, 767898, 242597, 95678,
                                                           140150, 89054, 129550, 289603, 778237, 117087, 1054550,
                                                           139836, 564340, 89978, 497151, 343556, 87592, 449208, 128456,
                                                           348721, 69314, 281837, 144075, 133952, 331965, 523588,
                                                           1119769, 1055145, 140048, 651384, 264545)))
                THEN `c`.`nombre_cliente`
            ELSE 'Resto clientes' END AS `nombre_cliente`,
        `a`.`ID_PRODUCTO`             AS `id_producto`,
        `b`.`nombre_producto`         AS `nombre_producto`,
        `c`.`id_agencia`              AS `agencia`,
        SUM(`a`.`TON`)                AS `valor`
 FROM ((`com_ventas` as `a` LEFT JOIN `vw_res_productos` as `b`
        ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `com_clientes` as `c`
       ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`id_cliente`))
 WHERE (`a`.`Anio` >= 2024)
 GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10)
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view res_gasto_op as
SELECT TO_DATE(`FAC_GASTOOPERAT_VENTAS`.`PERIODO`, 'YYYYMM') AS `periodo`,
       `FAC_GASTOOPERAT_VENTAS`.`N_SECCION_GO`               AS `tipo_gasto`,
       TRIM(`FAC_GASTOOPERAT_VENTAS`.`AGENCIA`)              AS `codigo_agencia`,
       RIGHT(TRIM(`FAC_GASTOOPERAT_VENTAS`.`AGENCIA`), 3)    AS `agencia`,
       TRIM(`FAC_GASTOOPERAT_VENTAS`.`DESCUENTA`)            AS `cuenta`,
       CASE
           WHEN (TRIM(`FAC_GASTOOPERAT_VENTAS`.`DESCUENTA`) IN
                 ('REMUNERACIÓN NOMINA', 'COMISIÓN', 'BENEFICIOS SOCIALES', 'BENEFICIO EMPRESA'))
               THEN TRIM(`FAC_GASTOOPERAT_VENTAS`.`DESCUENTA`)
           ELSE 'OTRAS CUENTAS' END                          AS `cuenta_agrupada`,
       SUM(`FAC_GASTOOPERAT_VENTAS`.`IMPORTE`)               AS `gasto`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_GASTOOPERAT_VENTAS` as `FAC_GASTOOPERAT_VENTAS`
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view temp_cl_coh as
SELECT `b`.`fecha`                                                     AS `fecha`,
       `d`.`COD_CANAL`                                                 AS `codigo_canal`,
       `a`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                AS `codigo_cliente`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) AS `kilogramos`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0))                         AS `dolares`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`MARGEN`, 0))                                    AS `margen`
FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `b`
         ON (`a`.`ID_FECHA` = `b`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
        ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `d`
       ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `temp_fechas_clientes` as `e`
      ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `e`.`codigo_cliente`))
WHERE ((`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`b`.`mes` >= '2024-01-01') AND (`b`.`mes` <= '2024-10-01') AND (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` <> ' ') AND
       (`d`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL', 'OFI', 'EXP')) AND (`a`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
       (`e`.`primera_fecha_venta` >= '2024-01-01'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
ORDER BY 3 DESC
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view temp_cl_ret as
SELECT `b`.`fecha`                                                     AS `fecha`,
       `d`.`COD_CANAL`                                                 AS `codigo_canal`,
       `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                AS `codigo_cliente`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) AS `kilogramos`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0))                         AS `dolares`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`MARGEN`, 0))                                    AS `margen`
FROM (((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `b`
          ON (`a`.`ID_FECHA` = `b`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
         ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `d`
        ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `e`
       ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `e`.`ID_Producto`)) LEFT JOIN `MSR_PAN_MOJE` as `f`
      ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `f`.`Cod_Cliente`))
WHERE ((`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (YEAR(`b`.`mes`) = 2023) AND (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` <> ' ') AND
       (`d`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL', 'OFI', 'EXP')) AND (`a`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
       (`d`.`FECHA_CREACION` >= '2023-01-01'))
GROUP BY 1, `b`.`mes`, 3, `d`.`NOM_CLIENTE`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view temp_clientes_televenta as
SELECT LEFT(`DIM_CLIENTE`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) AS `ruta`,
       `DIM_CLIENTE`.`COD_RUTA`          AS `ruta_dia`,
       `DIM_CLIENTE`.`ID_CLIENTE`        AS `id_cliente`,
       `DIM_CLIENTE`.`COD_DIA_VISITA`    AS `dia_visita`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `DIM_CLIENTE`
WHERE (LEFT(`DIM_CLIENTE`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) IN ('ED', 'ET'))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view temp_estado_resulados as
SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
       1                                         AS `mes`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
       SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ENE_ACT`)  AS `valor`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
       (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
UNION ALL
SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
       2                                         AS `mes`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
       SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`FEB_ACT`)  AS `valor`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
       (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
UNION ALL
SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
       3                                         AS `mes`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
       SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`MAR_ACT`)  AS `valor`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
       (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
UNION ALL
SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
       4                                         AS `mes`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
       SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ABR_ACT`)  AS `valor`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
       (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
UNION ALL
SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
       5                                         AS `mes`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
       SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`MAY_ACT`)  AS `valor`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
       (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
UNION ALL
SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
       6                                         AS `mes`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
       SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`JUN_ACT`)  AS `valor`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
       (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
UNION ALL
SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
       7                                         AS `mes`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
       SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`JUL_ACT`)  AS `valor`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
       (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
UNION ALL
SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
       8                                         AS `mes`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
       SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`AGO_ACT`)  AS `valor`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
       (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
UNION ALL
SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
       9                                         AS `mes`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
       SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`SEP_ACT`)  AS `valor`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
       (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
UNION ALL
SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
       10                                        AS `mes`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
       SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`OCT_ACT`)  AS `valor`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
       (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
UNION ALL
SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
       11                                        AS `mes`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
       `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
       SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOV_ACT`)  AS `valor`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
       (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
UNION ALL
(SELECT `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL`   AS `anio`,
        12                                        AS `mes`,
        `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT27`       AS `D_CAT27`,
        `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT28`       AS `D_CAT28`,
        `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT29`       AS `D_CAT29`,
        `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`D_CAT30`       AS `D_CAT30`,
        `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`NOMBRE_CUENTA` AS `NOMBRE_CUENTA`,
        SUM(`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`DIC_ACT`)  AS `valor`
 FROM `DDM_ERP`.`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS` as `FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`
 WHERE ((`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`COMPANIA` IN ('INDUSTRIAL DANEC')) AND
        (`FAC_ESTADOS_FINANCIEROS`.`ANIO_FISCAL` BETWEEN '23' AND '24'))
 GROUP BY 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view temp_fechas_clientes as
SELECT `d`.`COD_CANAL`                                                 AS `codigo_canal`,
       `a`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                AS `codigo_cliente`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) AS `kilogramos`,
       MIN(`b`.`fecha`)                                                AS `primera_fecha_venta`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `b`
        ON (`a`.`ID_FECHA` = `b`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
       ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `d`
      ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
WHERE ((`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` <> ' ') AND (`d`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'REL', 'OFI', 'EXP')) AND
       (`a`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')))
GROUP BY 1, 2 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view temp_fechas_rutero_televenta as
SELECT `DIM_FECHA`.`fecha` AS `fecha`, `DIM_FECHA`.`dia_semana` AS `dia_semana`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `DIM_FECHA`
WHERE ((`DIM_FECHA`.`anio` >= 2024) AND (`DIM_FECHA`.`anio` <= 2025))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view temp_hor_ppt as
SELECT `a`.`Anio`                          AS `Anio`,
       `a`.`Mes`                           AS `Mes`,
       CASE
           WHEN (NOT ISNULL(`e`.`Cod_Producto`)) THEN 'B2B'
           WHEN (ISNULL(`e`.`Cod_Producto`) AND (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM'))) THEN 'B2C'
           ELSE `c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` END AS `segmento_producto`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`Toneladas`, 0))     AS `Toneladas`
FROM ((`DW_Presupuesto_SKU` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
       ON (`a`.`Producto_Id` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `e`
      ON (`a`.`Producto_Id` = `e`.`ID_Producto`))
WHERE (`a`.`Canal` IN ('Horecas'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view temp_hor_venta as
SELECT `b`.`anio`                                                               AS `anio`,
       MONTH(`b`.`mes`)                                                         AS `mes`,
       CASE
           WHEN (NOT ISNULL(`e`.`Cod_Producto`)) THEN 'B2B'
           WHEN (ISNULL(`e`.`Cod_Producto`) AND (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM'))) THEN 'B2C'
           ELSE `c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` END                                      AS `segmento_producto`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) / 1000) AS `VentaTon`
FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `b`
         ON (`a`.`ID_FECHA` = `b`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
        ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `d`
       ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `e` ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `e`.`ID_Producto`))
WHERE ((`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`b`.`anio` >= '2019') AND (`b`.`mes` <= '2024-05-01') AND (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN (' ')) AND
       (`d`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND (`d`.`COD_CANAL` IN ('HOR')) AND (`a`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')))
GROUP BY 1, 2, `d`.`COD_CANAL`, 3
ORDER BY 1 DESC
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view test as
SELECT `b`.`mes`                                                                   AS `periodo`,
       `c`.`NOM_SCLASIF_MCIA`                                                      AS `unidad_negocio`,
       `c`.`NOM_MARCA`                                                             AS `marca`,
       `c`.`NOM_FAMILIA`                                                           AS `familia`,
       `c`.`DESC_PROD_1`                                                           AS `nombre_producto`,
       `a`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                                           AS `id_producto`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0))                                     AS `facturacion`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) / 1000)    AS `toneldas`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_VENDIDA`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0))) AS `unidades`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`MARGEN`, 0))                                                AS `margen`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `b`
        ON (`a`.`ID_FECHA` = `b`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
       ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `d`
      ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
WHERE ((`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`b`.`anio` IN ('2023', '2022')) AND (`a`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view tmp_routes as
SELECT `GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`FECHA_INFO`    AS `fecha`,
       LEFT(`GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`RUTA`, 2) AS `ruta`,
       `GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`RUTA`          AS `cod_ruta`,
       `GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`ID`            AS `id_cliente`,
       `GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`STATUS`        AS `id_status`,
       `GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`PLANEADO`      AS `PLANEADO`,
       `GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`VISITADO`      AS `VISITADO`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`GEO_VISITA_TAT` as `GEO_VISITA_TAT`
WHERE ((`GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`FECHA_INFO` IN ('2024-12-09 00:00:00.000000')) AND
       (LEFT(`GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`RUTA`, 2) IN ('UR')))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view tmp_sales as
SELECT `b`.`fecha`                                                                 AS `fecha`,
       LEFT(`d`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                     AS `ruta`,
       `d`.`COD_RUTA`                                                              AS `cod_ruta`,
       `a`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                            AS `id_cliente`,
       `d`.`COD_STATUS`                                                            AS `id_status`,
       `d`.`COD_DIA_VISITA`                                                        AS `COD_DIA_VISITA`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0))                                     AS `dolares`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) / 1000)    AS `toneladas`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_VENDIDA`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0))) AS `unidades`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`MARGEN`, 0))                                                AS `Margen`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `b`
        ON (`a`.`ID_FECHA` = `b`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
       ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `d`
      ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
WHERE ((`a`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
       (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`b`.`anio` >= '2024') AND (`d`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')) AND (LEFT(`d`.`COD_RUTA`, 2) IN ('UR')) AND
       (`b`.`fecha` IN ('2024-12-09')))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 4, 3, 6 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_com_cumpl as
SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Anio`                                  AS `Anio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Mes`                                   AS `Mes`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Ruta`                                  AS `Ruta`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`UnidadNegocio`                         AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`                         AS `Prsp_CJ_Estad`,
       (`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`!:>decimal(45,8) NULL) AS `Venta_CJ_Estad`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Cumplimiento`                          AS `Cumplimiento`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`TotalCjEstad`                          AS `TotalCjEstad`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Minimo`                                AS `Minimo`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Maximo`                                AS `Maximo`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`Valor_Comision`                        AS `Valor_Comision`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`.`ValorComision`                         AS `ValorComision`,
       'COB'                                                          AS `canal`
FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_TAT`
UNION ALL
SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Anio`                                  AS `Anio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Mes`                                   AS `Mes`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Ruta`                                  AS `Ruta`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`UnidadNegocio`                         AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`                         AS `Prsp_CJ_Estad`,
       (`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`!:>decimal(45,8) NULL) AS `Venta_CJ_Estad`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Cumplimiento`                          AS `Cumplimiento`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`TotalCjEstad`                          AS `TotalCjEstad`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Minimo`                                AS `Minimo`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Maximo`                                AS `Maximo`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`Valor_Comision`                        AS `Valor_Comision`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`.`ValorComision`                         AS `ValorComision`,
       'MAY'                                                          AS `canal`
FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_MAY`
UNION ALL
SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Anio`                                  AS `Anio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Mes`                                   AS `Mes`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Ruta`                                  AS `Ruta`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Familia_Horecas`                       AS `UnidadNegocio`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Prsp_CJ_Estad`                         AS `Prsp_CJ_Estad`,
       (`CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Venta_CJ_Estad`!:>decimal(45,8) NULL) AS `Venta_CJ_Estad`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Cumplimiento`                          AS `Cumplimiento`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`TotalCjEstad`                          AS `TotalCjEstad`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Minimo`                                AS `Minimo`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Maximo`                                AS `Maximo`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`Valor_Comision`                        AS `Valor_Comision`,
       `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`.`ValorComision`                         AS `ValorComision`,
       'HOR'                                                          AS `canal`
FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_HOR`
UNION ALL
(SELECT `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Anio`                 AS `Anio`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Mes`                  AS `Mes`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Ruta`                 AS `Ruta`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Familia_Industriales` AS `UnidadNegocio`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Prsp_TON`             AS `Prsp_CJ_Estad`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Venta_TON`            AS `Venta_CJ_Estad`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Cumplimiento`         AS `Cumplimiento`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`TotalCjEstad`         AS `TotalCjEstad`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Minimo`               AS `Minimo`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Maximo`               AS `Maximo`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`Valor_Comision`       AS `Valor_Comision`,
        `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`.`ValorComision`        AS `ValorComision`,
        'IND'                                         AS `canal`
 FROM `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND` as `CL_COM_CUMPL_VOL_IND`)
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_com_ffvv as
SELECT `r`.`Nombre`          AS `nombre_ruta`,
       `r`.`Codigo`          AS `id_ruta`,
       `r`.`Agencia_Id`      AS `id_agencia`,
       `a`.`Nombre`          AS `nombre_agencia`,
       `r`.`Supervisor_Id`   AS `id_supervisor`,
       `u`.`Primer_Nombre`   AS `nombre_supervisor`,
       `u`.`Primer_Apellido` AS `apellido_supervisor`
FROM (((`MD_Rutas` as `r` LEFT JOIN `MD_Users` as `s`
        ON (`r`.`Supervisor_Id` = `s`.`Id`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Agencias` as `a`
       ON (`r`.`Agencia_Id` = `a`.`Id`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Users` as `u` ON (`r`.`Supervisor_Id` = `u`.`Id`))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_efv_rutas as
SELECT DATE(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`FECHA_INFO`)                                  AS `fecha`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`TIPO_CLIENTE`                                      AS `canal`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`AGENCIA`                                           AS `agencia`,
       LEFT(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`RUTA`, 2)                                     AS `ruta`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`RUTA`                                              AS `id_ruta`,
       RIGHT(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`RUTA`, 1)                                    AS `id_dia`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`ID`                                                AS `id_cliente`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`STATUS`                                            AS `id_status`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD`                                           AS `latitud`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LONGITUD`                                          AS `longitud`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD_VISITA`                                    AS `latitud_visita`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LONGITUD_VISITA`                                   AS `longitud_visita`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`PLANEADO`                                          AS `planificado`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`VISITADO`                                          AS `visitado`,
       (111139 * acos((((cos(radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD`)) * cos(radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD_VISITA`))) *
                        cos((radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LONGITUD_VISITA`) - radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LONGITUD`)))) +
                       (sin(radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD`)) *
                        sin(radians(`DW_Visitas_GPS`.`LATITUD_VISITA`)))))) AS `distancia_metros`,
       `DW_Visitas_GPS`.`HORA`                                              AS `hora`
FROM `DW_Visitas_GPS` as `DW_Visitas_GPS`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_efv_ventas as
SELECT `b`.`fecha`                                                                 AS `fecha`,
       `d`.`COD_CANAL`                                                             AS `canal`,
       `d`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                           AS `agencia`,
       LEFT(`d`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                                                     AS `ruta`,
       `d`.`COD_RUTA`                                                              AS `id_ruta`,
       `a`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                            AS `id_cliente`,
       `d`.`COD_STATUS`                                                            AS `id_status`,
       `d`.`COD_DIA_VISITA`                                                        AS `id_dia`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0))                                     AS `dolares`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) / 1000)    AS `toneladas`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_VENDIDA`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0))) AS `unidades`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`MARGEN`, 0))                                                AS `Margen`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `b`
        ON (`a`.`ID_FECHA` = `b`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
       ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `d`
      ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
WHERE ((`a`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND
       (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`b`.`anio` >= '2024') AND (`d`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999', 'EXP')))
GROUP BY 1, 4, 6, 5, 8 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_inventarios_actual as
SELECT `i`.`Fecha`         AS `Fecha`,
       `i`.`cod_producto`  AS `cod_producto`,
       `i`.`cod_ubicacion` AS `cod_ubicacion`,
       `i`.`cod_location`  AS `cod_location`,
       `i`.`nom_location`  AS `nom_location`,
       `i`.`cant_cjs_rls`  AS `cant_cjs_rls`,
       `i`.`cantidad_ton`  AS `cantidad_ton`
FROM (`VW_Inventarios` as `i` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p` ON (`i`.`cod_producto` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`))
WHERE ((`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`i`.`Fecha` = (SELECT MAX(`VW_Inventarios`.`Fecha`) AS `max(fecha)` FROM `VW_Inventarios` as `VW_Inventarios`)))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_ppto_ag_can_prod as
SELECT `a`.`Anio`                        AS `anio`,
       `a`.`Mes`                         AS `mes`,
       `b`.`Codigo`                      AS `cod_agencia`,
       `a`.`Canal`                       AS `codigo_canal`,
       `c`.`id_producto`                 AS `id_producto`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`Toneladas`, 0))   AS `toneladas`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`Facturacion`, 0)) AS `dolares`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`Margen`, 0))      AS `margen`
FROM (((`DW_Presupuesto_SKU` as `a` LEFT JOIN `vw_res_productos` as `c`
        ON (`a`.`Producto_Id` = `c`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `d`
       ON (`d`.`Codigo` = `a`.`Ruta`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Agencias` as `b` ON (`d`.`Agencia_Id` = `b`.`Id`))
WHERE (`a`.`Anio` >= 2025)
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_presupuesto_prod_sum as
SELECT `a`.`Anio`               AS `anio`,
       `a`.`Mes`                AS `mes`,
       `a`.`Codigo`             AS `Codigo`,
       `b`.`cod_unidad_negocio` AS `cod_un_neg`,
       `b`.`segmento`           AS `nombre_segmento`,
       `b`.`nombre_marca`       AS `nombre_marca`,
       `a`.`Canal`              AS `codigo_canal`,
       `b`.`id_producto`        AS `id_producto`,
       `b`.`nombre_producto`    AS `nombre_producto`,
       SUM(`a`.`Toneladas`)     AS `toneladas`,
       SUM(`a`.`Facturacion`)   AS `dolares`,
       SUM(`a`.`Margen`)        AS `margen`
FROM (`DW_Presupuesto_SKU` as `a` LEFT JOIN `vw_res_productos` as `b` ON (`a`.`Producto_Id` = `b`.`id_producto`))
WHERE (`a`.`Anio` IN ('2025'))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, `b`.`cod_producto`, 8, 8, 7 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_presupuesto_sum as
SELECT `p`.`Anio`                                                                               AS `anio`,
       `p`.`Mes`                                                                                AS `mes`,
       `pr`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA`                                                                  AS `cod_un_neg`,
       CASE
           WHEN (NOT ISNULL(`b`.`ID_Producto`)) THEN 'B2B'
           WHEN (ISNULL(`b`.`ID_Producto`) AND (`pr`.`NOM_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'ACEITES MANTECAS Y MARGARINAS')) THEN 'B2C'
           WHEN (`pr`.`NOM_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'LINEA INDUSTRIAS              ') THEN 'B2B'
           ELSE `pr`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` END                                                     AS `nombre_segmento`,
       REPLACE(`pr`.`NOM_MARCA`, 'GD ', '')                                                     AS `nombre_marca`,
       CASE
           WHEN (CASE WHEN (`p`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'Maquila') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `p`.`Canal` END = 'Tat') THEN 'COB'
           WHEN (CASE WHEN (`p`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'Maquila') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `p`.`Canal` END = 'Mayoristas') THEN 'MAY'
           WHEN (CASE WHEN (`p`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'Maquila') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `p`.`Canal` END = 'Exportaciones')
               THEN 'EXP'
           WHEN (CASE WHEN (`p`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'Maquila') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `p`.`Canal` END = 'Industrias') THEN 'IND'
           WHEN (CASE WHEN (`p`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'Maquila') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `p`.`Canal` END = 'Otros') THEN 'OTR'
           WHEN (CASE WHEN (`p`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'Maquila') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `p`.`Canal` END = 'Moderno') THEN 'AUT'
           WHEN (CASE WHEN (`p`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'Maquila') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `p`.`Canal` END = 'Panaderias') THEN 'PAN'
           WHEN (CASE WHEN (`p`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'Maquila') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `p`.`Canal` END = 'Horecas') THEN 'HOR'
           WHEN (CASE WHEN (`p`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'Maquila') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `p`.`Canal` END = 'Distribuidores')
               THEN 'DIS'
           ELSE CASE WHEN (`p`.`UnidadNegocio` = 'Maquila') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `p`.`Canal` END END AS `codigo_canal`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`p`.`Toneladas`, 0))                                                          AS `toneladas`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`p`.`Facturacion`, 0))                                                        AS `dolares`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`p`.`Margen`, 0))                                                             AS `margen`
FROM ((`DW_Presupuesto_SKU` as `p` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `pr`
       ON (`pr`.`COD_2_PROD` = `p`.`Codigo`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `b` ON (`pr`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`ID_Producto`))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 6, 3, `pr`.`NOM_MARCA`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_res_clientes as
SELECT `a`.`ID_CLIENTE`                           AS `id_cliente`,
       `a`.`RUC_CI`                               AS `ruc_ci`,
       `a`.`NOM_CLIENTE`                          AS `nombre_cliente`,
       `a`.`FECHA_CREACION`                       AS `fecha_creacion`,
       `a`.`COD_CANAL`                            AS `codigo_canal`,
       REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_CANAL`, 'GD ', '')        AS `nombre_canal`,
       `a`.`COD_AGENCIA`                          AS `id_agencia`,
       REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_AGENCIA`, 'AGENCIA ', '') AS `nombre_agencia`,
       `a`.`NOM_ZONA`                             AS `nombre_zona`,
       `a`.`NOM_PAIS`                             AS `pais`,
       `a`.`CIUDAD`                               AS `ciudad`,
       LEFT(`a`.`COD_RUTA`, 2)                    AS `ruta`,
       `a`.`COD_RUTA`                             AS `ruta_dia`,
       `a`.`COD_DIA_VISITA`                       AS `id_dia_visita`,
       `a`.`NOM_ZONA`                             AS `zona_visita`,
       REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_DIA_VISITA`, 'GD ', '')   AS `nombre_dia_visita`,
       `a`.`COD_REGION`                           AS `id_region`,
       `a`.`NOM_REGION`                           AS `nombre_region`,
       `a`.`COD_STATUS`                           AS `id_estado`,
       REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_STATUS`, 'GD ', '')       AS `estado`,
       `a`.`DESC_TIPO_ID`                         AS `tipo_id`,
       `a`.`DESC_CONDI_PAGO`                      AS `condicion_pago`,
       `a`.`MONTO_CREDITO`                        AS `monto_credito`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `a`
WHERE (`a`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999'))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_res_fecha as
SELECT `DIM_FECHA`.`id_fecha`         AS `id_fecha`,
       `DIM_FECHA`.`anio`             AS `anio`,
       MONTH(`DIM_FECHA`.`mes`)       AS `mes`,
       DATE(`DIM_FECHA`.`mes`)        AS `periodo`,
       `DIM_FECHA`.`semana`           AS `semana`,
       DATE(`DIM_FECHA`.`fecha`)      AS `fecha`,
       `DIM_FECHA`.`dia_nombre_corto` AS `dia_nombre_corto`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `DIM_FECHA`
WHERE ((`DIM_FECHA`.`anio` >= 2018) AND (`DIM_FECHA`.`anio` <= 2026))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_res_gestion as
SELECT `b`.`mes`                                                                   AS `mes`,
       `a`.`ID_CLIENTE`                                                            AS `id_cliente`,
       `a`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                                           AS `id_producto`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0))                                     AS `facturacion`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) / 1000)    AS `toneldas`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_VENDIDA`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0))) AS `unidades`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`MARGEN`, 0))                                                AS `margen`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`USD_NOTA_CRED`, 0)) / 1000) * -1)                         AS `dev_usd`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0)) / 1000) * -1)                                AS `dev_ton`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0))                                        AS `dev_un`,
       MAX(DATE(`a`.`ETL_TSTAMP`))                                                 AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `b`
        ON (`a`.`ID_FECHA` = `b`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
       ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `d`
      ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
WHERE ((`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`b`.`anio` >= '2023') AND (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN (' ')) AND
       (`a`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`d`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')))
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_res_presupuesto as
SELECT `pp`.`Anio`                                                     AS `anio`,
       `pp`.`Mes`                                                      AS `mes`,
       DATE(CONCAT(`pp`.`Anio`, '-', LPAD(`pp`.`Mes`, 2, '0'), '-01')) AS `periodo_anio_mes`,
       `pp`.`Ruta`                                                     AS `ruta`,
       `ca`.`Codigo`                                                   AS `codigo_canal`,
       `pr`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                              AS `id_producto`,
       `pp`.`Toneladas`                                                AS `toneladas`,
       `pp`.`Cajas Estadisticas`                                       AS `estadisticas`,
       `pp`.`Facturacion`                                              AS `facturacion`,
       `pp`.`Margen`                                                   AS `margen`
FROM ((((`DW_Presupuesto_SKU` as `pp` LEFT JOIN `MD_Rutas` as `ru`
         ON (`pp`.`Ruta` = `ru`.`Codigo`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Agencias` as `ag`
        ON (`ru`.`Agencia_Id` = `ag`.`Id`)) LEFT JOIN `MD_Canales` as `ca`
       ON (`ru`.`Canal_Id` = `ca`.`Id`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `pr`
      ON (`pr`.`COD_2_PROD` = `pp`.`Codigo`))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_res_producto as
SELECT `PRODUCTOS`.`id_producto`                                         AS `id_producto`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`cod_producto`                                        AS `cod_producto`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`nombre_producto`                                     AS `nombre_producto`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`nombre_unificado`                                    AS `nombre_unificado`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`cod_familia`                                         AS `cod_familia`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`nombre_familia`                                      AS `nombre_familia`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`cod_marca`                                           AS `cod_marca`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`nombre_marca`                                        AS `nombre_marca`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`marca`                                               AS `marca`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`cod_unidad_negocio`                                  AS `cod_unidad_negocio`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`unidad_negocio`                                      AS `unidad_negocio`,
       if((`PRODUCTOS`.`segmento` = 999), 'OTR', `PRODUCTOS`.`segmento`) AS `segmento`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`lead_time`                                           AS `lead_time`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`cod_dominio`                                         AS `cod_dominio`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`cod_estado`                                          AS `cod_estado`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`nombre_estado`                                       AS `nombre_estado`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`presentacion`                                        AS `presentacion`,
       `PRODUCTOS`.`envase`                                              AS `envase`,
       CASE
           WHEN ((`PRODUCTOS`.`cod_marca` IN ('046', '059', '206', '042')) AND
                 (`PRODUCTOS`.`cod_familia` IN ('002', '003'))) THEN '    Grasas de Panificacion 1'
           WHEN (`PRODUCTOS`.`cod_marca` IN ('050', '058', '296')) THEN ' Especializados'
           WHEN ((`PRODUCTOS`.`cod_marca` IN ('294')) AND (`PRODUCTOS`.`cod_familia` = '097')) THEN ' Especializados'
           WHEN ((`PRODUCTOS`.`cod_familia` IN ('112')) AND (`PRODUCTOS`.`segmento` = 'B2B'))
               THEN '  Harinas y Premezclas'
           WHEN (`PRODUCTOS`.`cod_marca` IN ('330', '049')) THEN '   Grasas de Panificacion 2'
           ELSE 'Otros' END                                              AS `Familia_Panaderias`
FROM (SELECT `a`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                                    AS `id_producto`,
             `a`.`COD_2_PROD`                                                     AS `cod_producto`,
             `a`.`DESC_PROD_1`                                                    AS `nombre_producto`,
             `a`.`PRODUCTO_UNIFICADO`                                             AS `nombre_unificado`,
             `a`.`COD_FAMILIA`                                                    AS `cod_familia`,
             REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_FAMILIA`, 'GD ', '')                                AS `nombre_familia`,
             `a`.`COD_MARCA`                                                      AS `cod_marca`,
             REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_MARCA`, 'GD ', '')                                  AS `nombre_marca`,
             REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_MARCA`, ' \\(.*\\)', ''), 'GD ', '') AS `marca`,
             `a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA`                                               AS `cod_unidad_negocio`,
             `a`.`NOM_SCLASIF_MCIA`                                               AS `unidad_negocio`,
             CASE
                 WHEN (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ'
                 WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'AMM')) THEN 'B2B'
                 WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'PPR')) THEN 'PPR'
                 WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'EXP')) THEN 'EXP'
                 WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'IND')) THEN 'B2B'
                 WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'LYA')) THEN 'LYA'
                 WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'NUA')) THEN 'NUA'
                 WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'OLN')) THEN 'OLN'
                 WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'OTR')) THEN 'OTR'
                 WHEN (`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'CAR') THEN 'OTR'
                 WHEN ISNULL(`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`) THEN 'B2B'
                 ELSE `a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` END                                  AS `segmento`,
             `a`.`LEADTIME`                                                       AS `lead_time`,
             `a`.`COD_DOMINIO`                                                    AS `cod_dominio`,
             `a`.`ESTATUS`                                                        AS `cod_estado`,
             `a`.`NOM_ESTATUS`                                                    AS `nombre_estado`,
             REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_PRESENTACION`, 'GD ', '')                           AS `presentacion`,
