             REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_ENVASE`, 'GD ', '')                                 AS `envase`
      FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `a`) AS `PRODUCTOS`
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_res_productos as
SELECT `a`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                                    AS `id_producto`,
       `a`.`COD_2_PROD`                                                     AS `cod_producto`,
       `a`.`DESC_PROD_1`                                                    AS `nombre_producto`,
       `a`.`PRODUCTO_UNIFICADO`                                             AS `nombre_unificado`,
       `a`.`COD_FAMILIA`                                                    AS `cod_familia`,
       REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_FAMILIA`, 'GD ', '')                                AS `nombre_familia`,
       `a`.`COD_MARCA`                                                      AS `cod_marca`,
       REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_MARCA`, 'GD ', '')                                  AS `nombre_marca`,
       REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_MARCA`, ' \\(.*\\)', ''), 'GD ', '') AS `marca`,
       `a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA`                                               AS `cod_unidad_negocio`,
       `a`.`NOM_SCLASIF_MCIA`                                               AS `unidad_negocio`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ'
           WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'AMM')) THEN 'B2B'
           WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'PPR')) THEN 'PPR'
           WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'EXP')) THEN 'EXP'
           WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'IND')) THEN 'B2B'
           WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'LYA')) THEN 'LYA'
           WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'NUA')) THEN 'NUA'
           WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'OLN')) THEN 'OLN'
           WHEN ((`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = '999') AND (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'OTR')) THEN 'OTR'
           WHEN (`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` = 'CAR') THEN 'OTR'
           WHEN ISNULL(`a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO`) THEN 'B2B'
           ELSE `a`.`COD_UNID_NEGOCIO` END                                  AS `segmento`,
       `a`.`LEADTIME`                                                       AS `lead_time`,
       `a`.`COD_DOMINIO`                                                    AS `cod_dominio`,
       `a`.`ESTATUS`                                                        AS `cod_estado`,
       `a`.`NOM_ESTATUS`                                                    AS `nombre_estado`,
       REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_PRESENTACION`, 'GD ', '')                           AS `presentacion`,
       REPLACE(`a`.`NOM_ENVASE`, 'GD ', '')                                 AS `envase`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `a`
WHERE (`a`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR'))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_rutero_televenta as
SELECT DATE(`GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`FECHA_INFO`) AS `fecha`,
       RIGHT(`GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`RUTA`, 1)   AS `dia_semana`,
       LEFT(`GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`RUTA`, 2)    AS `ruta`,
       `GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`ID`               AS `id_cliente`,
       `GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`STATUS`           AS `status`
FROM `DDM_ERP`.`GEO_VISITA_TAT` as `GEO_VISITA_TAT`
WHERE (LEFT(`GEO_VISITA_TAT`.`RUTA`, 2) IN ('ED', 'ET', 'GF', 'GT', 'GX'))
        /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_venta_ag_can_prod as
SELECT YEAR(`b`.`mes`)                                                                  AS `anio`,
       MONTH(`b`.`mes`)                                                                 AS `mes`,
       `d`.`COD_AGENCIA`                                                                AS `cod_agencia`,
       CASE WHEN (`p`.`cod_unidad_negocio` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `d`.`COD_CANAL` END AS `codigo_canal`,
       `a`.`ID_PRODUCTO`                                                                AS `id_producto`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) / 1000)         AS `toneldas`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0))                                          AS `dolares`,
       (SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_VENDIDA`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`CANT_NOTA_CRED`, 0)))      AS `unidades`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`a`.`MARGEN`, 0))                                                     AS `margen`,
       MAX(DATE(`a`.`ETL_TSTAMP`))                                                      AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `a` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `b`
         ON (`a`.`ID_FECHA` = `b`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `c`
        ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `c`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `vw_res_productos` as `p`
       ON (`a`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `d`
      ON (`a`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `d`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
WHERE ((`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`b`.`anio` >= '2024') AND (`c`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN (' ')) AND
       (`a`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`d`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')))
GROUP BY `b`.`mes`, `a`.`ID_CLIENTE`, 5 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_ventas_prod_sum as
SELECT `f`.`anio`                                                                       AS `anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`mes`)                                                                 AS `mes`,
       `p`.`cod_unidad_negocio`                                                         AS `cod_un_neg`,
       `p`.`segmento`                                                                   AS `nombre_segmento`,
       `p`.`nombre_marca`                                                               AS `nombre_marca`,
       CASE WHEN (`p`.`cod_unidad_negocio` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ' ELSE `c`.`COD_CANAL` END AS `cod_canal`,
       `p`.`id_producto`                                                                AS `id_producto`,
       `p`.`nombre_producto`                                                            AS `nombre_producto`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`v`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`v`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) / 1000)         AS `toneladas`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`v`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0))                                          AS `dolares`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`v`.`MARGEN`, 0))                                                     AS `margen`,
       MAX(DATE(`v`.`ETL_TSTAMP`))                                                      AS `ETL_TSTAMP`
FROM (((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `v` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `f`
        ON (`v`.`ID_FECHA` = `f`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `vw_res_productos` as `p`
       ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`id_producto`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
      ON (`v`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`))
WHERE ((`p`.`cod_unidad_negocio` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`f`.`anio` >= '2018') AND (`p`.`cod_unidad_negocio` NOT IN (' ')) AND
       (`v`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')))
GROUP BY 1, `f`.`mes`, 3, 5, `c`.`COD_CANAL`, 4, 7, 8 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

create definer = COMERCIAL@`` view vw_ventas_sum as
SELECT `f`.`anio`                                                               AS `anio`,
       MONTH(`f`.`mes`)                                                         AS `mes`,
       `p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA`                                                   AS `cod_un_neg`,
       CASE
           WHEN (NOT ISNULL(`b`.`ID_Producto`)) THEN 'B2B'
           WHEN (ISNULL(`b`.`ID_Producto`) AND (`p`.`NOM_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'ACEITES MANTECAS Y MARGARINAS')) THEN 'B2C'
           WHEN (`p`.`NOM_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'LINEA INDUSTRIAS              ') THEN 'B2B'
           ELSE `p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` END                                      AS `nombre_segmento`,
       REPLACE(`p`.`NOM_MARCA`, 'GD ', '')                                      AS `nombre_marca`,
       CASE
           WHEN (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` = 'MAQ') THEN 'MAQ'
           WHEN (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = '999') THEN 'OTR'
           WHEN (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'OFI') THEN 'OTR'
           WHEN (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'REL') THEN 'OTR'
           WHEN (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'NNE') THEN 'AUT'
           WHEN (`c`.`COD_CANAL` = 'ECM') THEN 'AUT'
           ELSE `c`.`COD_CANAL` END                                             AS `cod_canal`,
       ((SUM(IFNULL(`v`.`VENTA_KG`, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(`v`.`DEV_KG`, 0))) / 1000) AS `toneladas`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`v`.`VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO`, 0))                                  AS `dolares`,
       SUM(IFNULL(`v`.`MARGEN`, 0))                                             AS `margen`
FROM ((((`DDM_ERP`.`FAC_VENTA_TOTAL` as `v` LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_FECHA` as `f`
         ON (`v`.`ID_FECHA` = `f`.`id_fecha`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_PRODUCTO` as `p`
        ON (`v`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `p`.`ID_PRODUCTO`)) LEFT JOIN `DDM_ERP`.`DIM_CLIENTE` as `c`
       ON (`v`.`ID_CLIENTE` = `c`.`ID_CLIENTE`)) LEFT JOIN `HOM_B2B` as `b` ON (`p`.`ID_PRODUCTO` = `b`.`ID_Producto`))
WHERE ((`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` IN ('AMM', 'EXP', 'IND', 'LYA', 'MAQ', 'NUA', 'OLN', 'OTR', 'PPR')) AND
       (`f`.`anio` >= '2024') AND (`p`.`COD_SCLASIF_MCIA` NOT IN (' ')) AND
       (`v`.`SERVICIO` NOT IN ('11', '999', '0')) AND (`c`.`COD_CANAL` NOT IN ('999')))
GROUP BY 1, `f`.`mes`, 3, `p`.`NOM_MARCA`, `c`.`COD_CANAL`, 4 /*!90623 OPTION(CLIENT_FOUND_ROWS=1)*/;

- Permissions: Only SELECT statements are permitted. INSERTS, UPDATES, and DELETES are strictly prohibited.

- Scope: Use ONLY the tables and fields defined in the provided context.
